r in the Christian era; used before dates after the supposed year Christ was born
A.D.是拉丁语Anno Domini的缩写，意为“主后”，用于标注公元纪年。
一般认为，佛教最早于公元67年在东汉明帝统治时期传入中国。
s before noon; r before noon
A.M.表示上午时间（ante meridiem），常用于正式或书面表达时刻时与P.M.区分。
forsake, leave behind; give up with the intent of never claiming again; stop maintaining or insisting on; of ideas or claims
abandon常指彻底放弃某物、计划或习惯，如 abandon a ship（弃船）或 abandon hope（绝望）。
the act of giving something up; the voluntary surrender of property (or a right to property) without attempting to reclaim it or give it away
abandonment多用于法律语境，表示对财产或责任的正式抛弃与不再承担。
自从他离开她，她就以遗弃为由起诉他离婚。
abasement指使某人遭受羞辱、贬低地位的行为，常含被动受害意味。
在雅思写作或阅读中，abasement 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
缩写, 缩短, 简化, 简写成, 缩写为。
abbreviate意为缩短文字或时间，如 abbreviate a word（缩写单词）以节省篇幅。
a shortened form of a word or phrase; shortening something by omitting parts of it
abbreviation指词语的缩略形式，常见于日常书写中以简化表达，如 Dr. for Doctor。
教唆, 煽动, 帮助, 支持。
assist or encourage, usually in some wrongdoing
abet意为教唆或协助他人犯罪，通常与介词in连用，强调共犯角色中的煽动作用。
在雅思写作中，abet 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
abeyance指法律程序、制度等暂时中止状态，待条件满足后可能恢复生效。
遗产的收益应暂时搁置在托管账户中，直到未成年人年满21岁。
(by)遵守，坚持；(abode)持续，住，逗留vt. 容忍，忍受；等候
v dwell; v put up with something or somebody unpleasant
abide常与by连用（ abide by rules），表示遵守规则或忍受某种不愉快情况。
您可以在城里与我同住
能力；本领；才能，才干；专门技能，天资

the quality of being able to perform; a quality that permits or facilitates achievement or accomplishment; possession of the qualities (especially mental qualities) required to do something or get something done
指完成某事所需的技能或力量，常与 have the ability to do sth. 搭配。
这款手机能够以无线方式升级其软件。
有(能力、时间、知识等)做某事，有本事的

(usually followed by `to') having the necessary means or skill or know-how or authority to do something; have the skills and qualifications to do things well; having inherent physical or mental ability or capacity
表示“能够”，后接动词原形构成 be able to do sth., 强调最终成功做到某事。
not normal; not typical or usual or regular or conforming to a norm; departing from the normal in e.g. intelligence and development; much greater than the normal
意为反常的或不正常的，常用于描述行为、现象或生理状态偏离常规标准。
在船(飞机、车)上ad. 上船(飞机)
on a ship, train, plane or other vehicle; on first or second or third base; side by side
指在船、飞机等交通工具上或在船上/机上的活动，如 be aboard the ship。
意为正式废除或取消某项法律、制度或习俗，常与 abolish slavery 搭配使用。
奴隶制在19世纪中叶在美国和俄罗斯被废除
the act of abolishing a system or practice or institution (especially abolishing slavery)
指废除这一行为本身的过程或状态，如 the abolition of capital punishment。
土著的, 原来的。n.土著居民。
of or pertaining to members of the indigenous people of Australia; having existed from the beginning; in an earliest or original stage or state
特指原住民的，常用于 aboriginal people/titles，强调当地最早居民的身份地位。
在雅思话题中，aboriginal 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
异常中断, 中途失败, 夭折, 流产, 发育不全。n.中止计划[任务]。
terminate before completion; cease development, die, and be aborted; terminate a pregnancy by undergoing an abortion
作动词时意为终止妊娠或使计划失败；作不及物动词可表示机器突然停止运转。
在雅思写作中，abort 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
指人工流产手术，属于敏感医疗术语，正式语境中需谨慎使用并尊重相关法规。
failing to accomplish an intended result
形容徒劳无功的或无效的尝试，如 an abortive attempt to negotiate a deal。
多, 大量存在, 富于, 充满。
be abundant or plentiful; exist in large quantities; be in a state of movement or action
常与 in 连用，表示某地或某人拥有大量某种事物。
在雅思写作中，abound 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
在周围；大约prep. 关于；在周围a. 准备
all around or on all sides; in the area or vicinity; used of movement to or among many different places or in no particular direction
作介词表“关于”；作副词修饰动词，意为“大约”。
上述的ad. 在上面prep. 在…之上，高于
appearing earlier in the same text
指位置在上方或数值更大时，常与 all, every 等连用。
mentioned or named earlier in the same text
正式用语，用于书面语中指代前文刚提到过的内容。
在雅思写作或阅读中，above-mentioned 可用于描述公共健康相关情况。
an abraded area where the skin is torn or worn off; erosion by friction
指皮肤或物体表面因摩擦而造成的擦伤或磨损痕迹。
在雅思写作或阅读中，abrasion 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
alongside each other, facing in the same direction
常与 keep abreast of 搭配，表示紧跟时事或保持同步。
在雅思阅读中，abreast 可能出现在就业与技能相关文章中。
reduce in scope while retaining essential elements; lessen, diminish, or curtail
指缩短文本长度而不改变其核心意义，多用于法律条文修订。
到国外，在国外；在传播，在流传
to or in a foreign country
作副词表示“在国外”，常与 live, work, study 等动词连用。
正式法律术语，指通过立法程序废除或取消某项旧法。
在雅思话题中，abrogate 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
the act of abrogating; an official or legal cancellation
名词形式 abrogation，专指废除法令、条约等具有约束力的文件的行为。
在雅思写作或阅读中，abrogation 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
marked by sudden changes in subject and sharp transitions; exceedingly sudden and unexpected; extremely steep
形容变化或说话突然发生，常指令人惊讶的转折。
作副词修饰动词，表示动作以突兀、无预警的方式进行。
在雅思阅读中，abruptly 可能出现在环境保护相关文章中。
缺乏，不存在；缺席，不在；缺席的时间
the state of being absent; failure to be present; the time interval during which something or somebody is away
指人或物的不在场状态，常与介词 of 连用构成固定搭配。
他对没有任何解释感到惊讶
缺席的；缺乏的，不存在的；心不在焉的
not being in a specified place; lost in thought; showing preoccupation
作形容词表示“缺席的”，也可作动词意为“缺勤”。
形容人因走神而心不在焉，常用来描述注意力不集中的状态。
在雅思写作或阅读中，absent-minded 可用于描述城市发展相关情况。
绝对的，完全的；确实的，肯定的
perfect or complete or pure; complete and without restriction or qualification; sometimes used informally as intensifiers; not limited by law
表示完全、毫无保留的肯定程度，常用于修饰形容词或名词。
没有凡人可以影响绝对的
completely and without qualification; used informally as intensifiers; totally and definitely; without question
作副词加强语气，意为“绝对地”，常与 believe 等动词连用。
吸收;吸引…的注意,使全神贯注
become imbued; take up mentally; take up, as of debts or payments
指液体或光线被物体接纳并留存的过程，也可引申为理解知识。

(chemistry) a process in which one substance permeates another; a fluid permeates or is dissolved by a liquid or solid; (physics) the process in which incident radiated energy is retained without reflection or transmission on passing through a medium
名词形式，常与 light、water 等搭配，表示吸收作用或过程。
在雅思话题中，absorption 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
抽象的;n. (书籍、演说等的)摘要
existing only in the mind; separated from embodiment
指不具体的理论概念，作形容词时多用于 abstract art 等语境。
a concept or idea not associated with any specific instance; the act of withdrawing or removing something; the process of formulating general concepts by abstracting common properties of instances
指从具体事物中抽离出的概念，常用于哲学讨论或艺术创作中的抽象思维。
在雅思写作或阅读中，abstraction 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
inconsistent with reason or logic or common sense; incongruous; inviting ridicule
形容某事极不合理、荒谬可笑，常与 it is absurd to... 搭配表达强烈反对。
a message whose content is at variance with reason; a ludicrous folly
指事物中存在的荒谬性质或程度，常用于描述逻辑漏洞或行为的不合情理之处。
在雅思话题中，absurdity 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。

the property of a more than adequate quantity or supply; (physics) the ratio of the number of atoms of a specific isotope of an element to the total number of isotopes present; (chemistry) the ratio of the total mass of an element in the earth's crust to the total mass of the earth's crust; expressed as a percentage or in parts per million
表示数量极多、充裕的状态，常修饰资源、机会等不可数名词以强调富足。
大量(充足)的；(in)丰富(富裕)的
作为形容词描述大量存在或供应充足的事物，如 abundant evidence 指确凿证据。
a rude expression intended to offend or hurt; use foul or abusive language towards; use wrongly or improperly or excessively
既含滥用职权之意，也指言语上的辱骂；作动词时多接 on/with sb. 结构。

associated with academia or an academy; hypothetical or theoretical and not expected to produce an immediate or practical result; marked by a narrow focus on or display of learning especially its trivial aspects
专指与学校、研究或专业领域相关的，区别于日常非正式的普通学习场合。
在雅思话题中，academic 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
(高等)专科院校；学术社团，协会，研究院
a secondary school (usually private); an institution for the advancement of art or science or literature; a school for special training
可指高等教育机构（如艺术学院）或私人俱乐部，强调其精英性与专业性背景。
正式用语，意为同意某请求或加入组织，常接 to a proposal/arrangement 等宾语。
move faster; cause to move faster
指使过程更快发生，常用于 accelerate progress/growth 等搭配以促进发展速度。
an increase in rate of change; the act of accelerating; increasing the speed; (physics) a rate of increase of velocity
指速度增加的物理过程，常与 force（力）或 rate of change（变化率）搭配使用。
a pedal that controls the throttle valve; a valve that regulates the supply of fuel to the engine; a scientific instrument that increases the kinetic energy of charged particles
汽车上的踏板叫 accelerator；在电子游戏中也指加速键或提升等级的道具。
在雅思写作或阅读中，accelerator 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。
口音，腔调；重音(符号)vt. 重读
distinctive manner of oral expression; a diacritical mark used to indicate stress or placed above a vowel to indicate a special pronunciation
指说话时的语音特色，常与 strong、heavy 等形容词连用描述口音的明显程度。
接受，领受；认可，同意vi. 同意，认可
consider or hold as true; receive willingly something given or offered; give an affirmative reply to; respond favorably to
表示同意或认可某事，常用搭配有 accept an offer（接受提议）或 accept responsibility（承担责任）。
worthy of acceptance or satisfactory; judged to be in conformity with approved usage; adequate for the purpose
形容事物符合标准或可被容忍，常与 to be acceptable or find something unacceptable 连用。
接受，接收，验收，接纳；承认，认可
the state of being acceptable and accepted; (contract law) words signifying consent to the terms of an offer (thereby creating a contract); banking: a time draft drawn on and accepted by a bank
指社会对某事的认可程度，如 public acceptance（公众接受度）或 gain acceptance（获得接纳）。
存取(计算机文件); n. 通道;入口;接近,进入;(to)接近(或进入、享用)的机会

the right to obtain or make use of or take advantage of something (as services or membership); a way of entering or leaving; a code (a series of characters or digits) that must be entered in some way (typed or dialed or spoken) to get the use of something (a telephone line or a computer or a local area network etc.)
作动词时意为进入或使用系统；作名词常与 direct access、remote access 等固定搭配连用。
在雅思话题中，access 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
capable of being reached; capable of being read with comprehension; easily obtained
形容容易接近或理解，常用于 accessible website（无障碍网站）或 easily accessible location（易达地点）。
clothing that is worn or carried, but not part of your main clothing; a supplementary component that improves capability; someone who helps another person commit a crime
指附加在主要物品上的小物件，如 accessory for a phone（手机配件），常与 fashion accessories 连用。
在雅思话题中，accessory 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
意外遭遇，事故；意外(因素)
an unfortunate mishap; especially one causing damage or injury; anything that happens suddenly or by chance without an apparent cause
通常指意外发生的灾难性事件，常用搭配有 traffic accident、workplace accident 或 avoid an accident。
在雅思话题中，accident 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
偶然的；意外的；无意中的
happening by chance or unexpectedly or unintentionally
指非故意的，常与 happen、occur 等词连用表示意外发生。
在雅思话题中，accidental 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
r without advance planning; r of a minor or subordinate nature; r without intention; in an unintentional manner
副词形式，修饰动词说明动作是无意中发生的，如 accidentally meet someone。
喝彩, 欢呼v.欢呼, 称赞。
作名词表示热烈赞扬或喝彩，常与 receive、win acclaim 搭配使用。
在雅思写作或阅读中，acclaim 常用于讨论科技与交流相关话题。
provide with something desired or needed; have room for; hold without crowding; make (one thing) compatible with (another)
动词意为提供便利或容纳某人某物，常见于 accommodate guests/needs 等表达中。

a settlement of differences; in the theories of Jean Piaget: the modification of internal representations in order to accommodate a changing knowledge of reality; living quarters provided for public convenience
名词指住宿设施或费用，如 hotel accommodation；也可泛指适应措施。
在雅思话题中，accommodation 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
an event or situation that happens at the same time as or in connection with another; a musical part (vocal or instrumental) that supports or provides background for other musical parts
作名词表示伴奏音乐或伴随人员，常用于 musical accompaniment 等固定搭配。
在雅思话题中，accompaniment 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
动词指陪伴某人做某事，常与 on、with 连用，如 accompany someone to the hospital。
v put in effect; v to gain with effort
及物动词表示完成困难任务或实现目标，多用于 accomplish a goal/dream。
名词指成就或功绩，常与 great、significant accomplishment 等形容词连用。
在雅思话题中，accomplishment 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
相一致;相符合; vt. 授予,赠与; n. 一致,符合;(尤指国与国之间的)谅解
作动词表示一致同意（in accord），作名词可指和谐关系或正式协议文件。
常与 in accordance with 连用，表示“依照”或“符合”，后接规则、法律等。
(followed by `to') in agreement with or accordant with; (followed by `to') as reported or stated by
常与介词 to 连用，表示“根据……。
相应地，照着办，按照；于是，因此
用于表示根据前述情况采取相应行动，常接动词原形或完整句子。
账目;账户;计算;vt./vi. 说明
a formal contractual relationship established to provide for regular banking or brokerage or business services; importance or value; a statement of recent transactions and the resulting balance
作名词指“账户”或“账目”，作动词意为“向某人解释说明情况”。
someone who maintains and audits business accounts
指从事财务记账、报税及审计工作的专业人士，常与 tax return 或 audit 搭配。
在雅思话题中，accountant 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。

a convincing explanation that reveals basic causes; a system that provides quantitative information about finances; a bookkeeper's chronological list of related debits and credits of a business; forms part of a ledger of accounts
指记录企业财务收支的系统，常与 finance 连用。
grow by addition; come into the possession of
指（利息、费用或权利）随时间自然累积增加，常与 interest 连用。
常指随时间推移而累积的利息、费用或权利，如 accrued interest（应计利息）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，accrued 可用于描述公共交通相关情况。
指逐渐积累财富、经验或物品，常与 money, knowledge, dust 等宾语搭配。
the act of accumulating; (finance) profits that are not paid out as dividends but are added to the capital base of the corporation
指事物逐渐聚集的过程，常用于描述知识、财富或灰尘的积累。
在雅思话题中，accumulation 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
increasing by successive addition; marked by acquiring or amassing
指随时间或数量逐渐增加的，常用于描述积累性效应。
在雅思写作或阅读中，accumulative 可用于描述教育相关情况。
the quality of being near to the true value; (mathematics) the number of significant figures given in a number
名词，表示精确度或正确率，常与 high/low accuracy 搭配使用。
正确无误的；准确的，精确的

conforming exactly or almost exactly to fact or to a standard or performing with total accuracy; (of ideas, images, representations, expressions) characterized by perfect conformity to fact or truth; strictly correct
形容词，描述某事完全符合事实或标准，如 an accurate report。
副词，修饰动词表示以精确的方式完成动作，例如 measure accurately。
在雅思写作或阅读中，accurately 可用于描述公共健康相关情况。
a formal charge of wrongdoing brought against a person; the act of imputing blame or guilt; an assertion that someone is guilty of a fault or offence
名词，指正式的指控或罪名，常与 serious accusation 连用。
在雅思话题中，accusation 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
bring an accusation against; level a charge against
动词 accuse sb of sth 是固定搭配，意为指责某人做了某事。
v make psychologically or physically used (to something)
指使习惯于某种情况或行为，常与 to/get used to 连用。
在雅思写作中，accustom 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
痛；哀怜n. (指连续)疼痛、酸痛
have a desire for something or someone who is not present; be the source of pain
名词 ache 通常接身体部位作定语，如 headache/backache/toothache。
在雅思写作中，ache 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
动词 achieve 后常接目标、成功或成就等抽象名词作为宾语。
n the action of accomplishing something
指通过努力获得的成功或成果，常用于 academic achievement 等语境。
在雅思话题中，achievement 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
causing a dull and steady pain
作形容词时指“疼痛的”，常与 body part 连用，如 an aching head。
在雅思写作或阅读中，aching 可用于描述教育相关情况。
酸的,尖刻的 n. 酸
having the characteristics of an acid
既指化学上的“酸”或“酸性物质”，也比喻性格尖刻、态度傲慢的人。
在雅思话题中，acid 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
酸度, 酸性, [医]酸过多, 胃酸过多。
the taste experience when something acidic is taken into the mouth; pH values below 7
专指物质的“酸度”这一物理性质，常用于描述土壤或溶液的 pH 值相关语境。
在雅思写作或阅读中，acidity 常用于讨论科技与交流相关话题。
承认;表示收到信件;表示感谢
report the receipt of; express obligation, thanks, or gratitude for; accept as legally binding and valid
意为“承认、确认”，常接 that 从句或宾语加 to do sth.，表示正式认可某事。
a statement acknowledging something or someone
指对某人行为的“感谢”或“收到通知的回复”，如 send an acknowledgment of receipt。
在雅思写作或阅读中，acknowledgment 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
意为“使认识、告知”，后接 with sb. about sth.，强调让双方建立初步了解的过程。
认识，相识，了解；相识的人，熟人
personal knowledge or information about someone or something; a relationship less intimate than friendship; a person with whom you are acquainted
指人与人之间的“熟人关系”或具体认识的“人”，如 make an acquaintance of someone。
在雅思话题中，acquaintance 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
作形容词表示“已熟悉的、相识的”，常用于 be acquainted with sb./sth. 结构。

group of guns or missile launchers operated together at one place; a device that produces electricity; may have several primary or secondary cells arranged in parallel or series; a collection of related things intended for use together

relevant relation or interconnection; the direction or path along which something moves or along which it lies; dignified manner or conduct

a regular route for a sentry or policeman; a single pulsation of an oscillation produced by adding two waves of different frequencies; has a frequency equal to the difference between the two oscillations; the sound of stroke or blow

making an important discovery; a penetration of a barrier such as an enemy's defense

copulate with a female, used especially of horses; cause to procreate (animals)

指轻柔的自然风，常与 gentle breeze 搭配描述微风拂面的感觉。

意为使范围、视野或理解力变宽泛，常用于 broaden one's horizons。

意为“澄清”或“阐明”，常接 that 从句或直接宾语如 clarify the situation。
free from obscurity and easy to understand; the comprehensibility of clear expression
指思维的清晰性或无歧义的状态，是 clear 的名词形式，常用于表达观点明确时。
在雅思写作或阅读中，clarity 常用于讨论文化多样性相关话题。
金属碰撞声;互碰;时间冲突;意见抵触
a state of conflict between persons; a state of conflict between colors; be incompatible; be or come into conflict
既指声音上的“冲突”，也比喻意见、利益或文化的激烈碰撞与对抗局面。
a fastener (as a buckle or hook) that is used to hold two things together; the act of grasping; hold firmly and tightly
作动词意为“扣住”或“紧握”，名词则指手镯等环状饰品，常搭配 jewelry。
在雅思话题中，clasp 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
班级，年级；种类，等级，阶级；(一节)课
a collection of things sharing a common attribute; a body of students who are taught together; people having the same social, economic, or educational status
泛指学生群体、社会阶层或课程类别，如 upper class 或 take a computer class。
第一流的,最优秀的;传统的; n. 文豪;古罗马、希腊作家;古典作品
a creation of the highest excellence; an artist who has created classic works
指经典作品或具有永恒魅力的事物，也可形容传统且不过时的风格。
在雅思话题中，classic 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。

of or relating to the most highly developed stage of an earlier civilisation and its culture; of or relating to the study of the literary works of ancient Greece and Rome; (language) having the form used by ancient standard authors
主要修饰古希腊罗马艺术、音乐等高雅文化形式，强调历史渊源与学术性。
在雅思话题中，classical 可用于描述公共健康相关问题。

a group of people or things arranged by class or category; the basic cognitive process of arranging into classes or categories; restriction imposed by the government on documents or weapons that are available only to certain authorized people
指对事物进行系统划分或归类的过程，常用于科学分类或数据整理场景。
在雅思话题中，classification 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
arrange or order by classes or categories; declare unavailable, as for security reasons
意为将物品、人群等按标准分门别类，常接介词 into 表示分组结果。
n an acquaintance that you go to school with
特指同一班级里的同学或同窗好友，强调共同学习经历的同辈关系。
在雅思写作或阅读中，classmate 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
a room in a school where lessons take place
专指进行教学活动的场所，即教室，区别于图书馆、实验室等其他教育空间。
在雅思话题中，classroom 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
a rattling noise (often produced by rapid movement)
描述金属餐具碰撞发出的连续清脆响声，常用来形容厨房或餐厅的嘈杂声。
在雅思写作或阅读中，clatter 常用于讨论文化多样性相关话题。
(grammar) an expression including a subject and predicate but not constituting a complete sentence
指法律文件或合同中的具体条款，是构成整体协议的基本组成部分之一。
在雅思话题中，clause 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
sharp curved horny process on the toe of a bird or some mammals or reptiles; a grasping structure on the limb of a crustacean or other arthropods; a bird's foot
既指动物用于捕食的锋利指甲或脚爪，也比喻人或组织具有的攻击性手段。
在雅思话题中，claw 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。

a very fine-grained soil that is plastic when moist but hard when fired; United States general who commanded United States forces in Europe from 1945 to 1949 and who oversaw the Berlin airlift (1897-1978); United States politician responsible for the Missouri Compromise between free and slave states (1777-1852)
指可塑的矿物材料黏土，常用于陶瓷制作、雕塑艺术或地质学相关描述中。
在雅思话题中，clay 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
清洁的，干净的v. 除去…污垢，把…弄干净
make clean by removing dirt, filth, or unwanted substances from; remove unwanted substances from, such as feathers or pits; be cleanable
既指物理上的“清洁”，也常作形容词表示“干净的”或动词意为“打扫干净”。
在雅思话题中，clean 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
清晰的(地)vt. 清除；使清楚vi. 变清澈
the state of being free of suspicion; make a way or path by removing objects; remove
可形容视线通透、局势明朗，也可用作及物动词表示“使……清楚/消除疑虑”。
the distance by which one thing clears another; the space between them; permission to proceed
指海关或官方批准的放行许可（customs clearance），也泛指空间上的净空距离。
在雅思话题中，clearance 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
without doubt or question; in an easily perceptible manner
副词 clearly 强调动作发生的方式明显、易懂，常用于修饰动词如 see or understand。
hold in a tight grasp; squeeze together tightly
指用力握紧拳头或嘴唇的动作（clench one's fists），常表达愤怒或极度紧张的情绪。
在雅思话题中，clench 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
an employee who performs clerical work (e.g., keeps records or accounts)
通常指在商店、银行等机构处理文书工作的职员，区别于负责销售的销售人员。
在雅思话题中，clerk 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
聪明的，伶俐的，机敏的，精巧的
形容人机智灵活或反应快（quick-witted），多用于褒义语境描述解决问题的能力。
n the power of creative imagination; n intelligence as manifested in being quick and witty; n the property of being ingenious
指聪明才智本身，常作不可数名词出现在抽象讨论中，如 lack of cleverness。
在雅思写作或阅读中，cleverness 常用于讨论公共交通相关话题。
make a clicking or ticking sound; produce a click; become clear or enter one's consciousness or emotions
既描述鼠标等设备的点击动作（click the mouse），也指相机快门声或网络音效。
在雅思话题中，click 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
a person who seeks the advice of a lawyer
专指接受服务的一方，如客户、委托人，常与 server 或 provider 搭配使用。
在雅思话题中，client 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
指某商家或机构服务的顾客群体，常与 possess / attract 等动词搭配。
a steep high face of rock
既指陡峭的悬崖地貌，也比喻人生或事业的危险边缘处境。
顶点的, 渐层法的, 高潮的。
consisting of or causing a climax
形容达到高潮阶段的，常用于描述戏剧、演讲或事件的顶点时刻。
在雅思写作或阅读中，climactic 可用于描述科技与交流相关情况。
the weather in some location averaged over some long period of time; the prevailing psychological state
指长期的天气模式而非短期状况，常与 change / control / affect 搭配使用。
顶点,小说等的高潮 v. 达到高潮
the highest point of anything conceived of as growing or developing or unfolding; the decisive moment in a novel or play; the most severe stage of a disease
既指故事或事件的最高潮部分，也比喻成功的关键转折点时刻。
an event that involves rising to a higher point (as in altitude or temperature or intensity etc.); the act of climbing something; go upward with gradual or continuous progress
除字面攀登外，常引申为在职业、地位等方面取得进步或提升的过程。
come or be in close contact with; stick or hold together and resist separation; to remain emotionally or intellectually attached; hold on tightly or tenaciously
指紧紧依附某物不放，常用于 cling to one's beliefs / memories 等抽象搭配。
在雅思话题中，cling 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
v come or be in close contact with; stick or hold together and resist separation; v to remain emotionally or intellectually attached; v hold on tightly or tenaciously
作形容词时形容持续紧抓或依恋的状态，如 clinging vines（攀缘植物）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，clinging 可用于描述公共交通相关情况。
a medical establishment run by a group of medical specialists; meeting for diagnosis of problems and instruction or remedial work in a particular activity; a healthcare facility for outpatient care
指提供医疗护理的小型机构，常特指牙科诊所、心理治疗室等专科场所。
在雅思话题中，clinic 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
relating to a clinic or conducted in or as if in a clinic and depending on direct observation of patients; scientifically detached; unemotional
作形容词时形容基于医学观察或实验的，如 clinical trial（临床试验）。
回形针;夹子;剪;修剪;猛打;vt. 剪短;猛击,痛打
any of various small fasteners used to hold loose articles together; an article of jewelry that can be clipped onto a hat or dress; the act of clipping or snipping
作动词指剪下或固定物品，如 clip a photo；作名词常指回形针或小夹子。
在雅思话题中，clip 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
斗蓬，披风；掩饰，幌子vt. 掩盖，掩饰
anything that covers or conceals; a loose outer garment
原指斗篷，现多用于 cloakroom（衣帽间）这一常见复合词中。
在雅思写作或阅读中，cloak 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。
钟vt. 记录(时间、速度等)，为…计时
a timepiece that shows the time of day
作名词意为时钟或钟表；作动词表示给……上发条或记录时间流逝。
在雅思话题中，clock 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
in the direction that the hands of a clock move
专指顺时针方向，常与 turn、rotate 等词连用描述旋转动作。
在雅思话题中，clockwise 可用于描述家庭生活相关问题。
关；结束a./ad. 近的(地)；紧密的(地)
move so that an opening or passage is obstructed; make shut; become closed; finish or terminate (meetings, speeches, etc.)
作形容词表示关闭或亲密；作副词 closely 强调紧密地靠近某物或某人。
not open or affording passage or access; (set theory) of an interval that contains both its endpoints; used especially of mouth or eyes
指完全封闭的状态，如 closed door，或与 open 构成固定对比 pair。
主要作名词表示商店、工厂等的倒闭或关闭事件，属正式用语。
在雅思写作或阅读中，closedown 常用于讨论文化多样性相关话题。
in a close relation or position in time or space; in a close manner
作为副词修饰动词，强调动作的紧密程度，如 listen closely to someone。
a small private room for study or prayer
指狭小的储藏室或壁橱；作名词时区别于 closet（美式英语中的厕所）。

n artifact made by weaving or felting or knitting or crocheting natural or synthetic fibers
指布料、织物，常与 cotton、silk 等材质词搭配描述衣物面料。
作及物动词，意为“给……穿衣”，常接宾语如 clothe the children。
衣服(虽为复数，亦不可数)
n clothing in general; v provide with clothes or put clothes on; v furnish with power or authority; of kings or emperors
指代所有衣物（复数），不可加 s，常说 wear clothes 或 put on clothes。
a covering designed to be worn on a person's body
泛指服装总称，常作不可数名词，如 clothing industry 或 casual clothing。
在雅思话题中，clothing 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
云(状物)；遮暗物，阴影；一大群
any collection of particles (e.g., smoke or dust) or gases that is visible; a visible mass of water or ice particles suspended at a considerable altitude; out of touch with reality

多云的，阴(天)的；混浊的，模糊的
lacking definite form or limits; full of or covered with clouds; (of liquids) clouded as with sediment

a rude or vulgar fool; a person who amuses others by ridiculous behavior
指小丑职业者，常与扮演角色相关，如 play the clown 或在马戏团表演。
在雅思写作或阅读中，clown 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
俱乐部，夜总会；社团；棍棒，球棒
a formal association of people with similar interests; stout stick that is larger at one end; a playing card in the minor suit that has one or more black trefoils on it
可指夜总会、社团或运动队，常见搭配有 join a club 或 nightclub。
evidence that helps to solve a problem
意为“线索”或“提示”，常用短语 follow the clue 表示顺着线索调查。
在雅思话题中，clue 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
s lacking grace in movement or posture; s not elegant or graceful in expression; s difficult to handle or manage especially because of shape
形容动作笨拙或不灵巧，常修饰人如 He is clumsy with tools。
一串,一簇;vi. 群集;丛生
come together as in a cluster or flock
指“簇”或“群”，常用 cluster of flowers 表示成簇的花朵聚集在一起。

a tense critical situation; a number of birds hatched at the same time; a pedal or lever that engages or disengages a rotating shaft and a driving mechanism

长途公共汽车,铁路客车,教师,教练 v. 辅导,训练
(sports) someone in charge of training an athlete or a team; a person who gives private instruction (as in singing, acting, etc.); a carriage pulled by four horses with one driver
既指体育或马术中的“教练”，也指长途汽车（coach）本身。

fossil fuel consisting of carbonized vegetable matter deposited in the Carboniferous period
作不可数名词泛指煤炭，常与 mine、burn 等词搭配使用。
在雅思话题中，coal 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
合并, 接合, 联合。
the state of being combined into one body
指为共同目标而结成的“联盟”或“联合政府”，多用于政治语境。
在雅思话题中，coalition 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
of textures that are rough to the touch or substances consisting of relatively large particles; lacking refinement or cultivation or taste; of low or inferior quality or value
形容质地粗糙、颗粒粗大，常用来描述布料纹理或声音沙哑。
a slope down which sleds may coast; the area within view
指陆地与海洋交界处的“海岸线”，也可作动词表示沿岸行驶。

of or relating to a coast; located on or near or bordering on a coast

上衣，外套；表皮；层，覆盖物v. 涂(盖)上
an outer garment that has sleeves and covers the body from shoulder down; worn outdoors; growth of hair or wool or fur covering the body of an animal
作名词指外衣，作动词表示给某人披上外套或覆盖某物。
在雅思话题中，coat 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
n a transmission line for high-frequency signals; v influence or urge by gentle urging, caressing, or flattering
意为“哄劝、诱使”，常与 into doing sth. 搭配以达成目的。

a narcotic (alkaloid) extracted from coca leaves; used as a surface anesthetic or taken for pleasure; can become powerfully addictive

obscene terms for penis; adult male chicken; adult male bird
指公鸡或男性生殖器，口语中常含粗俗意味；作动词意为‘安装’（如天线）时较正式。

a short mixed drink; an appetizer served as a first course at a meal
既指混合饮料也指鸡尾酒会，常用搭配有 order a cocktail 或 go to the cocktails。
在雅思写作或阅读中，cocktail 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。
规则,代号,密码 vt. 把…译成密码

a set of rules or principles or laws (especially written ones); a coding system used for transmitting messages requiring brevity or secrecy; (computer science) the symbolic arrangement of data or instructions in a computer program or the set of such instructions
作名词指密码、准则或行为模式；作动词意为将规则系统化并编纂成法典。
在雅思话题中，code 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
organize into a code or system, such as a body of law
意为‘使成为法律’，常接 that 从句说明被规范化的内容，如 codify the rules of conduct。
男女合校大学中的女生。adj.男女同学的,男女兼收的,对男女都开放的
A young woman who attends college.
缩写词 coed 指男女同校的学生或混合性别群体，常用于校园语境中代替 college student。
education of men and women in the same institutions

在雅思写作或阅读中，coeducation 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
a constant number that serves as a measure of some property or characteristic
在数学或物理公式中表示变量间的比例因子，如 the coefficient of friction（摩擦系数）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，coefficient 常用于讨论文化多样性相关话题。
to cause to do through pressure or necessity, by physical, moral or intellectual means :"She forced him to take a job in the city"
意为‘强迫’某人做某事，常与 into doing sth. 搭配，强调通过压力迫使他人服从。
在雅思写作中，coerce 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
a beverage consisting of an infusion of ground coffee beans; any of several small trees and shrubs native to the tropical Old World yielding coffee beans
日常指冲泡的饮品；作动词时意为‘加咖啡粉’或‘用咖啡豆煮水’，如 coffee the beans。
box in which a corpse is buried or cremated
专指盛放遗体的棺材，通常与 funeral、burial 等词连用，属于庄重且正式的词汇选择。
在雅思写作或阅读中，coffin 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
[机]嵌齿, 小船。vt.上齿轮, 欺骗
a subordinate who performs an important but routine function; tooth on the rim of gear wheel

在雅思写作或阅读中，cog 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
认知的, 认识的, 有感知的。
of or being or relating to or involving cognition
形容与思维、感知相关的事物，如 cognitive bias（认知偏差）。
the state of cohering or sticking together; logical and orderly and consistent relation of parts
指逻辑或结构上的连贯性，常出现在 coherence of argument 中。
在雅思话题中，coherence 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
一致的，协调的；(话语等)条理清楚的

marked by an orderly, logical, and aesthetically consistent relation of parts; capable of thinking and expressing yourself in a clear and consistent manner; (physics) of waves having a constant phase relation
形容语句通顺、有条理，如 a coherent explanation（条理清晰的解释）。
(botany) the process in some plants of parts growing together that are usually separate (such as petals); (physics) the intermolecular force that holds together the molecules in a solid or liquid
指文本或段落内部的连接紧密度，常与 cohesion together use。

causing cohesion; cohering or tending to cohere; well integrated
形容句子间衔接自然、相互关联，如 a cohesive paragraph（连贯的段落）。
盘绕,缠绕;n. 一卷,一圈

a structure consisting of something wound in a continuous series of loops; a round shape formed by a series of concentric circles (as formed by leaves or flower petals); a transformer that supplies high voltage to spark plugs in a gasoline engine
指金属线圈或弹簧，也可作动词表示“盘绕”物体。
铸币,硬币 vt. 铸造,创造
a flat metal piece (usually a disc) used as money

造币; 创造; 货币制度;创造新词

恰好相合,同时发生;意见一致;位置重合,重叠
go with, fall together; be the same

指能被点燃或燃烧的物质，常用于描述易燃物品如汽油、木材等。

在雅思话题中，compass 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。

able to exist and perform in harmonious or agreeable combination; capable of being used with or connected to other devices or components without modification; capable of forming a homogeneous mixture that neither separates nor is altered by chemical interaction
常指系统、软件或设备能“兼容”彼此，如 compatible with Windows。
force somebody to do something; necessitate or exact

v force somebody to do something; v necessitate or exact
常与 that 从句连用，表示“迫使某人做某事”，强调外部压力或必然性。

adjust for; make amends for; pay compensation for; make payment to; compensate
常与 for sth.搭配，指通过金钱或行动来弥补损失、伤害或不公。
补偿(或赔偿)的款物；补偿，赔偿

something (such as money) given or received as payment or reparation (as for a service or loss or injury); (psychiatry) a defense mechanism that conceals your undesirable shortcomings by exaggerating desirable behaviors
指因工作损失或伤害而获得的金钱赔偿，常与 loss of income 搭配。
在雅思话题中，compensation 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。

n the contestant you hope to defeat

use a computer program to translate source code written in a particular programming language into computer-readable machine code that can be executed

express complaints, discontent, displeasure, or unhappiness; make a formal accusation; bring a formal charge
指对某事表示不满或提出批评，常用 complain about sth. to sb./to the authorities。
抱怨，诉苦，怨言，控告；疾病

(formerly) a loud cry (or repeated cries) of pain or rage or sorrow; an expression of grievance or resentment; (civil law) the first pleading of the plaintiff setting out the facts on which the claim for relief is based

在雅思话题中，complaint 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。

a word or phrase used to complete a grammatical construction; a complete number or quantity; number needed to make up a whole force

come or bring to a finish or an end; others finished in over 4 hours"; bring to a whole, with all the necessary parts or elements; complete a pass

复杂的;n. 复合体;变态心理
complicated in structure; consisting of interconnected parts

the coloring of a person's face; a combination that results from coupling or interlinking; a point of view or general attitude or inclination
名词 complexion 主要指人的肤色或面色，也可比喻局势的整体状况（如 political complexion）。

the quality of being intricate and compounded
名词 complexity 表示“复杂性”，常用来描述问题、系统或情况的多重因素与难度。
n acting according to certain accepted standards; n a disposition or tendency to yield to the will of others; n the act of submitting; usually surrendering power to another
名词 compliance 指对规则、法律或要求的遵守，常见于 regulatory compliance（合规）。
使…复杂；使…难懂；使(疾病等)恶化；
make more complicated; make more complex, intricate, or richer
动词 complicate 意为“使复杂化”，常接 with sth 表示因某事而让局面变得更棘手。
在雅思写作中，complicate 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
指结构或情况复杂难懂，常与 difficult to understand 连用。
复杂化, (使复杂的)因素。n.[医]并发症
the act or process of complicating; a situation or condition that is complex or confused; any disease or disorder that occurs during the course of (or because of) another disease
多作名词表示“并发症”或“意外事件”，如 medical complication。
在雅思写作或阅读中，complication 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。
敬意,赞扬;问候;vt. 恭维;称赞
a remark (or act) expressing praise and admiration
指表达赞赏的言语，注意与 compliment（恭维）区分于 complement（补充）。

act in accordance with someone's rules, commands, or wishes
后接 with，表示遵守规定或按要求行动，如 comply with rules。
an abstract part of something; an artifact that is one of the individual parts of which a composite entity is made up; especially a part that can be separated from or attached to a system

学术用语，表示“要素层面的”，用于分析概念的基本组成部分时。

form the substance of; write music; put together out of existing material
指由若干部分组合成整体，常与 of 连用，如 composed of water and oxygen。
serenely self-possessed and free from agitation especially in times of stress
作形容词意为“镇静的”或“有节制的”，也可表示已完成的动作状态。
someone who composes music as a profession

在雅思话题中，composer 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
consisting of separate interconnected parts; of or relating to or belonging to the plant family Compositae

作品，作文，乐曲；作曲；结构，组成，成分
the spatial property resulting from the arrangement of parts in relation to each other and to the whole; a mixture of ingredients; an essay (especially one written as an assignment)

a whole formed by a union of two or more elements or parts; (chemistry) a substance formed by chemical union of two or more elements or ingredients in definite proportion by weight; an enclosure of residences and other building (especially in the Orient)

动词指物理上的压缩或减少体积；名词compression则用于数据压缩等技术语境。

the process or result of becoming smaller or pressed together; encoding information while reducing the bandwidth or bits required; applying pressure

指法律或规则强制要求的，常与 education、uniforms 等搭配。
n the procedure of calculating; determining something by mathematical or logical methods; n problem solving that involves numbers or quantities

可能的, 想得到的, 可想像的。

集中,全神贯注于,浓缩 n. 浓缩物

involving the joint activity of two or more

意为赞同或同时发生，常用于正式语境表达观点一致（I concur）或事件同步。

表示向某人倾诉秘密，常用搭配 confide in sb. about sth.。

及物动词，后接人表示向其表达祝贺，常用结构为 congratulate sb. on sth.。

意为战胜困难或敌人，常与 challenges 等词搭配使用。

斗争, 竞争, 主张。
maintain or assert; be engaged in a fight; carry on a fight
指主张或应对某种情况，常用于 argue for/against 等搭配中表达立场。
在雅思写作中，contend 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
满意(的),使满意(足) n. 内容,目录

everything that is included in a collection and that is held or included in something; the proportion of a substance that is contained in a mixture or alloy etc.; the sum or range of what has been perceived, discovered, or learned
作形容词表示‘满意的’（be content with），名词则指‘内容物’。
争夺, 争论, 争辩, 论点。
a point asserted as part of an argument
指对某事的激烈争论或争夺，常与介词 over 连用表示“为...而争执”。
在雅思话题中，contention 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
争夺,竞争;比赛;v. 争论,争议;斗争
an occasion on which a winner is selected from among two or more contestants; a struggle between rivals
作名词意为比赛、竞赛；作动词则指竞争、对抗，如 contest a bill（对法案提出挑战）。
在雅思话题中，contest 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
a person who participates in competitions
专指参加比赛的选手或参赛者，常见于 sports competition context。
在雅思写作或阅读中，contestant 常用于讨论科技与交流相关话题。
discourse that surrounds a language unit and helps to determine its interpretation; the set of facts or circumstances that surround a situation or event
表示“背景、语境”，常用 in the context of...结构说明某事发生的具体情境。
在雅思话题中，context 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
relating to or determined by or in context
意为“与上下文相关的”或“语境的”，常用于 contextual analysis（语境分析）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，contextual 可用于描述城市发展相关情况。
大陆，洲;adj. 有节制的；节制欲望的
one of the large landmasses of the earth; the European mainland
指地球上的大洲，如 the seven continents；也可泛指大陆板块。

of or pertaining to or typical of Europe; of or relating to or concerning the American colonies during and immediately after the American Revolutionary War; of or relating to or characteristic of a continent
作形容词修饰与欧洲或亚洲大陆相关的地理、文化特征，如 continental climate（大陆性气候）。
the state of being contingent on something
指意外事件的可能性或应急计划，常搭配 plan for a contingency。
在雅思话题中，contingency 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。

occurring without interruption; chiefly restricted to what recurs regularly or frequently in a prolonged and closely spaced series; `continual' (meaning seemingly uninterrupted) is often used interchangeably with `continuous' (meaning without interruption)
表示“不间断地、持续不断地”，强调动作频繁发生但中间无停顿（uninterrupted）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，continual 可用于描述家庭生活相关情况。
the act of continuing an activity without interruption
指某事继续存在或进行的状态，如 the continuance of peace。
在雅思写作或阅读中，continuance 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
continue a certain state, condition, or activity; continue talking; keep or maintain in unaltered condition; cause to remain or last
表示动作或状态在时间上不间断地延续，常接 doing 形式。
uninterrupted connection or union; a detailed script used in making a film in order to avoid discontinuities from shot to shot; the property of a continuous and connected period of time
指事物发展的连贯性、无间断的状态，常用于描述流程或叙事逻辑。
在雅思写作或阅读中，continuity 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。
continuing in time or space without interruption; of a function or curve; extending without break or irregularity
形容不间断的（如 continuous improvement），强调没有中断的特性。
以副词形式修饰动词，表示动作持续不断地进行或发生。
在雅思阅读中，continuously 可能出现在公共健康相关文章中。
合同,契约;v. 缔结;负(债); 感染(疾病);使皱缩

a binding agreement between two or more persons that is enforceable by law; (contract bridge) the highest bid becomes the contract setting the number of tricks that the bidder must make; a variety of bridge in which the bidder receives points toward game only for the number of tricks he bid
作名词指商业协议；作不及物动词意为缩小尺寸、降低价格等。
在雅思话题中，contract 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
reduced in size or pulled together
形容词，描述因疾病或压力导致身体组织（如肌肉）体积缩小的状态。
在雅思写作或阅读中，contracted 可用于描述就业与技能相关情况。
relating to or part of a binding legal agreement
指基于合同条款的、具有法律约束力的义务或关系性质。
在雅思写作或阅读中，contractual 可用于描述文化多样性相关情况。
be in contradiction with; deny the truth of
意为与某事相反或不一致，常接 to sth. 表示反驳观点或事实。
在雅思话题中，contradict 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
opposition between two conflicting forces or ideas; (logic) a statement that is necessarily false; the speech act of contradicting someone
指两个陈述之间存在的逻辑冲突、不一致之处，即相互矛盾的状态。
在雅思话题中，contradiction 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
相反的，矛盾的n. 反对，矛盾；相反
very opposed in nature or character or purpose; of words or propositions so related that both cannot be true but both may be false
作形容词表示相反的方向或立场；作名词特指与预期完全相反的方面（on the contrary）。
使对比,形成对照;n. 明显的差别
the opposition or dissimilarity of things that are compared; the act of distinguishing by comparing differences; the perceptual effect of the juxtaposition of very different colors
作名词指“对比、差异”，常与 draw a contrast between...搭配；作动词意为使形成鲜明对照。
contribute to some cause; be conducive to
常用 contribute to...表示对某事有贡献或导致某种结果，强调主动参与促成事件发生的过程。

the part played by a person in bringing about a result; a voluntary gift (as of money or service or ideas) made to some worthwhile cause; act of giving in common with others for a common purpose especially to a charity
指为集体做出的努力、资金或时间等具体投入，常与 make a contribution to...连用。
发明, 设计, 图谋。
v make or work out a plan for; devise; v come up with (an idea, plan, explanation, theory, or principle) after a mental effort; v put or send forth
意为“费尽心机达成”，多用于 contrive to do sth.结构，含努力克服困难的意味或贬义色彩。
在雅思写作中，contrive 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
控制，支配v. 控制，支配
power to direct or determine; a relation of constraint of one entity (thing or person or group) by another; (physiology) regulation or maintenance of a function or action or reflex etc
作名词指对某事的掌控力（lose control），作动词表示管理、调节或抑制某种行为状态。
marked by or capable of arousing controversy
形容引起广泛争论的，常修饰 issue/topic等词，暗示观点对立且尚未达成共识的状态。
a contentious speech act; a dispute where there is strong disagreement
指公开存在的意见分歧或辩论事件，常用 settle a controversy表示解决争议的过程与结果。
意为“召集（会议）”，常接正式场合如 convene a meeting/board，强调由权威方发起的集合行动。
在雅思写作中，convene 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
the state of being suitable or opportune; the quality of being useful and convenient
指方便、便利的状态或设施本身，常用于 at one's convenience表示按某人认为合适的时间安排。
suited to your comfort or purpose or needs
形容某事易于处理或使用，常与 be convenient for sb.搭配，侧重客观上带来的便利条件优势。
a large formal assembly; something regarded as a normative example; (diplomacy) an international agreement
指社会普遍遵守的惯例或正式会议，如 follow a convention。
following accepted customs and proprieties; conforming with accepted standards; (weapons) using energy for propulsion or destruction that is not nuclear energy
形容符合传统习惯或非创新的，常与 traditional 互换使用。
聚合, 集中于一点。vt.会聚
be adjacent or come together; approach a limit as the number of terms increases without limit; move or draw together at a certain location
指多条线或趋势向一点聚集，如 lines converge at the center。
在雅思写作中，converge 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
(usually followed by `with') well informed about or knowing thoroughly
表示对某话题熟悉且能参与讨论，常接 in/about sth。
the use of speech for informal exchange of views or ideas or information etc.
指两人或多人的口头交流过程，强调互动而非单向陈述。
在雅思话题中，conversation 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
作动词意为“相反”，如 converse to the point; 名词指反面或对立物。
在雅思话题中，converse 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
with the terms of the relation reversed
用作副词表示转折，相当于 on the contrary，用于引出对比观点。
an event that results in a transformation; a change in the units or form of an expression: "conversion from Fahrenheit to Centigrade"; a successful free throw or try for point after a touchdown
指事物性质、形式或用途的改变过程，如 currency conversion。
在雅思话题中，conversion 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
change from one system to another or to a new plan or policy; change the nature, purpose, or function of something; change religious beliefs, or adopt a religious belief
作动词意为“转变信仰”或“将某物变为另一种形态”。
在雅思话题中，convert 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
make known; pass on, of information; transfer to another; transmit a title or property
指通过语言、动作传递信息，常接 convey a message/feeling。
document effecting a property transfer; the transmission of information; something that serves as a means of transportation
作不可数名词指交通方式，如 public conveyance；也可指运送人或货物的行为。
在雅思话题中，conveyance 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
a person serving a sentence in a jail or prison; a person who has been convicted of a criminal offense
及物动词后接人表示宣判其有罪并处以刑罚，常与 of a crime 连用。
在雅思话题中，convict 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
an unshakable belief in something without need for proof or evidence; (criminal law) a final judgment of guilty in a criminal case and the punishment that is imposed
作不可数名词指定罪事实或信念，如 strong conviction that...；也可指强烈的确信感。
在雅思话题中，conviction 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
v make (someone) agree, understand, or realize the truth or validity of something
及物动词后接宾语和 of/to do sth.，表示使某人相信某事或做某事。
persuaded of; very sure; having a strong belief or conviction
作形容词意为“确信的”，常与 that 从句连用；也可指被说服的状态。
厨师v. 烹调，烧煮；纂改(账目)，捏造
someone who cooks food; English navigator who claimed the east coast of Australia for Britain and discovered several Pacific islands (1728-1779)
既指烹饪动作，也指厨师或炊具（如 gas cooker），具体含义依上下文而定。
在雅思话题中，cook 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
专指用于加热食物的机器设备，区别于泛指做饭的人的 cook。
在雅思写作或阅读中，cooker 常用于讨论文化多样性相关话题。
凉的；冷静的n. 凉快ad. 冷静地v. 使变凉
the quality of being at a refreshingly low temperature; make cool or cooler; loose heat
作形容词形容温度低或使人冷静；也可表示“酷”的非正式用法（cool guy）。
calm and unruffled self-assurance; fearless self-possession in the face of danger
指物理上的低温状态，如 the coolness of winter nights。
在雅思写作或阅读中，coolness 常用于讨论家庭生活相关话题。
v work together on a common enterprise of project
不及物动词常与 with 连用表示共同工作；也可作名词指合作行为或部门。
joint operation or action; the practice of cooperating
指多方共同努力达成目标，常与 work、effort 等词搭配。
合作的，协作的n. 合作社
done with or working with others for a common purpose or benefit
作形容词表示“合作的”，如 cooperative partner；也可指合作社这类组织。
在雅思话题中，cooperative 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
bring into common action, movement, or condition; be co-ordinated
动词意为协调动作或安排，常接 with、to do sth. 等结构。
在雅思话题中，coordinate 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。

the skillful and effective interaction of movements; the regulation of diverse elements into an integrated and harmonious operation; the grammatical relation of two constituents having the same grammatical form
名词指对人员、资源等进行的有效组织与配合过程。
在雅思话题中，coordination 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
动词 cope with 表示设法应对困难或压力，强调努力适应局面。
在雅思写作中，cope 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。

a ductile malleable reddish-brown corrosion-resistant diamagnetic metallic element; occurs in various minerals but is the only metal that occurs abundantly in large masses; used as an electrical and thermal conductor; a copper penny; a reddish-brown color resembling the color of polished copper
指一种导电金属铜，常用于电线、管道及电子元件制造中。
在雅思话题中，copper 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
抄本，摹本；(一)本vt. 抄写；考试中抄袭
a thing made to be similar or identical to another thing; matter to be printed; exclusive of graphical materials; material suitable for a journalistic account
作动词意为复制文件或物品；作名词指副本或复印件本身。
在雅思话题中，copy 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
a document granting exclusive right to publish and sell literary or musical or artistic work
专指作品受法律保护的权利，通常与 register、infringe 等词连用。
在雅思话题中，copyright 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。

a variable color averaging a deep pink; the hard stony skeleton of a Mediterranean coral that has a delicate red or pink color and is used for jewelry; unfertilized lobster roe; reddens in cooking; used as garnish or to color sauces
指珊瑚这种海洋生物或其形成的礁石结构，常见于热带海域描述中。
在雅思话题中，coral 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
a line made of twisted fibers or threads; a unit of amount of wood cut for burning; 128 cubic feet; a light insulated conductor for household use
名词 cord 多指细绳、电线或脐带；作动词时意为用绳子捆扎固定。
politely warm and friendly; sincerely or intensely felt
形容待人热情友好，常指态度真诚温暖而非仅仅礼貌。
在雅思话题中，cordial 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
在雅思阅读中，cordially 可能出现在环境保护相关文章中。
a small group of indispensable persons or things; the center of an object; the central part of the Earth
作名词指核心部分，常与介词 in 连用表示“在...中心”；作形容词时意为主要的、核心的。
软木 a. 软木制的 vt. 塞住,抑制
outer bark of the cork oak; used for stoppers for bottles etc.; a port city in southern Ireland; the plug in the mouth of a bottle (especially a wine bottle)
指软木塞，也常用作轻便的隔热或隔音材料。
在雅思话题中，cork 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。

tall annual cereal grass bearing kernels on large ears: widely cultivated in America in many varieties; the principal cereal in Mexico and Central and South America since pre-Columbian times; the dried grains or kernels or corn used as animal feed or ground for meal; ears of corn that can be prepared and served for human food
指玉米，也常作不可数名词泛指谷物；美式英语中亦指黄油、奶酪等乳制品。
在雅思话题中，corn 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
a place off to the side of an area; the point where two lines meet or intersect; an interior angle formed by two meeting walls
指建筑物的拐角处，也常引申为“陷入困境”（in a corner）或“在角落做某事”。
of or belonging to a corporation; done by or characteristic of individuals acting together; organized and maintained as a legal corporation
指与商业公司相关的，如 corporate identity（企业形象）或 corporate strategy（企业战略）。
市镇自治机关；法人；公司，企业
a business firm whose articles of incorporation have been approved in some state
指大型商业公司，常与动词如 establish、own collocate。
在雅思话题中，corporation 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
军团, 兵队, 团, 兵种, 技术兵种, 特殊兵种, (德国大学的)学生联合会。
an army unit usually consisting of two or more divisions and their support; a body of people associated together
注意拼写为 corps，指“军队、团体”；其复数形式仍为 corps。
在雅思话题中，corps 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
n the dead body of a human being
指已死亡且通常被埋葬或火化的遗体，常用于法医、新闻等严肃语境。
在雅思写作或阅读中，corpse 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
正确的，恰当的，端正的v. 改正，纠正，矫正
free from error; especially conforming to fact or truth; socially right or correct
作形容词表示“正确的”，常与动词搭配，如 make a correct decision。

the act of offering an improvement to replace a mistake; setting right; a quantity that is added or subtracted in order to increase the accuracy of a scientific measure; something substituted for an error
指对错误进行的改正或修正动作，常用于 academic correction 等正式语境中。
在雅思话题中，correction 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
副词形式，意为“正确地”，常修饰动词如 speak correctly 以描述行为方式。
to bear a reciprocal or mutual relation; bring into a mutual, complementary, or reciprocal relation
及物动词，表示使两事物相互关联或产生联系，常用于数据与结果之间。
在雅思话题中，correlate 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。

a reciprocal relation between two or more things; a statistical relation between two or more variables such that systematic changes in the value of one variable are accompanied by systematic changes in the other
名词指两个变量间的统计关系强度，常出现在 correlation coefficient 等术语中。
在雅思话题中，correlation 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
动词表示与某事相符或匹配，如 The key corresponds to the lock。
通信，信件；(with)符合；(to)相当于，对应
communication by the exchange of letters
名词指书信往来、通信记录，也可泛指正式的非面对面交流方式。
在雅思话题中，correspondence 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
someone who communicates by means of letters; a journalist employed to provide news stories for newspapers or broadcast media
新闻从业者或驻外记者的称呼，强调其代表媒体进行实地报道的角色。
在雅思话题中，correspondent 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
accompanying; similar especially in position or purpose
形容词指与前述事物相匹配的部分，常用于表格中对应行或列的描述。
an enclosed passageway; rooms usually open onto it
名词指建筑物内的通道或走廊，常作为连接不同房间的主要路径存在。
在雅思写作或阅读中，corridor 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
cause to deteriorate due to the action of water, air, or an acid; become destroyed by water, air, or a corrosive such as an acid
指金属等因化学反应而逐渐被破坏，常与 rust 或 damage 连用。
a state of deterioration in metals caused by oxidation or chemical action; erosion by chemical action
名词形式，表示材料（如铁）生锈或被腐蚀的过程及结果状态。
在雅思话题中，corrosion 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
腐败的,贪污的;v. (使)腐败,贿赂
lacking in integrity; containing errors or alterations
作动词指道德败坏或数据被篡改；作形容词形容不诚实、腐败的人或制度。
decay of matter (as by rot or oxidation); moral perversion; impairment of virtue and moral principles; destroying someone's (or some group's) honesty or loyalty; undermining moral integrity
名词，常与 government system 搭配，指系统性贪污受贿或不公正行为。
在雅思话题中，corruption 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
a toiletry designed to beautify the body
作形容词修饰手术或程序时，强调仅改善外观而不改变内部结构的功能。
在雅思话题中，cosmetic 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
n a toiletry designed to beautify the body
指用于美化外表的产品（如面霜），常与 skincare routine 搭配使用。
在雅思话题中，cosmetics 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
of or from or pertaining to or characteristic of the cosmos or universe; inconceivably extended in space or time
形容涉及整个宇宙或天文尺度的事物，常用于 cosmic rays 等科学语境。

growing or occurring in many parts of the world; composed of people from or at home in many parts of the world; especially not provincial in attitudes or interests; of worldwide scope or applicability
指具有国际视野、适应多元文化环境的人，常修饰 traveler 或 citizen。
在雅思话题中，cosmopolitan 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
any of various mostly Mexican herbs of the genus Cosmos having radiate heads of variously colored flowers and pinnate leaves; popular fall-blooming annuals
名词泛指宇宙整体及其秩序；形容词 cosmic 则强调其宏大与神秘性。

指身体或精神严重受损者，现代用法中多用于描述残疾人士而非贬义。
在雅思话题中，cripple 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
an unstable situation of extreme danger or difficulty; a crucial stage or turning point in the course of something
表示突发且严重的困难局面（如 financial crisis），常与 manage、avert 等动词连用。
脆的,易碎的;霜冻的;干脆的;n. 油炸马铃薯片;v. (使)发脆
(of something seen or heard) clearly defined; tender and brittle; pleasantly cold and invigorating
形容食物口感酥脆或声音清脆，也可指思维清晰（critical thinking）。
在雅思话题中，crisp 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
(批评判断的)标准, 准据, 规范。
the ideal in terms of which something can be judged
意为“标准”或“准则”，常与 meet、establish a criterion for sth. 搭配。
在雅思写作或阅读中，criterion 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。

a person who is professionally engaged in the analysis and interpretation of works of art; anyone who expresses a reasoned judgment of something; someone who frequently finds fault or makes harsh and unfair judgments
指评论家（如 film critic）或进行评价的人，侧重专业领域的鉴赏能力。
在雅思话题中，critic 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
危急的,批评的,苛求的,关键的

marked by a tendency to find and call attention to errors and flaws; at or of a point at which a property or phenomenon suffers an abrupt change especially having enough mass to sustain a chain reaction; characterized by careful evaluation and judgment
表示“关键的”或“危急的”，常用于 critical moment、critical condition 等短语中。
评论性的文章，评论；批评，指责，非难
disapproval expressed by pointing out faults or shortcomings; a serious examination and judgment of something; a written evaluation of a work of literature
指对某人/事的负面评价，常与 receive criticism、constructive criticism 搭配使用。
意为“批评”或“指责”，常用 criticize sb. for sth. 结构表达具体原因。
在雅思写作中，criticize 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
n very rich flaky crescent-shaped roll
指一种新月形的酥皮点心，常搭配咖啡作为早餐或下午茶食用。
在雅思写作或阅读中，croissant 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
a long staff with one end being hook shaped
本义为“骗子”或“歹徒”，常用于短语 in a crook（以欺诈手段）中描述不诚实行为。
在雅思话题中，crook 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
having or marked by bends or angles; not straight or aligned; not straight; dishonest or immoral or evasive
形容物体弯曲、歪斜或不公正，如 crooked numbers（篡改的数字），也可指人品行不正。
作物，庄稼；(谷类等的)一熟收成；一批，大量
the yield from plants in a single growing season; a cultivated plant that is grown commercially on a large scale; a collection of people or things appearing together
作动词时意为“收割庄稼”或“剪羊毛”，名词则指农作物收成或植物顶部被修剪的部分。
在雅思话题中，crop 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
十字(架)；苦难a. 交叉的；发怒的v. 穿过

a wooden structure consisting of an upright post with a transverse piece; a representation of the structure on which Jesus was crucified; used as an emblem of Christianity or in heraldry; any affliction that causes great suffering
既表示物理上的“交叉点”，也用于 cross someone（与某人敌对）表达情感冲突的常用搭配。
在雅思话题中，cross 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
traveling across; a point where two lines (paths or arcs etc.) intersect; a path (often marked) where something (as a street or railroad) can be crossed to get from one side to the other
指人行横道或路口，常出现在 at a crossing（在十字路口处）这一固定介词短语中。
在雅思话题中，crossing 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
a point where a choice must be made
意为“十字路口”或“关键转折点”，常用于 crossroads of history（历史的十字路口）等比喻语境。
在雅思写作或阅读中，crossroads 常用于讨论文化多样性相关话题。
the act of bending low with the limbs close to the body; bend one's back forward from the waist on down
指身体蹲伏的姿势，如 crouch down to avoid rain（蹲下避雨），强调降低重心的动作状态。
在雅思话题中，crouch 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
black birds having a raucous call; the cry of a cock (or an imitation of it); a member of the Siouan people formerly living in eastern Montana
通常以复数形式 crow 出现，描述鸟群喧闹或发出叫声的场景，如 a noisy crowd of crows（一群吵闹的乌鸦）。
在雅思话题中，crow 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
人群；一群，一伙v. 聚集，群集；挤满，拥挤
a large number of things or people considered together; an informal body of friends
指聚集的人群，常与动词 gather、form 连用，也可作不及物动词表示“拥挤”或“蜂拥而至”。
王冠,王权,顶部 vt. 为…加冕,褒奖,顶上有,圆满完成

the Crown (or the reigning monarch) as the symbol of the power and authority of a monarchy; the part of a tooth above the gum that is covered with enamel; a wreath or garland worn on the head to signify victory
指王冠或树顶，也比喻最高权力者（如 the crown）或某物的顶部。
of extreme importance; vital to the resolution of a crisis; having crucial relevance
形容极其重要、关键的时刻或决定，常与 moment, decision 等词搭配使用。
not carefully or expertly made; conspicuously and tastelessly indecent; belonging to an early stage of technical development; characterized by simplicity and (often) crudeness
指未经提炼的原始物质（如 crude oil），也可描述粗糙简陋的事物或不文明的行为。
在雅思话题中，crude 可用于描述科技与交流相关问题。
s (of persons or their actions) able or disposed to inflict pain or suffering
形容残忍、冷酷地对待他人，常与 treat someone cruelly 或 a cruel punishment 搭配。
a cruel act; a deliberate infliction of pain and suffering; feelings of extreme heartlessness; the quality of being cruel and causing tension or annoyance
指残酷的行为本身（如 animal cruelty），强调对生物造成痛苦的不人道举动。
在雅思写作或阅读中，cruelty 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
巡航;以节省燃料的速度前进;n. 乘船巡游
drive around aimlessly but ostentatiously and at leisure; travel at a moderate speed; look for a sexual partner in a public place
作动词表示乘船游览，名词则指航行过程或定期航线服务（cruise line）。
在雅思话题中，cruise 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
a very small quantity of something; small piece of e.g. bread or cake
指食物碎屑或小颗粒（如 a crumb of bread），常与 leave no crumbs 等表达连用。
fall apart; break or fall apart into fragments

弄皱, 压皱, 变皱, 崩溃, 垮台。
v fall apart; v fold or collapse; v to gather something into small wrinkles or folds
指纸张、布料等被揉皱的动作，常与 paper, fabric 搭配，强调物理变形。

压碎,压坏,弄皱,压垮;挤入
break into small pieces; humiliate or depress completely
表示用力压碎或击溃（如 crush a can），也可比喻彻底击败对手或压倒性胜利。
在雅思话题中，crush 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
the outer layer of the Earth; a hard outer layer that covers something; the trait of being rude and impertinent; inclined to take liberties

a wooden or metal staff that fits under the armpit and reaches to the ground; used by disabled person while walking; anything that serves as an expedient

在雅思写作或阅读中，crutch 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。
哭,流泪v. 叫,喊n. 哭泣,哭声,叫喊,喊声
a loud utterance; often in protest or opposition; a loud utterance of emotion (especially when inarticulate); a fit of weeping

水晶,水晶饰品,质量最好的玻璃器皿,结晶体

a solid formed by the solidification of a chemical and having a highly regular atomic structure; a crystalline element used as a component in various electronic devices; a rock formed by the solidification of a substance; has regularly repeating internal structure; external plane faces

a hexahedron with six equal squares as faces; the product of three equal terms; any of several tropical American woody plants of the genus Lonchocarpus whose roots are used locally as a fish poison and commercially as a source of rotenone

作为形容词描述具有三个相等维度的立体图形。

an artistic movement in France beginning in 1907 that featured surfaces of geometrical planes

any of numerous European and North American birds having pointed wings and a long tail

暗示, 提示, 球杆。
an actor's line that immediately precedes and serves as a reminder for some action or speech; sports implement consisting of a tapering rod used to strike a cue ball in pool or billiards

厨房烹调法, 烹饪, 烹调风格。
the practice or manner of preparing food or the food so prepared

end, especially to reach a final or climactic stage; bring to a head or to the highest point; reach the highest or most decisive point

指被指控犯下某事的罪魁祸首，常用于 culprits behind the fire。

of or relating to the arts and manners that a group favors; denoting or deriving from or distinctive of the ways of living built up by a group of people; of or relating to the shared knowledge and values of a society

difficult to handle or use especially because of size or weight

指随时间推移而逐渐增加的总量效应，如 cumulative damage。

杯子；奖杯，优胜杯；(一)杯，一杯的容量
a small open container usually used for drinking; usually has a handle; the quantity a cup will hold; any cup-shaped concavity

prepare by drying, salting, or chemical processing in order to preserve; make (substances) hard and improve their usability; be or become preserved

形容卷发、波浪形物体，如 curly hair 或 curly fries（薯条）。

r at this time or period; now

n an integrated course of academic studies

可爱的, 聪明的, 伶俐的, 装腔作势的。

在雅思写作或阅读中，dependant 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
the state of relying on or being controlled by someone or something else
指受他人控制或需要照顾的人（如儿童），常与 on sb. 搭配表示依附关系。
在雅思话题中，dependence 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
依靠的，依赖的，从属的；随…而定的
relying on or requiring a person or thing for support, supply, or what is needed; contingent on something else; (of a clause) unable to stand alone syntactically as a complete sentence
描述某人需依靠他人生存，常用 dependent on sb./sth. 表达依赖对象。
在雅思话题中，dependent 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
v show in, or as in, a picture; v give a description of; v make a portrait of
意为描绘或表现某事，常用于 depict a scene/person/event 等具体场景描述中。
representation by drawing or painting etc
指对某人或事件的视觉化呈现方式，如一幅画、一段视频中的形象展示效果。
在雅思写作或阅读中，depiction 常用于讨论家庭生活相关话题。
表示耗尽资源（如能源），常与 resources/fuel/energy 等不可再生资源搭配使用。
the act of decreasing something markedly; the state of being depleted
指资源、能量或兴趣的耗尽，常与 resources, energy, interest 等词搭配。
在雅思写作或阅读中，depletion 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
express strong disapproval of; regret strongly
表示对某事深表遗憾或谴责，常用于正式场合表达强烈不满。
在雅思写作中，deplore 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
the phenomenon of sediment or gravel accumulating; money deposited in a bank or some similar institution; money given as security for an article acquired for temporary use
作动词指存放物品（put something in a bank or safe），作名词指存款或保证金。
在雅思话题中，deposit 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。

the natural process of laying down a deposit of something; (law) a pretrial interrogation of a witness; usually conducted in a lawyer's office; the act of deposing someone; removing a powerful person from a position or office
法律术语，指将某人正式提交给法庭；地质学中亦指沉积作用。
在雅思话题中，deposition 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
lower the value of something; lose in value
作动词指资产价值下降或贬低他人，名词形式 depreciation 常指会计上的折旧。
a decrease in price or value; decrease in value of an asset due to obsolescence or use
经济学术语，专指固定资产因使用和时间推移而发生的价值减少（depreciation）。
使沮丧;使萧条;压下;降低
lower someone's spirits; make downhearted; lower (prices or markets); lessen the activity or force of
作动词可指使心情低落、抑制经济增长或物理上压下物体。
lower than previously; flattened downward as if pressed from above or flattened along the dorsal and ventral surfaces
形容人情绪低沉沮丧，也可描述经济不景气（a depressed economy）。

a mental state characterized by a pessimistic sense of inadequacy and a despondent lack of activity; a long-term economic state characterized by unemployment and low prices and low levels of trade and investment; sad feelings of gloom and inadequacy
指心理疾病抑郁症或地理上的低洼地带；经济学中指经济衰退期。
在雅思话题中，depression 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
take away possessions from someone; keep from having, keeping, or obtaining; take away
意为剥夺某人某物，常用结构 deprive someone of something（如权利、机会）。
the extent downward or backward or inward; degree of psychological or intellectual profundity; (usually plural) the deepest and most remote part
指抽象层面的深刻程度，如 the depth of his understanding（他对问题的理解深度）。

someone authorized to exercise the powers of sheriff in emergencies; an assistant with power to act when his superior is absent; a member of the lower chamber of a legislative assembly (such as in France)
作名词时指副手或代理人；作动词时表示代理他人履行职责。
在雅思话题中，deputy 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
形容被遗弃的建筑物、土地等，常与 abandon 连用表示荒废状态。
在雅思写作或阅读中，derelict 可用于描述科技与交流相关情况。

the source or origin from which something derives (i.e. comes or issues); a line of reasoning that shows how a conclusion follows logically from accepted propositions; (descriptive linguistics) the process whereby new words are formed from existing words or bases by affixation
指某词或事物的来源与发展过程，如 the derivation of a word（词语的词源）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，derivation 常用于讨论公共健康相关话题。
取得,得到;追溯…的起源(或来由); vi. (from) 起源,衍生
obtain; come from; develop or evolve from a latent or potential state
表示从...得出结果，常用 derive from 说明起源，或 derive pleasure from sth。
a framework erected over an oil well to allow drill tubes to be raised and lowered; a simple crane having lifting tackle slung from a boom
特指石油钻井平台上的高耸金属架结构，是工业领域的专用术语。
在雅思写作或阅读中，derrick 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
move downward and lower, but not necessarily all the way
既可指身体向下移动（go down），也可引申为地位或数量下降。
a person considered as descended from some ancestor or race
指后代子孙，强调血缘上的延续关系，如 a direct descendant of...。
在雅思话题中，descendant 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
下降，降下；斜坡；血统，家世
a movement downward; the act of changing your location in a downward direction; the kinship relation between an individual and the individual's progenitors
作名词时指血统、出身或下降过程；作动词时表示从高处落下。
在雅思话题中，descent 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
用于客观陈述事物特征，常搭配 in detail 以体现描述的详尽性。
a statement that represents something in words; the act of describing something; sort or variety
指对事物进行详细文字说明，常搭配 give a description of。
在雅思话题中，description 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
丢弃,离开,背弃,开小差;n./a. 沙漠,无人居住的
作名词时指干旱荒地或放弃追求；作动词意为“抛弃”，如 desert the party。
表示理应得到某种待遇，常接 deserve to be punished/rewarded。
设计；构思；绘制；图案；企图n. 设计，图样
the act of working out the form of something (as by making a sketch or outline or plan); an arrangement scheme; a decorative or artistic work
指外观造型或功能规划；作动词意为“设计”，如 design a logo。
assign a name or title to
正式指派某人担任某职，常接 designate someone as manager。
在雅思话题中，designate 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
the act of designating or identifying something
指官方指定的名称或头衔，如 the official designation of a species。
在雅思写作或阅读中，designation 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
a person who devises plots or intrigues
从事产品外观与功能规划的专业人士，常修饰 fashion/graphic designer。
在雅思话题中，designer 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
值得弄到手的,吸引人的
worth having or seeking or achieving; worthy of being chosen especially as a spouse
形容令人向往的或值得拥有的事物，如 desirable qualities/skills。
the feeling that accompanies an unsatisfied state; an inclination to want things; something that is desired
作名词指强烈的愿望；作动词意为“渴望”，常接 desire to do something。
在雅思话题中，desire 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
a piece of furniture with a writing surface and usually drawers or other compartments
指办公桌或工作台面，也可引申为行政办公区域，如 the executive desk。
在雅思话题中，desk 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
荒芜的,无人居住的,孤寂的; vt. 使荒芜,使荒凉
形容荒凉无人烟，常指被遗弃或极度孤独的地方。
n the state of being decayed or destroyed; n a bleak and desolate atmosphere; n sadness resulting from being forsaken or abandoned
名词形式，表示荒芜景象、凄凉状态或内心的悲痛绝望。
在雅思写作或阅读中，desolation 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。
a state in which all hope is lost or absent; the feeling that everything is wrong and nothing will turn out well; abandon hope; give up hope; lose heart
指彻底失去希望的状态，常与 lose all hope of...搭配使用。
n an official report (usually sent in haste); n the property of being prompt and efficient; n killing a person or animal
英式拼法 dispatch 的变体，意为快速发送文件或处理事务。
在雅思写作中，despatch 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
绝望的;不顾一切的;危急的
desperately determined; (of persons) dangerously reckless or violent as from urgency or despair; showing extreme courage; especially of actions courageously undertaken in desperation as a last resort
形容极度渴望或走投无路，常修饰 want、need 等词表达强烈需求。
名词形式，指因绝望而采取的疯狂行动或不理智行为。
在雅思写作或阅读中，desperation 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
v look down on with disdain
表示轻视或鄙视某人某事，语气比 dislike 强烈得多。
介词 despite 后接名词短语，意为“尽管”、“不管”，引导让步状语。
a dish served as the last course of a meal
指餐后甜点或甜食，区别于主菜 dessert course。
在雅思话题中，dessert 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
the ultimate goal for which something is done
目的地通常与 arrive at、reach 等动词连用表示到达某地。
(rare) 指注定或预定某事，现代英语中极少单独使用。
an event (or a course of events) that will inevitably happen in the future; the ultimate agency regarded as predetermining the course of events (often personified as a woman)
命运；宿命 (fate)，常与动词如 shape、change 连用表示改变未来走向。
在雅思话题中，destiny 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
do away with, cause the destruction or undoing of; destroy completely; damage irreparably; put (an animal) to death
破坏，毁灭；也可作及物动词后接宾语，或用于 destroy oneself 等短语中。
the termination of something by causing so much damage to it that it cannot be repaired or no longer exists; an event (or the result of an event) that completely destroys something
毁坏、消亡的状态 (state of being destroyed)，常用于 destruction of evidence 等正式语境。
在雅思话题中，destruction 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
具有破坏性的，常修饰武器、力量或行为，如 destructive force。
cause to become detached or separated; take off; separate (a small unit) from a larger, especially for a special assignment; come to be detached
分离；使脱离 (separate from)，常用于 detach a part of the body 等具体情境中。
an isolated fact that is considered separately from the whole; a small part that can be considered separately from the whole; extended treatment of particulars
细节，详情；作动词时指详细说明某事，如 detail one's plan to others。
developed or executed with care and in minute detail
详细的、详尽的 (in great detail)，常修饰 report、plan 等名词表示内容充实。
在雅思话题中，detailed 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
v deprive of freedom; take into confinement; v stop or halt; v cause to be slowed down or delayed
拘留，扣留；通常指依法暂时限制人身自由，如 detain a suspect for questioning。
在雅思话题中，detain 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
discover or determine the existence, presence, or fact of
发现，探测 (discover or find)，常用于 detect changes、detect lies 等搭配中。
the perception that something has occurred or some state exists; the act of detecting something; catching sight of something; a police investigation to determine the perpetrator
指发现或识别某事（如信号、错误），常与 alarm system 等搭配。
a police officer who investigates crimes; an investigator engaged or employed in obtaining information not easily available to the public
专指从事侦查犯罪工作的专业人员，即我们常说的警察中的侦探角色。
在雅思话题中，detective 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
try to prevent; show opposition to
意为阻止或使某人放弃做某事，常与 threat、fine 等威慑手段连用。
在雅思写作中，deter 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
a surface-active chemical widely used in industry and laundering; a cleansing agent that differs from soap but can also emulsify oils and hold dirt in suspension
指用于清洁衣物的化学制剂，日常多称为洗衣液或洗洁精。
在雅思话题中，detergent 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
描述质量、健康或状况逐渐变坏的过程，常与 condition、health 搭配。
a symptom of reduced quality or strength; process of changing to an inferior state
指事物恶化后的状态本身，如 deterioration of relations（关系恶化）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，deterioration 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。

the act of determining the properties of something, usually by research or calculation; the quality of being determined to do or achieve something; firmness of purpose; deciding or controlling something's outcome or nature
既指坚定的决心，也指通过研究得出的明确结论或决定。
establish after a calculation, investigation, experiment, survey, or study; shape or influence; give direction to; fix conclusively or authoritatively
意为查明事实真相或做出最终判断，常与 evidence、fact 等连用。
v dislike intensely; feel antipathy or aversion towards
表达强烈的厌恶感，语气比 dislike 强烈得多，常用于 detest violence。
在雅思写作中，detest 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
指为避开障碍或拥堵而绕行的路线，常与 take a detour 搭配使用。
在雅思话题中，detour 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
v take away a part from; diminish
指分散注意力或降低某物价值，常与 from 连用。
在雅思写作中，detract 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
表示损害、不利因素或伤害，常用于 to the detriment of...结构。
在雅思话题中，detriment 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
s (sometimes followed by `to') causing harm or injury
意为有害的或不利的，常修饰对健康、环境等造成负面影响的事物。
an isotope of hydrogen which has one neutron (as opposed to zero neutrons in hydrogen)
是氢的同位素氘，常用于核聚变研究或重水相关科学语境中。
在雅思写作或阅读中，deuterium 常用于讨论公共健康相关话题。
an official lowering of a nation's currency; a decrease in the value of a country's currency relative to that of foreign countries; the reduction of something's value or worth
指货币、资产等价值下降，常与 currency, stock market 搭配使用。
在雅思写作或阅读中，devaluation 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
remove the value from; deprive of its value; lower the value or quality of
意为贬低或使贬值，也可用于降低某人的声誉或地位。
在雅思写作中，devalue 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
指彻底摧毁、破坏（如城市、计划），常与 by fire, flood 等连用。
在雅思写作中，devastate 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
v cause extensive destruction or ruin utterly; v overwhelm or overpower; s making light of
形容极具毁灭性或令人极度震惊的，常用于 devastating news/losses。
在雅思写作或阅读中，devastating 可用于描述公共交通相关情况。
发展，开发，研制；显现，显影；发育，生长
make something new, such as a product or a mental or artistic creation; gain through experience; be gradually disclosed or unfolded; become manifest;
指发展、成长或开发（如技能、项目），是日常高频动词。
relating to societies in which capital needed to industrialize is in short supply
特指发展中国家，常与 countries, world economy 等宏观概念连用。

act of improving by expanding or enlarging or refining; a process in which something passes by degrees to a different stage (especially a more advanced or mature stage); a recent event that has some relevance for the present situation
指事物从简单到复杂、从不成熟到成熟的自然生长或进步过程。
turn aside; turn away from; be at variance with; be out of line with; cause to turn away from a previous or expected course
常与 from 连用，表示行为或路线偏离原本的标准、计划或正常方向。
在雅思话题中，deviate 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。

a variation that deviates from the standard or norm; the difference between an observed value and the expected value of a variable or function; the error of a compass due to local magnetic disturbances
指具体的数值差异（如标准差）或抽象的行为/性格上的背离程度。
在雅思写作或阅读中，deviation 常用于讨论科技与交流相关话题。
装置，设备，仪表；方法，设计
an instrumentality invented for a particular purpose; something in an artistic work designed to achieve a particular effect; any clever maneuver
泛指任何用于完成特定任务的工具、机器，也可指人或动物身上的器官。
an evil supernatural being; a word used in exclamations of confusion
在宗教或文学语境中指邪恶的超自然存在；口语中常作为“坏蛋”的昵称。
在雅思话题中，devil 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
give by will, especially real property
意为精心构思计划，后接 that/which 引导的从句说明具体想出的办法。
在雅思话题中，devise 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
set aside or apart for a specific purpose or use
指将时间、精力或资源完全奉献给某事，常与 to 连用表示对象。
zealous in devotion or affection; (followed by `to') dedicated exclusively to a purpose or use
形容对某人或事业极度忠诚和热爱的状态，常用于修饰 fans 或 supporters。
feelings of ardent love; commitment to some purpose; (usually plural) religious observance or prayers (usually spoken silently)
指对人、信仰或事业的深厚情感与奉献精神，常作不可数名词使用。
狼吞虎咽地吃;挥霍,耗尽
destroy completely; enjoy avidly; eat immoderately
形象地描述狼吞虎咽地快速吃完食物，强调动作的急切和彻底性。
water that has condensed on a cool surface overnight from water vapor in the air
指清晨凝结在草叶上的小水珠，常与"heavy dew"搭配形容露水很重。
determine or distinguish the nature of a problem or an illness through a diagnostic analysis; subject to a medical analysis
作为动词表示医生通过检查确定病情，常用结构为 diagnose a disease in someone。
在雅思话题中，diagnose 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
identifying the nature or cause of some phenomenon
指疾病或问题的具体判断结果，常与"medical diagnosis"连用强调专业性。
在雅思话题中，diagnosis 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
a drawing intended to explain how something works; a drawing showing the relation between the parts
意为图表或示意图，用于解释复杂概念时常用 draw a diagram to illustrate。
在雅思话题中，diagram 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
表面,钟面,拨号盘 vt. 打电话
the face of a timepiece; graduated to show the hours; the control on a radio or television set that is used for tuning; the circular graduated indicator on various measuring instruments
作动词指转动电话听筒接通线路，名词则指钟表的表盘刻度盘。
在雅思话题中，dial 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
the usage or vocabulary that is characteristic of a specific group of people
专指某一地区或群体的语言变体，常与"local dialect"搭配表示地方方言。
n a conversation between two persons; n the lines spoken by characters in drama or fiction; n a literary composition in the form of a conversation between two people
特指戏剧、电影中的对话部分，名词形式 dialog 常用于剧本分析语境中。
在雅思话题中，dialog 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。

the length of a straight line passing through the center of a circle and connecting two points on the circumference; a straight line connecting the center of a circle with two points on its perimeter (or the center of a sphere with two points on its surface)
表示圆形物体的宽度即直径，数学或工程领域常用 measure the diameter of a circle。
在雅思话题中，diameter 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。

a transparent piece of diamond that has been cut and polished and is valued as a precious gem; very hard native crystalline carbon valued as a gem; a playing card in the minor suit that has one or more red rhombuses on it
既指珍贵的宝石钻石，也比喻极其稀有珍贵的人或物，如"diamond in the rough"。
在雅思话题中，diamond 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
[解] 横隔膜, 控光装置, 照相机镜头上的光圈, (电话等)振动膜。

a mechanical device in a camera that controls size of aperture of the lens; (anatomy) a muscular partition separating the abdominal and thoracic cavities; functions in respiration; a contraceptive device consisting of a flexible dome-shaped cup made of rubber or plastic; it is filled with spermicide and fitted over the uterine cervix
医学上指分隔胸腔与腹腔的肌肉膜，也可用于乐器中控制声音的气囊装置。
在雅思写作或阅读中，diaphragm 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
frequent and watery bowel movements; can be a symptom of infection or food poisoning or colitis or a gastrointestinal tumor
指严重的肠道疾病，常与 dehydration（脱水）等并发症一起讨论。
在雅思写作或阅读中，diarrhea 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
a daily written record of (usually personal) experiences and observations; a personal journal (as a physical object)

s highly offensive; arousing aversion or disgust

指缺乏忠诚度的行为或缺陷，常用于描述政治立场或个人品格问题。

形容景象或前景极其凄凉、令人沮丧，常修饰 weather（天气）或 prospects（前景）。

表示在性质、外观等方面不同，常用 dissimilar to each other（彼此不同）。

指某产品或服务的独家经销权，常与特定区域或客户群关联。

用于重复前文提到的内容或事物，相当于说“同上”，常见于表格或清单后。

指日落前后的黄昏时刻（the time of day between sunset and night），常与 twilight 互换使用。
