指消除分歧、达成和解或在观点上取得一致，常用于解决冲突后的关系修复。
the act of reconnoitring (especially to gain information about an enemy or potential enemy)
军事或情报术语，指收集敌情信息的过程；也可泛指初步调查以获取事实依据。
重新考虑, 重新审议。
consider again; give new consideration to; usually with a view to changing; consider again (a bill) that had been voted upon before, with a view to altering it
重新考虑某事以便做出更明智的决定，通常涉及对先前观点的修正或调整。
在雅思写作中，reconsider 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
记录；最高记录；履历；唱片v. 记录；录音

anything (such as a document or a phonograph record or a photograph) providing permanent evidence of or information about past events; the number of wins versus losses and ties a team has had; the sum of recognized accomplishments
作动词指“记录”或“创下纪录”，名词则常指录音、录像等档案资料。
equipment for making records; a barrister or solicitor who serves as part-time judge in towns or boroughs
主要指录制声音的机器，也可引申为负责记录会议内容的人。
在雅思话题中，recorder 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
求助对象,追索权,依靠,依赖
act of turning to for assistance; something or someone turned to for assistance or security
常与 to have recourse to sth. 搭配，表示在困难时“求助于”某事或某人。
get or find back; recover the use of; regain a former condition after a financial loss; regain or make up for
作动词指身体康复、找回失物或恢复原状；也可指经济复苏。
return to an original state; the act of regaining or saving something lost (or in danger of becoming lost)
名词多用于 medical recovery（病愈）或 economic recovery（经济复苏）。
n an activity that diverts or amuses or stimulates; n activity that refreshes and recreates; activity that renews your health and spirits by enjoyment and relaxation
指通过娱乐活动恢复精力，常与 outdoor recreation 等短语连用。
a recently enlisted soldier; any new member or supporter (as in the armed forces); seek to employ
作动词意为“招募”新员工；名词 recruitment drive 指大规模的招聘行动。
the act of getting recruits; enlisting people for the army (or for a job or a cause etc.)
专指组织或企业的人员扩充过程，常与 strategy、process 等词搭配。
在雅思话题中，recruitment 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
a parallelogram with four right angles
几何学中指正方形以外的四边相等图形；日常也泛指长方形物体。
在雅思话题中，rectangle 可用于讨论教育相关问题。

(chemistry) the process of refinement or purification of a substance by distillation; the conversion of alternating current to direct current; determination of the length of a curve; finding a straight line equal in length to a given curve
指纠正错误、修正数据或改善系统，常与 of errors/systems 连用。
在雅思写作或阅读中，rectification 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
math: determine the length of; set straight or right; convert into direct current
指纠正错误或不公，常搭配 rectify a mistake。
(尤指不好的事)一再发生；重现
happen or occur again; return in thought or speech to something
表示某事再次发生或重复出现，如 problems recur。
指疾病、问题等反复出现的现象，常作不可数名词。
使再循环, 反复应用。n.再循环, 再生, 重复利用
cause to repeat a cycle; use again after processing
强调将废弃物重新利用以节约资源或保护环境。
在雅思话题中，recycle 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
红的，红色的n. 红色；红色颜料
of a color at the end of the color spectrum (next to orange); resembling the color of blood or cherries or tomatoes or rubies
除表示颜色外，常指错误、危险或喜庆的特定情境。
在雅思话题中，red 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
restore the honor or worth of; to turn in (vouchers or coupons) and receive something in exchange; pay off (loans or promissory notes)
多用于金融语境，指通过支付代价来弥补损失或罪过。
在雅思话题中，redeem 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
重新分配, 再区分, 重新分布。
指将资源、收入等重新分配给不同人群以平衡差距。
在雅思写作中，redistribute 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
return or recoil; contribute; have an effect for good or ill
正式用语，表示某事导致或归因于某种结果。
在雅思写作中，redound 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
cut down on; make a reduction in; make less complex; bring to humbler or weaker state or condition
指降低数量、程度或规模，常与 make/reduce搭配使用。
any process in which electrons are added to an atom or ion (as by removing oxygen or adding hydrogen); always occurs accompanied by oxidation of the reducing agent; the act of reducing complexity
表示减少后的状态或量，如 a reduction in price。
在雅思话题中，reduction 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。

repetition of messages to reduce the probability of errors in transmission; the attribute of being superfluous and unneeded; (electronics) a system design that duplicates components to provide alternatives in case one component fails
指不必要的重复或多余，常用于描述系统备份、人员配置中的冗余设计。
在雅思写作或阅读中，redundancy 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
s more than is needed, desired, or required; s repetition of same sense in different words
形容多余的或不必要的，如 redundant information（冗余信息）或 redundant system component（冗余组件）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，redundant 可用于描述环境保护相关情况。

tall woody perennial grasses with hollow slender stems especially of the genera Arundo and Phragmites; United States journalist who reported on the October Revolution from Petrograd in 1917; founded the Communist Labor Party in America in 1919; is buried in the Kremlin in Moscow (1887-1920); United States physician who proved that yellow fever is transmitted by mosquitoes (1851-1902)
指芦苇这种植物，也可用作乐器中的簧片。
a submerged ridge of rock or coral near the surface of the water; one of several strips across a sail that can be taken in or rolled up to lessen the area of the sail that is exposed to the wind
指珊瑚礁或浅滩，常出现在航海警告中，如 coral reef（珊瑚礁）。
在雅思话题中，reef 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
卷,轴;(胶片)一盘; vt. 卷; vi. 眩晕,摇晃

a roll of photographic film holding a series of frames to be projected by a movie projector; music composed for dancing a reel; winder consisting of a revolving spool with a handle; attached to a fishing rod
作动词表示旋转、滚动；作名词可指卷轴、线轴或眩晕感。
在雅思话题中，reel 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
To export again, as what has been imported.
指将已进口的商品再次出口，通常涉及关税豁免等特定贸易情形。
在雅思写作中，reexport 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
参考，查询；提到，引用，涉及；提交，上呈
be relevant to; think of, regard, or classify under a subsuming principle or with a general group or in relation to another; send or direct for treatment, information, or a decision
意为提及、参考或查阅资料，如 refer to a book（查书）；也可表示把某事交给他人处理。
(sports) the chief official (as in boxing or American football) who is expected to ensure fair play; an attorney appointed by a court to investigate and report on a case
指体育比赛中的裁判，也用于仲裁争议场合的调解人角色。
在雅思话题中，referee 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。

the most direct or specific meaning of a word or expression; the class of objects that an expression refers to; the act of referring or consulting; a publication (or a passage from a publication) that is referred to
作名词表示参考文献、参考书；作动词意为提及或作为...的例子。
公民投票, (外交使节)请示书。
a legislative act is referred for final approval to a popular vote by the electorate
指公民投票制度，即由全体选民直接决定重大公共议题的民主程序。
在雅思写作或阅读中，referendum 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
something referred to; the object of a reference; the first term in a proposition; the term to which other terms relate; something that refers; a term that refers to another term
指话语或符号所指向的具体对象、人物或概念。
在雅思写作或阅读中，referent 常用于讨论教育相关话题。

treat or prepare so as to put in a usable condition; reduce to a fine, unmixed, or pure state; separate from extraneous matter or cleanse from impurities; attenuate or reduce in vigor, strength, or validity by polishing or purifying
使某物更精细，如 refine oil（提炼石油）或 refine one's manners（修养举止）。
精炼的，精的,举止优雅的
(used of persons and their behavior) cultivated and genteel; freed from impurities by processing
形容经过精心处理而精致的事物，也可指人的优雅教养。
精炼,改进,改善,优雅高贵的举止
the result of improving something; the quality of excellence in thought and manners and taste
指改进的过程或结果，如 a technical refinement（技术上的改良）。
an industrial plant for purifying a crude substance
专指工业提炼厂，如 oil refinery（炼油厂）或 sugar refinery（制糖厂）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，refinery 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
反射，反映，表现，反省，沉思
manifest or bring back; to throw or bend back (from a surface); be bright by reflecting or casting light
既作不及物动词表示“反映”光线/影像，也作及物动词表示“提及”。

the phenomenon of a propagating wave (light or sound) being thrown back from a surface; the image of something as reflected by a mirror (or other reflective material); (mathematics) a transformation in which the direction of one axis is reversed
指思考过程、深思熟虑或物体表面的倒影。
在雅思话题中，reflection 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
改革，改造，改良n. 改革，改造，改良
make changes for improvement in order to remove abuse and injustices
意为“改革”，常与动词 reform（如 reform the system）连用表示制度变革。
作不及物动词，后接 from/to do sth.，意为克制自己不做某事。
在雅思话题中，refrain 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
make (to feel) fresh; make fresh again
指使某人或事物恢复活力、精神焕发，如 refresh oneself with water。
在雅思写作中，refresh 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
提神的, 凉爽的, 使人喜欢的。
v refresh one's memory; v make (to feel) fresh; v become or make oneself fresh again
形容令人精神振奋或清爽，常指天气、饮料或经历带来的愉悦感。
在雅思写作或阅读中，refreshing 可用于描述教育相关情况。
snacks and drinks served as a light meal; activity that refreshes and recreates; activity that renews your health and spirits by enjoyment and relaxation
通常复数形式 refreshments 出现，指茶点等简餐，用于招待客人时提供的小吃集合。
在雅思话题中，refreshment 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
white goods in which food can be stored at low temperatures
家用冰箱的通用词，美式英语中常与 freezer（冷冻室）区分使用。
在雅思话题中，refrigerator 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
a shelter from danger or hardship
指寻求庇护或安全的地方/状态，如 take refuge in a cave；也可作动词表示“躲避”。
在雅思写作或阅读中，refuge 常用于讨论公共健康相关话题。
an exile who flees for safety
特指因战争、迫害等被迫离开家园并需要国际保护的人。
在雅思话题中，refugee 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
money returned to a payer; the act of returning money received previously
动词或名词，指退还已支付款项；常与 full/ partial refund 搭配表示全额或部分退款。
在雅思话题中，refund 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
the act of refusing; a message refusing to accept something that is offered
作不可数名词时指“拒绝”行为（a refusal），作动词时表示明确说不或拒绝对方请求。
在雅思话题中，refusal 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
拒绝，谢绝n. 废物，垃圾
show unwillingness towards; refuse to accept
作动词意为处理垃圾，常接 as waste；作名词则指不可回收的废弃物本身。
在雅思话题中，refuse 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
overthrow by argument, evidence, or proof; prove to be false or incorrect
正式用语，指用证据或逻辑驳斥某观点，常用于学术辩论中证明对方论点错误。
作动词表示“看待”（regard sb as...），常与 in high regard 搭配表达高度尊重之意。
v deem to be; v look at attentively; v connect closely and often incriminatingly
作为介词表示“关于”，常用于引出话题，如 regarding the project。
in spite of everything; without regard to drawbacks
意为“不管、不顾”，常与 of 连用构成 regardless of，强调不受条件影响。
(biology) growth anew of lost tissue or destroyed parts or organs; the activity of spiritual or physical renewal
指生物或组织的恢复过程，如生态再生；也可用于形容人的精力复原。
在雅思写作或阅读中，regeneration 常用于讨论科技与交流相关话题。
n the organization that is the governing authority of a political unit; n (medicine) a systematic plan for therapy (often including diet)
可指政治体制、统治方式，也常特指某种特定的饮食计划或健身方案。
army unit smaller than a division
专指军队编制单位（连），也可引申为严格的管理制度或纪律约束体系。
在雅思话题中，regiment 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
地区，地带，行政区，(科学等)领域
the extended spatial location of something; a large indefinite location on the surface of the Earth; the approximate amount of something (usually used prepositionally as in `in the region of')
表示地理上的区域，常与介词 in、of 搭配使用来限定范围大小。
characteristic of a region; related or limited to a particular region
作为形容词修饰名词，指属于某一特定地区的特征或事物，如 regional news。
描述将某事划分为不同区域的过程，多见于城市规划、市场细分等语境中。
在雅思写作或阅读中，regionalization 常用于讨论公共交通相关话题。
To divide into or organize according to regions.
动词形式，指使事物具有地区特色或将其纳入特定区域的管理体系内。
在雅思写作中，regionalize 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
登记，注册v. (仪表等)指示，(邮件)挂号

an official written record of names or events or transactions; (music) the timbre that is characteristic of a certain range and manner of production of the human voice or of different pipe organ stops or of different musical instruments; a book in which names and transactions are listed
既指正式登记记录（如注册），也指声音的音色特征及专业录音设备系统。
在雅思话题中，register 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。

(of animals) officially recorded with or certified by a recognized breed association; especially in a stud book; listed or recorded officially; (of a boat or vessel) furnished with necessary official documents specifying ownership etc
指已登记或官方备案的状态，如 registered nurse（注册护士）或 registered address（注册地址）。
在雅思话题中，registered 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
a person employed to keep a record of the owners of stocks and bonds issued by the company; the administrator responsible for student records; someone responsible for keeping records
通常指大学负责学生档案管理的官员 registrar。
在雅思话题中，registrar 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
the act of enrolling; the body of people (such as students) who register or enroll at the same time; a document certifying an act of registering
表示报名、注册或登记的行为，如 course registration（课程注册）。
在雅思话题中，registration 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
feel sad about the loss or absence of; decline formally or politely; express with regret
表达遗憾之情，常用于 regret to say... 或 I regret that...。
在雅思写作中，regret 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
feeling or expressing regret or sorrow or a sense of loss over something done or undone
形容感到后悔的，如 a regretful look（懊悔的神情）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，regretful 可用于描述城市发展相关情况。
以遗憾的方式做某事，常修饰道歉或拒绝等动作。
在雅思阅读中，regretfully 可能出现在就业与技能相关文章中。
形容令人惋惜的事，如 a regrettable mistake（可避免的错误）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，regrettable 可用于描述文化多样性相关情况。
有规律的；整齐的，匀称的，正规的，正式的
a regular patron; a soldier in the regular army; a dependable follower (especially in party politics)
指有规律的、常规的或普通的，常修饰 schedule、customer 等词。
a property of polygons: the property of having equal sides and equal angles; the quality of being characterized by a fixed principle or rate
表示规律性或常态，如 the regularity of tides（潮汐的周期性）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，regularity 常用于讨论家庭生活相关话题。
in a regular manner; having a regular form; in a regular way without variation
副词形式 regularly，意为定期地、经常地或按惯例。
fix or adjust the time, amount, degree, or rate of; bring into conformity with rules or principles or usage; impose regulations
指通过规则或机制控制、调整（如价格）；也可表示遵守规定。
规则，规章；调节，校准；调整
an authoritative rule; the state of being controlled or governed; (embryology) the ability of an early embryo to continue normal development after its structure has been somehow damaged or altered
常作不可数名词，指官方制定的法律条文或具体规章细则。
在雅思话题中，regulation 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
使(身体)康复, 使复职, 使恢复名誉, 使复原。
help to readapt, as to a former state of health or good repute; reinstall politically; restore to a state of good condition or operation
多用于医疗语境，意为使身体机能恢复健康；也可引申为帮助某人重新适应社会。
在雅思写作中，rehabilitate 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
排练，排演，演习，预演，试演

a practice session in preparation for a public performance (as of a play or speech or concert); (psychology) a form of practice; repetition of information (silently or aloud) in order to keep it in short-term memory
指演出前的彩排或排练过程，强调正式表演前的练习环节。
及物动词，意为反复练习（如台词）；也可用于军事语境表示进行战术演练。
在雅思话题中，rehearse 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
a period during which something or somebody is dominant or powerful; the period during which a monarch is sovereign; royal authority; the dominion of a monarch
作不及物动词指君主或女王在位统治；名词形式可指一段特定的统治时期。
pay back for some expense incurred
及物动词，意为偿还费用、报销款项（如 travel expenses）；强调官方或组织承担支出。
compensation paid (to someone) for damages or losses or money already spent etc.
指已批准的费用报销款额，常与 claim form 搭配使用于财务流程中。
在雅思写作或阅读中，reimbursement 常用于讨论公共交通相关话题。
缰绳，统治，支配v. 驾驭，控制，统治
one of a pair of long straps (usually connected to the bit or the headpiece) used to control a horse; any means of control
作名词时指马笼头中的皮带；动词形式意为收紧缰绳以控制或引导马匹方向。
在雅思话题中，rein 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
make stronger; strengthen and support with rewards
及物动词，常接 with evidence/support，表示加强论点、巩固结构或提升信心。
information that makes more forcible or convincing
指通过奖励或惩罚来加强某种行为，常与 positive/negative reinforcement 搭配使用。
在雅思写作或阅读中，reinforcement 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
v to say, state, or perform again
意为“重申”或“再次强调”，常用于正式场合重复表达相同观点以加深印象。
拒绝，抵制，丢弃，排斥，退掉n. 落选者
refuse to accept or acknowledge; reject with contempt; refuse entrance or membership
表示拒绝接受提议、请求或不喜欢的东西，如 reject an offer or a proposal。
在雅思话题中，reject 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
the act of rejecting something; the state of being rejected; (medicine) an immunological response that refuses to accept substances or organisms that are recognized as foreign
指被拒绝的状态或行为本身，常见于 rejection letter（拒信）等固定表达中。
意为“感到高兴”或“庆祝”，常与 at/in/over + something 搭配表示因某事而喜悦。
在雅思话题中，rejoice 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
复发, 回复原状。vi.故态复萌, 旧病复发。
指病情、习惯等恶化后再次复发，多用于 relapse into depression 或 bad habits。
在雅思写作或阅读中，relapse 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
give an account of; be in a relationship with; have or establish a relationship to
既可是动词“讲述故事”（relate a story），也可是及物动词“使与...相关”。
being connected either logically or causally or by shared characteristics; connected by kinship, common origin, or marriage
作为形容词表示“相关的”，如 related data，强调事物之间存在联系或关联。
an abstraction belonging to or characteristic of two entities or parts together; an act of narration; (usually plural) mutual dealings or connections among persons or groups
指人与人、国与国之间的正式或非正式关系，常涉及 diplomatic relations（外交关系）。
在雅思话题中，relation 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。

a relation between people; (`relationship' is often used where `relation' would serve, as in `the relationship between inflation and unemployment', but the preferred usage of `relationship' is for human relations or states of relatedness); a state of connectedness between people (especially an emotional connection); a state involving mutual dealings between people or parties or countries
特指人与人之间的情感纽带或互动模式，如 a healthy relationship between partners。
相对的，比较的，有关系的n. 亲戚，关系词
estimated by comparison; not absolute or complete
指有血缘或婚姻关系的人，也可作形容词表示“相关的”。
in a relative manner; by comparison to something else
作为副词修饰形容词或动词，意为“相当地”而非绝对地。
(physics) the theory that space and time are relative concepts rather than absolute concepts; the quality of being relative and having significance only in relation to something else
物理学专有名词，指时间与空间随参考系变化而变化的理论。
在雅思写作或阅读中，relativity 常用于讨论科技与交流相关话题。
become less tense, rest, or take one's ease; make less taut; cause to feel relaxed
动词原形，意为“放松”，常接宾语如 muscles 或用于祈使句。

(physiology) the gradual lengthening of inactive muscle or muscle fibers; (physics) the exponential return of a system to equilibrium after a disturbance; an occurrence of control or strength weakening
名词指“休息”状态或过程，也可作不可数名词表示休闲活动。
在雅思话题中，relaxation 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
转播;传递 n. 替班;转播;接力赛跑
the act of passing something along from one person or group to another; a crew of workers who relieve another crew; a fresh team to relieve weary draft animals
动词意为“转播信号”，名词可指接力棒、中继站或新闻通讯员。
merchandise issued for sale or public showing (especially a record or film); a process that liberates or discharges something; a device that when pressed will release part of a mechanism
作及物动词表示“发布”消息，也可作不及物动词指“释放”。
s not to be placated or appeased or moved by entreaty; s never-ceasing
形容词形容持续不断且毫不松懈的努力或压力。
在雅思写作或阅读中，relentless 可用于描述公共交通相关情况。
having a bearing on or connection with the subject at issue
指与当前话题直接相关的重要，常修饰名词如 information。
n the quality of being dependable or reliable
名词指系统或人保持承诺和准确度的程度，即可靠度。
在雅思话题中，reliability 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
形容人或事物值得信任，常与 depend on、source of information 等搭配。
信任，信心，依靠，依靠的人或物
certainty based on past experience; the state of relying on something
指对某人或某事的依赖状态，常见于 have a reliance on sb./sth. 结构。
信赖的, 依靠的, 信赖自己的。
形容词，表示“依赖于……的”，常用于 be reliant on sth. 表达依靠关系。
在雅思写作或阅读中，reliant 可用于描述科技与交流相关情况。
the feeling that comes when something burdensome is removed or reduced; the condition of being comfortable or relieved (especially after being relieved of distress); (law) redress awarded by a court
名词，指痛苦或压力后的舒缓感；也可作不可数名词泛指减轻负担的行为。
减轻，解除，援救，救济，换班
provide physical relief, as from pain; free from a burden, evil, or distress; take by stealing
动词，意为“缓解、减轻”，常接 pain, stress, pressure 等抽象宾语。
a strong belief in a supernatural power or powers that control human destiny; an institution to express belief in a divine power
指信仰体系或精神实践；作不可数名词时泛指宗教活动与教义本身。
concerned with sacred matters or religion or the church; having or showing belief in and reverence for a deity; of or relating to clergy bound by monastic vows
形容词，描述与宗教信仰相关的人、节日或行为，如 religious beliefs/practices。
在雅思话题中，religious 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
v part with a possession or right; v do without or cease to hold or adhere to; v turn away from; give up
动词，意为“放弃、交出”，常接 possession, power, claim 等抽象宾语。
美味，味道，调味品，食欲，乐趣v. 喜欢，品味
spicy or savory condiment; the taste experience when a savoury condiment is taken into the mouth
作名词指享受或喜爱某事；作不及物动词时后接 food, music 等表示从中获得乐趣。
在雅思话题中，relish 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
(physics) opposition to magnetic flux (analogous to electric resistance); a certain degree of unwillingness
不可数名词，表达“不情愿”的心理状态，常与 show reluctance to do sth. 连用。
在雅思话题中，reluctance 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
disinclined to become involved; not eager
表示不情愿做某事，常与 do something 连用。
v have confidence or faith in
指依赖某人或事物，常用 rely on sb./sth. 结构。
剩下，余留；留待，尚须；仍然是，依旧是
be left; of persons, questions, problems, results, evidence, etc.
表示保持某种状态不变，如 remain calm or silent。
剩余物，剩下的；余数，余项

something left after other parts have been taken away; the part of the dividend that is left over when the dividend is not evenly divisible by the divisor; the number that remains after subtraction; the number that when added to the subtrahend gives the minuend
指剩余的部分或数量，常用于 the remainder of...。
any object that is left unused or still extant
专指死者遗体，不可数名词，常作 remains of sb.。
a statement that expresses a personal opinion or belief or adds information; explicit notice

形容非常突出或值得注意，常修饰 impressive events。
补救办法,纠正办法;药品,治疗法 vt. 补救,纠正;治疗,医治
a medicine or therapy that cures disease or relieve pain
指解决麻烦的方法，常用 find a remedy for...。
在雅思话题中，remedy 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
记住；(to)转达问候，代…致意，代…问好
recall knowledge from memory; have a recollection; keep in mind for attention or consideration; recapture the past; indulge in memories
表示记得某事或某人，常与 doing sth. or sb.连用。
the ability to recall past occurrences
指纪念物、回忆或追思活动，如 a place of remembrance。
在雅思写作或阅读中，remembrance 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
put in the mind of someone
常接 that 从句或 to do，表示“提醒某人做某事”而非单纯告知信息。
a mental impression retained and recalled from the past
指对往事的怀旧回忆，常用于 reminiscence of one's childhood 等具体语境中。
在雅思话题中，reminiscence 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
s serving to bring to mind
作形容词意为“令人想起……的”，如 a design reminiscent of the past。
在雅思写作或阅读中，reminiscent 可用于描述科技与交流相关情况。
an abatement in intensity or degree (as in the manifestations of a disease); (law) the act of remitting (especially the referral of a law case to another court)
医学上指病情缓解，法律中指罚金减免，即 remission of sentence。
在雅思写作或阅读中，remission 常用于讨论公共健康相关话题。
send (money) in payment; release from (claims, debts, or taxes); refer (a matter or legal case) to another committee or authority or court for decision
作动词意为“授权、委托或免除”，如 remit a task to someone else。
a payment of money sent to a person in another place
指汇款，常见于 remittance transfer 等金融语境中表达资金汇出行为。
在雅思话题中，remittance 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
n a small part or portion that remains after the main part no longer exists; n a piece of cloth that is left over after the rest has been used or sold
指剩余部分或残余物，如 the last remnant of a forest after logging。
在雅思话题中，remnant 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
懊悔, 自责, 同情, 怜悯。
n a feeling of deep regret (usually for some misdeed)
表示因做错事而产生的懊悔感，常与 feel 连用表达内心愧疚情绪。
在雅思写作或阅读中，remorse 常用于讨论公共交通相关话题。
远的，遥远的，疏远的，偏僻的，细微的
n a device that can be used to control a machine or apparatus from a distance; s located far away spatially; s very unlikely
形容距离遥远或关系疏远，也可指不相关的，如 remote control devices。
n the property of being remote; n a disposition to be distant and unsympathetic in manner

在雅思写作或阅读中，remoteness 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
the act of removing; dismissal from office
指将某物从原处拿走或消除，常与 of、from 搭配表示移除过程。

remove something concrete, as by lifting, pushing, or taking off, or remove something abstract; remove from a position or an office; shift the position or location of, as for business, legal, educational, or military purposes
作动词意为“拿掉”或“摆脱”，如 remove shoes；也可指删除数据等抽象内容。
the act of paying for goods or services or to recompense for losses
专指工作报酬，常与 salary、wages 并列使用，强调金钱形式的回报。
在雅思写作或阅读中，remuneration 常用于讨论科技与交流相关话题。
文艺复兴(时期)；新生，复兴
the period of European history at the close of the Middle Ages and the rise of the modern world; a cultural rebirth from the 14th through the middle of the 17th centuries

提供,报答;表演,演奏;翻译
cause to become; give or supply; pass down
作动词时意为“使呈现”（render a verdict）；也可指提供某种服务或帮助他人。
在雅思话题中，render 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
集合点。v.在指定地点集合。
a meeting planned at a certain time and place; a place where people meet
源自法语，现多用于非正式场合表示约定好的聚会时间或地点的会面。
在雅思写作或阅读中，rendezvous 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
v reestablish on a new, usually improved, basis or make new or like new; v cause to appear in a new form
指恢复原状、续订合同或更新服务，常与 subscription、lease 等名词连用。
that can be renewed or extended; capable of being renewed; replaceable

在雅思话题中，renewal 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
革新, 刷新, 修复。
restore to a previous or better condition
特指对建筑内部进行翻新改造以改善功能与外观，常搭配 interior use。
在雅思写作中，renovate 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
the act of improving by renewing and restoring; the state of being restored to its former good condition
指对房屋或建筑进行翻新改造，常搭配动词如 undertake a renovation。
在雅思写作或阅读中，renovation 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
形容某人或某事非常著名且广受赞誉，常用于 renowned scientist 等结构。
在雅思写作或阅读中，renowned 可用于描述环境保护相关情况。
let for money; hold under a lease or rental agreement; of goods and services
作动词表示支付租金以获取房屋使用权；作名词指应付的房租金额。

available to rent or lease; of or relating to rent

修理，修补v. 补救，纠正；修理

指修复损坏物品使其恢复原状，常与 minor repair（小修）搭配使用。

n a skilled worker whose job is to repair things
repairmen 是维修工人的复数形式，多用于口语中指代上门修理的服务人员。

重复，重说，重做n. 重复
to say, state, or perform again; to say again or imitate; do over
作动词表示再次做某事；作名词指重复发生的动作或事件，如 repeat offense。
表示动作多次发生，常与 do, say, ask 等动词连用。

(准备好演出的)节目, 保留剧目, (计算机的)指令表, 指令系统, <美>(某个人的)全部技能。

取代，替换，替换物，代替物

a person who investigates and reports or edits news stories

take the place of or be parallel or equivalent to; be representative or typical for; be a delegate or spokesperson for; represent somebody's interest or be a proxy or substitute for, as of politicians and office holders representing their constituents, or of a tenant representing other tenants in a housing dispute
表示代替他人出席或象征性地体现某群体利益，如 represent the company。

a presentation to the mind in the form of an idea or image; a creation that is a visual or tangible rendering of someone or something; the act of representing; standing in for someone or some group and speaking with authority in their behalf

生殖；翻版；繁殖；复制，仿造
make a copy or equivalent of; have offspring or produce more individuals of a given animal or plant; recreate a sound, image, idea, mood, atmosphere, etc.

refuse to acknowledge, ratify, or recognize as valid; refuse to recognize or pay; reject as untrue, unfounded, or unjust

n anything indispensable; s necessary for relief or supply
意为“必需的”，强调不可或缺性，常用于修饰具体物品或条件。

recovery or preservation from loss or danger; free from harm or evil; take forcibly from legal custody

full of or marked by resentment or indignant ill will

relating to human society and its members; living together or enjoying life in communities or organized groups; relating to or belonging to or characteristic of high society
social 作形容词时多指‘社会的’或‘社交的’，名词 social life 指社会生活。
在雅思话题中，social 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
a political theory advocating state ownership of industry; an economic system based on state ownership of capital
socialism 是政治经济学术语，主张生产资料公有及财富公平分配的社会制度。
在雅思写作或阅读中，socialism 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
socialist 指支持社会主义的人或政党，也可作形容词描述具有该意识形态的特征。
在雅思写作或阅读中，socialist 可用于描述文化多样性相关情况。
社会；社团，协会，社；社交界，上流社会
an extended social group having a distinctive cultural and economic organization; the fashionable elite
society 可泛指人类社会、特定社群（如 upper society）或社交场合与活动。
在雅思话题中，society 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
a social scientist who studies the institutions and development of human society
sociologist 是研究社会结构及人际关系的学者，属于社会科学领域的专业人士。
在雅思写作或阅读中，sociologist 常用于讨论家庭生活相关话题。
the study and classification of human societies
sociology 是一门研究人类社会行为、群体互动及其发展规律的社会科学学科。
hosiery consisting of a cloth covering for the foot; worn inside the shoe; reaches to between the ankle and the knee
指穿在脚上的织物鞋套，常与 shoes 并列提及。
在雅思话题中，sock 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
窝, 穴, 孔, 插座, 牙糟。v.给...配插座。
a bony hollow into which a structure fits; receptacle where something (a pipe or probe or end of a bone) is inserted; a receptacle into which an electric device can be inserted
作名词时指插座或接口；作动词意为插入（插头）。
在雅思话题中，socket 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
n a sodium salt of carbonic acid; used in making soap powders and glass and paper; n a sweet drink containing carbonated water and flavoring
通常指碳酸饮料，如 cola soda，区别于 plain water。
在雅思写作或阅读中，soda 常用于讨论科技与交流相关话题。

a silvery soft waxy metallic element of the alkali metal group; occurs abundantly in natural compounds (especially in salt water); burns with a yellow flame and reacts violently in water; occurs in sea water and in the mineral halite (rock salt)
化学元素钠的英文名称，常见于 sodium chloride（食盐）。
在雅思话题中，sodium 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
an upholstered seat for more than one person
指供人坐卧的家具，常搭配 armchair 或 sectional sofa。
在雅思写作或阅读中，sofa 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
软的；温柔的；细嫩的，光滑的；不含酒精的
yielding readily to pressure or weight; compassionate and kind; conciliatory; (of sound) relatively low in volume
形容质地柔软、性格温和或不严重；反义词为 hard。
在雅思话题中，soft 可用于描述环境保护相关问题。
make (images or sounds) soft or softer; make soft or softer; become soft or softer
意为使变软，如 soften butter before baking cookies。
在雅思写作中，soften 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
with low volume; in a manner that is pleasing to the senses
副词形式 softly，常用于描述轻柔的声音或动作方式。
在雅思阅读中，softly 可能出现在公共交通相关文章中。
the property of giving little resistance to pressure and being easily cut or molded; a state of declining economic condition; a sound property that is free from loudness or stridency
指柔软度这一抽象性质，如 the softness of wool fabric。
在雅思写作或阅读中，softness 常用于讨论家庭生活相关话题。
(computer science) written programs or procedures or rules and associated documentation pertaining to the operation of a computer system and that are stored in read/write memory
专指计算机程序集合，常与 hardware 相对使用。
the part of the earth's surface consisting of humus and disintegrated rock
指土地表层，也可引申为“土壤成分”或比喻人的性格（如 rich soil）。
在雅思话题中，soil 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
relating to or derived from the sun or utilizing the energies of the sun
形容词表示利用太阳能源的，常见于 solar energy、solar panel 等搭配。
an enlisted man or woman who serves in an army; a wingless sterile ant or termite having a large head and powerful jaws adapted for defending the colony
指军人或士兵；也可作动词意为“参军”，如 join the army as a soldier。
单独的,惟一的;独有的 n. 脚底,鞋底,袜底
the underside of footwear or a golf club; lean flesh of any of several flatfish; the underside of the foot
主要指鞋子的底部（the sole of your shoe），也用于表示唯一的、单独的。
在雅思话题中，sole 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
r without any others being included or involved
副词 solely 强调“仅仅”或“完全”，常用于 solely responsible / solely based on。
s dignified and somber in manner or character and committed to keeping promises; s characterized by a firm and humorless belief in the validity of your opinions
形容严肃、庄重的场合，如 a solemn occasion；也可指表情肃穆（solemn face）。

make a solicitation or entreaty for something; request urgently or persistently; incite, move, or persuade to some act of lawlessness or insubordination; make a solicitation or petition for something desired
动词 solicit 意为“请求”或“招揽”，常接宾语 soliciting donations / clients。
在雅思写作中，solicit 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
a petitioner who solicits contributions or trade or votes; a British lawyer who gives legal advice and prepares legal documents
指律师（英式英语常用），特处理财产法事务，区别于 barrister。
在雅思话题中，solicitor 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
固体的；结实的，稳固的，可靠的n. 固体
形容词 solid 表示“实心的”或“坚固的”，也可形容关系稳固、数据可靠。
在雅思话题中，solid 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
a union of interests or purposes or sympathies among members of a group
名词 solidarity 指团结精神，常用于 show solidarity with someone in need。
在雅思话题中，solidarity 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
make solid or more solid; cause to solidify; become solid
指液体变硬或抽象概念（如关系）变得稳固，常作不及物动词。
在雅思写作中，solidify 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
独居的,孤独的,惟一的;荒凉的
n confinement of a prisoner in isolation from other prisoners; n one who lives in solitude; s characterized by or preferring solitude
形容独自一人的状态，强调孤独而非寂寞的情感色彩。
a state of social isolation; the state or situation of being alone; a solitary place
指享受独处时光的状态，常与 enjoy in 搭配表达积极含义。
在雅思话题中，solitude 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
any activity that is performed alone without assistance; a musical composition for one voice or instrument (with or without accompaniment); a flight in which the aircraft pilot is unaccompanied
作副词表示单独行动（如 solo flight），或形容词修饰独自完成的任务。
在雅思话题中，solo 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
(of a substance) capable of being dissolved in some solvent (usually water); susceptible of solution or of being solved or explained
描述物质能溶解于液体中，常与 in water 等介词短语连用。
在雅思写作或阅读中，soluble 可用于描述城市发展相关情况。
解答，解决办法；溶解，溶液

a homogeneous mixture of two or more substances; frequently (but not necessarily) a liquid solution; a statement that solves a problem or explains how to solve the problem; a method for solving a problem
既指化学上的溶液混合物，也比喻解决问题的具体办法或答案。
find the solution to (a problem or question) or understand the meaning of
意为找出问题的答案或消除困难，常接 problem、puzzle 等宾语。
the ability to meet maturing obligations as they come due
指企业偿还债务的能力，是财务报告中评估风险的关键指标。
在雅思写作或阅读中，solvency 常用于讨论公共交通相关话题。
能偿还的,溶解的;n. 溶剂,偿付能力
化学中指溶解其他物质的液体（如溶剂），或泛指能解决问题的方法。
几个；一些；有些；某(人或物)pron. 一些

quantifier; used with either mass nouns or plural count nouns to indicate an unspecified number or quantity; relatively much but unspecified in amount or extent; relatively many but unspecified in number
作限定词表示‘某些’而非全部，语气比 all 弱且更灵活自然。
某人，有人n. 重要人物
指代身份不明或不愿透露的人，常用于口语中代替具体人名。
以某种方式，用某种方法；不知怎么地
in some unspecified way or manner; or by some unspecified means; for some unspecified reason;
表示以某种未说明的方式发生某事，强调结果而非过程细节。
指代身份不明或不愿透露的人，用法与 somebody 相同但更常用。
某事，某物；被视为有意义的事物
Anything unknown, undetermined, or not specifically; designated; a certain indefinite thing; an indeterminate or unknown; event; an unspecified task, work, or thing.
泛指任何事物，常用于否定句、疑问句或表示“某事”的模糊概念。
在雅思写作中，something 可用于讨论公共健康或社会变化。
将来(或过去)某个时候a. 以前的
at some indefinite or unstated time
指过去或将来的某个不确定的时间点，区别于 sometimes（有时）。
在雅思阅读中，sometime 可能出现在城市发展相关文章中。
on certain occasions or in certain cases but not always; at other times for six months"
表示频率为偶尔或有时候，常用于描述非规律性的事件发生。
r to a small degree or extent; r to a moderately sufficient extent or degree
作副词修饰形容词或动词，意为“稍微”、“有点”，语气较委婉。
某地，在某处；在附近，前后，大约
in or at or to some place; (`someplace' is used informally for `somewhere')
指某个不确定的地点，常用于回答 where 提问或表示模糊位置。
儿子；孩子(长者对年青或年幼男子的称呼)
a male human offspring; the divine word of God; the second person in the Trinity (incarnate in Jesus)
特指父母所生的男性后代，区别于 stepson（继子）等亲属称谓。
歌唱，(虫、鸟等)鸣声；歌曲，歌词
a short musical composition with words; a distinctive or characteristic sound; the act of singing
指有旋律的乐曲或歌词组合，常与 sing、play 等动词搭配使用。
指女儿的丈夫或儿子的妻子，是姻亲关系中的配偶一方。
在雅思写作或阅读中，son-in-law 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
a verse form consisting of 14 lines with a fixed rhyme scheme
一种由十四行诗组成的经典诗歌形式，常探讨爱情、时间等主题。
在雅思写作或阅读中，sonnet 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。
表示“不久”或“很快”，常用于soon to do sth.结构表达即将发生的动作。
指燃烧后残留的黑色粉末，常与烟囱、壁炉等场景相关。
在雅思写作或阅读中，soot 常用于讨论公共健康相关话题。
意为“抚慰”或“使平静”，常用于soothe sb.'s pain/emotions搭配。
在雅思话题中，soothe 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
having or appealing to those having worldly knowledge and refinement and savoir-faire; intellectually appealing
形容事物复杂精致、有教养，也可指人见多识广且品味高雅。

being expert or having knowledge of some technical subject; the quality or character of being intellectually sophisticated and worldly through cultivation or experience or disillusionment; falsification by the use of sophistry; misleading by means of specious fallacies
指事物的复杂性或人的世故程度，常与sophisticated连用描述社会现象。
在雅思话题中，sophistication 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
疼痛的;恼火的;极度的,剧烈的
既指身体疼痛的部位（如a sore throat），也比喻棘手的问题或难题。
在雅思话题中，sore 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
an emotion of great sadness associated with loss or bereavement; sadness associated with some wrong done or some disappointment
表达深切的悲伤、哀痛之情，常用于sorrow for sb./sth.结构表示同情。
在雅思写作或阅读中，sorrow 常用于讨论家庭生活相关话题。
experiencing or marked by or expressing sorrow especially that associated with irreparable loss
形容充满悲痛或令人伤心的状态，多用于修饰表情、声音等具体表现。
在雅思写作或阅读中，sorrowful 可用于描述全球化相关情况。
对不起，抱歉的；难过，悔恨的；使人伤心
a feeling or expressing regret or sorrow or a sense of loss over something done or undone; s bad; unfortunate; s without merit
既作道歉用语，也常接 for + doing 表示对某事感到抱歉。
an approximate definition or example; a person of a particular character or nature; an operation that segregates items into groups according to a specified criterion

the immaterial part of a person; the actuating cause of an individual life; deep feeling or emotion; the human embodiment of something

在雅思话题中，soul 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
声音v. 发声，响a. 健全的，完好的；正当的
the particular auditory effect produced by a given cause; the subjective sensation of hearing something; mechanical vibrations transmitted by an elastic medium

liquid food especially of meat or fish or vegetable stock often containing pieces of solid food; any composition having a consistency suggestive of soup; an unfortunate situation
通常与 hot/cold/thick/thin 等词搭配描述汤的质地温度。
在雅思话题中，soup 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
a cocktail made of a liquor (especially whiskey or gin) mixed with lemon or lime juice and sugar; the taste experience when vinegar or lemon juice is taken into the mouth; go sour or spoil
形容食物或情绪酸涩，也可指柠檬、醋等具有酸味的东西。
在雅思话题中，sour 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
a document (or organization) from which information is obtained; anything that provides inspiration for later work; a facility where something is available

南，南方，南部a. 南方的，南部的
the region of the United States lying to the south of the Mason-Dixon line; the cardinal compass point that is at 180 degrees; a location in the southern part of a country, region, or city

the compass point midway between south and east; at 135 degrees; the southeastern region of the United States; the direction corresponding to the southeastward compass point
指东南方位；常与 northeast/northwest/southwest 并列使用。
在雅思话题中，southeast 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
in or characteristic of a region of the United States south of (approximately) the Mason-Dixon line; situated in or coming from regions of the south
指南方的，常用于 southern hemisphere、southern lights 等短语中。
n the cardinal compass point that is at 180 degrees; s moving toward the south; r toward the south
作副词表示向南移动，常与动词连用如 move southward。
在雅思写作或阅读中，southward 可用于描述教育相关情况。

the compass point midway between south and west; at 225 degrees; the southwestern region of the United States generally including New Mexico, Arizona, Texas, Nevada, California, and sometimes Utah and Colorado; the direction corresponding to the southwestward compass point
指美国西南部地区，如亚利桑那州；也泛指地理方位中的西南方向。
在雅思话题中，southwest 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
n something of sentimental value; n a reminder of past events

在雅思话题中，souvenir 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
主权的;有最高统治权的
greatest in status or authority or power
作形容词时指拥有最高权力的，常修饰国家或君主；作名词特指行使主权的独立国家。
在雅思话题中，sovereign 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
government free from external control; the authority of a state to govern another state

在雅思话题中，sovereignty 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
place (seeds) in or on the ground for future growth; introduce into an environment

在雅思话题中，sow 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。

a source of oil; used for forage and soil improvement and as food; erect bushy hairy annual herb having trifoliate leaves and purple to pink flowers; extensively cultivated for food and forage and soil improvement but especially for its nutritious oil-rich seeds; native to Asia; the most highly proteinaceous vegetable known; the fruit of the soybean plant is used in a variety of foods and as fodder (especially as a replacement for animal protein)
指大豆，常作名词或形容词修饰食品（如 soy milk），也可作为动词表示“把...做成豆腐”。
在雅思话题中，soy 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
间隔；空地，余地；空间v. 留间隔，隔开
the unlimited expanse in which everything is located; an empty area (usually bounded in some way between things); an area reserved for some particular purpose
作名词指“空间”或“太空”，常与动词 occupy、save 搭配，也可表示“余地”。
Any vehicle capable of travelling repeatedly between the Earth's surface and outer space carrying people or cargo.
指美国曾使用的可重复使用航天飞机，常与 orbiter（轨道器）搭配提及。
短语“space shuttle”可帮助考生在雅思写作中更清楚地表达观点。
a craft capable of traveling in outer space; technically, a satellite around the sun
指在太空飞行的载人或无人飞行器，常与 launch（发射）和 return to Earth（返回地球）搭配使用。

n a spacecraft designed to carry a crew into interstellar space (especially in science fiction)
指载人宇宙飞船，常与 launch（发射）或 land（着陆）搭配使用。
在雅思话题中，spaceship 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
s very large in expanse or scope; s (of buildings and rooms) having ample space

a playing card in the major suit that has one or more black figures on it; a sturdy hand shovel that can be pushed into the earth with the foot

a parliamentary monarchy in southwestern Europe on the Iberian Peninsula; a former colonial power
西班牙的国名，常与 capital（首都）、flag（国旗）等词连用。
在雅思话题中，spain 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
一段时间;跨距,跨度;vt. 持续,贯穿,包括;横跨,跨越
the complete duration of something; the distance or interval between two points; a unit of length based on the width of the expanded human hand (usually taken as 9 inches)
作动词表示跨越一段距离或时间，如 span a decade（横跨十年）。
of or relating to or characteristic of Spain or the people of Spain
指西班牙语或其语言使用者，也可形容具有西班牙语文化特征的事物。
在雅思话题中，spanish 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
空闲的;剩余的;n. 备用件
a score in tenpins; knocking down all ten after rolling two balls; refrain from harming; save or relieve from an experience or action

在雅思话题中，spare 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
火花，火星v. 发火花，发电花

a small but noticeable trace of some quality that might become stronger; Scottish writer of satirical novels (born in 1918); a small fragment of a burning substance thrown out by burning material or by friction
指火花，常与 fly out of the fireplace（从壁炉飞出）等动态场景搭配。
在雅思话题中，spark 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
reflect brightly; be lively or brilliant or exhibit virtuosity

any of several small dull-colored singing birds feeding on seeds or insects
指麻雀这种常见鸟类，常出现在描述自然生态或儿童文学中。
在雅思话题中，sparrow 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
形容数量少或分布不密集，如 sparse population（人口稀疏）或 sparse data（数据零散）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，sparse 可用于描述教育相关情况。
pertaining to or involving or having the nature of space
指与空间位置相关的属性，常用于 spatial analysis（空间分析）或 spatial relationship（空间关系）。
说话，讲话；演说，发言；(in)说某种语言
use language; make a characteristic or natural sound
作动词表示用语言表达思想；作名词特指演讲者。常用搭配 include speak freely / give a speech。

可指引起反应的刺激物（如经济 stimulus），也作“动机”解。
在雅思写作或阅读中，stimulus 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
a kind of pain; something as sudden and painful as being stung; a painful wound caused by the thrust of an insect's stinger into skin; deliver a sting to
既指昆虫叮咬的刺痛感，也可比喻言语带来的伤害或尴尬局面。
be extremely bad in quality or in one's performance
作动词表示“发出难闻气味”，常与 bad smell、offensive odor 搭配使用。
在雅思话题中，stink 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。

specify as a condition or requirement in a contract or agreement; make an express demand or provision in an agreement; give a guarantee or promise of; make an oral contract or agreement in the verbal form of question and answer that is necessary to give it legal force
正式用语，指在合同或法律中明确规定条款细节（stipulate terms）。

(law) an agreement or concession made by parties in a judicial proceeding (or by their attorneys) relating to the business before the court; must be in writing unless they are part of the court record; a restriction that is insisted upon as a condition for an agreement
指协议中的具体规定事项，常复数形式 stipulations 出现于合同中。
搅拌，搅动；动，摇动；激动；轰动；煽动，鼓动
move an implement through; move very slightly
指用手或工具使液体、食物等上下翻动混合，也可引申为引起骚乱。
在雅思写作中，stir 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
exciting strong but not unpleasant emotions
作形容词时形容令人感动或兴奋；作名词常指烹饪中持续搅拌的动作过程。
在雅思写作或阅读中，stirring 可用于描述环境保护相关情况。
缝纫;缝线;(肋部)突然剧痛
a link or loop or knot made by an implement in knitting, crocheting, embroidery, or sewing; a sharp spasm of pain in the side resulting from running
既指衣物上的针脚，也用于医学描述伤口缝合线或身体出现的皮疹点状痕迹。
在雅思话题中，stitch 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
存货,供给,股票 v. 供应

the capital raised by a corporation through the issue of shares entitling holders to an ownership interest (equity); the merchandise that a shop has on hand; the handle of a handgun or the butt end of a rifle or shotgun or part of the support of a machine gun or artillery gun
主要指肉类、蔬菜等食材的汤汁浓缩物；在金融领域则专指公司股票份额。
close-fitting hosiery to cover the foot and leg; come in matched pairs (usually used in the plural); the activity of supplying a stock of something
特指覆盖脚部至膝盖或脚踝的长筒袜，区别于仅包裹脚趾和脚跟的普通袜子。
在雅思写作或阅读中，stocking 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
胃，胃口；肚子，腹部vt. 承受，忍受

an enlarged and muscular saclike organ of the alimentary canal; the principal organ of digestion; an inclination or liking for things involving conflict or difficulty or unpleasantness; an appetite for food
常与 upset、ache 等词搭配描述胃部不适；也可指人的情绪状态如“心情不好”。
在雅思话题中，stomach 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
石，石头；岩石，矿石；(水果的)核、子

building material consisting of a piece of rock hewn in a definite shape for a special purpose; an avoirdupois unit used to measure the weight of a human body; equal to 14 pounds; the hard inner (usually woody) layer of the pericarp of some fruits (as peaches or plums or cherries or olives) that contains the seed
既指坚硬的矿物岩石，也用于比喻性格固执或处境艰难（in a tight spot）。
s abounding in rocks or stones; s showing unfeeling resistance to tender feelings; s hard as granite
形容地面、皮肤等表面布满碎石或不平整；也可描述人表情僵硬缺乏生气。
a simple seat without a back or arms; (forestry) the stump of a tree that has been felled or headed for the production of saplings
医学上指人体排泄的固体废物，日常语境中多用于委婉表达如“去趟洗手间”。
在雅思话题中，stool 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
弯腰,俯身;屈从,堕落,沦为
descend swiftly, as if on prey; sag, bend, bend over or down
作动词时意为弯腰低头或屈尊俯就；名词则指楼梯底部的平台区域。
在雅思话题中，stoop 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
停止；塞住；阻止，阻挠；逗留n. 停车站；停止
the event of something ending; the act of stopping something; a brief stay in the course of a journey
作动词指“停止”动作，常接动名词如 stop doing；作不可数名词时意为“停车”。
the act of storing something; the commercial enterprise of storing goods and materials; (computer science) the process of storing information in a computer memory or on a magnetic tape or disk
主要用作不可数名词，指存放物品的空间或设施（如 storage space），区别于具体商店。
在雅思话题中，storage 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
商店，店铺；贮藏，贮备品v. 贮藏，贮备
a supply of something available for future use
作动词意为“储存”物品；作可数名词时特指零售商品销售的场所，即商店。
n a structure consisting of a room or set of rooms at a single position along a vertical scale
英式拼写 storey（美式 story）指建筑物的一层或楼层，常用于描述建筑高度。
暴风雨，暴风雪；激动，爆发v. 猛攻，直捣

a violent weather condition with winds 64-72 knots (11 on the Beaufort scale) and precipitation and thunder and lightning; a violent commotion or disturbance; a direct and violent assault on a stronghold
作名词指强烈的风雨天气；作动词意为“猛烈袭击”，常与 against 连用表示对抗风暴。
在雅思话题中，storm 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
(especially of weather) affected or characterized by storms or commotion; characterized by violent emotions or behavior
形容词 stormy 描述暴风雨的天气，也可比喻气氛紧张或关系不和睦（a stormy relationship）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，stormy 可用于描述就业与技能相关情况。
a piece of fiction that narrates a chain of related events
作名词指故事、传说或个人经历；在英式英语中亦用作楼层单位 storey。
a strong very dark heavy-bodied ale made from pale malt and roasted unmalted barley and (often) caramel malt with hops; a garment size for a large or heavy person
形容人高大健壮或啤酒泡沫丰富，也可描述家具结实耐用（a stout table）。
在雅思话题中，stout 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
a kitchen appliance used for cooking food; any heating apparatus
指用于烹饪的炉灶设备；作动词时意为“烘烤”食物。
在雅思写作或阅读中，stove 常用于讨论家庭生活相关话题。
及物动词 stow 专指将行李、货物等紧凑地塞入或安置在狭小空间内（如 stow luggage）。
在雅思写作中，stow 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
the charge for stowing goods; the act of packing or storing away
指货物在船舱或集装箱内的堆放与固定方式，常涉及安全规范。
在雅思写作或阅读中，stowage 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
直的；整齐的，端正的ad. 直接；正直，直率
successive (without a break); having no deviations; (of hair) having no waves or curls
形容路线笔直、态度诚实或直接，也可作副词表示“直接地”。
在雅思话题中，straight 可用于描述教育相关问题。
straighten up or out; make straight; make straight; get up from a sitting or slouching position
指将弯曲物体弄直或使局面恢复正常状态的动作。
在雅思写作中，straighten 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
正直的,坦率的,老实的, 简明易懂的
free from ambiguity; pointed directly ahead
形容事情简单明了、易于理解，常用来描述清晰直接的过程。
拉紧,紧张,拉力;劳累,过分疲劳; vt./vi. 尽量利用;拉紧;扭伤;过滤

(physics) deformation of a physical body under the action of applied forces; (psychology) nervousness resulting from mental stress; injury to a muscle (often caused by overuse); results in swelling and pain
指身体或精神承受过大压力而接近极限的状态，也可作动词表示用力拉扯。
在雅思话题中，strain 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
a narrow channel of the sea joining two larger bodies of water
特指狭窄的海峡（如 Strait of Gibraltar），而非普通形容词用法。
在雅思话题中，strait 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。

a pattern forming a unity within a larger structural whole; line consisting of a complex of fibers or filaments that are twisted together to form a thread or a rope or a cable; a poetic term for a shore (as the area periodically covered and uncovered by the tides)
作动词时指将某人遗弃在途中，名词则指被遗留者或绳索末端。
奇怪的，奇异的；陌生的，生疏的；外地的
being definitely out of the ordinary and unexpected; slightly odd or even a bit weird; not known before
形容事物不寻常、奇特或缺乏解释，常用于表达惊讶或不解。
陌生人，生客；外地人，外国人
anyone who does not belong in the environment in which they are found; an individual that one is not acquainted with
指不熟悉的人或外地人，常与“make oneself at home”等搭配使用。
在雅思写作或阅读中，stranger 常用于讨论家庭生活相关话题。
带;皮带;vt. 用带束住;捆扎

an elongated leather strip (or a strip of similar material) for binding things together or holding something in position; hanger consisting of a loop of leather suspended from the ceiling of a bus or train; passengers hold onto it; a band that goes over the shoulder and supports a garment or bag
指用于固定物品的带子，也可作动词表示用带子捆扎物体。
在雅思话题中，strap 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
relating to or concerned with strategy; highly important to or an integral part of a strategy or plan of action especially in war
指与长远目标相关的，常修饰计划、决策或行动。
the branch of military science dealing with military command and the planning and conduct of a war
指达成目标的详细行动计划，如 business strategy。
在雅思话题中，strategy 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
plant fiber used e.g. for making baskets and hats or as fodder; a thin paper or plastic tube used to suck liquids into the mouth
常与动词 fill、stuff 连用，表示填充物或材料。

sweet fleshy red fruit; any of various low perennial herbs with many runners and bearing white flowers followed by edible fruits having many small achenes scattered on the surface of an enlarged red pulpy berry; a soft red birthmark
指一种常见水果，也可形容像草莓一样红嫩的事物。
在雅思写作或阅读中，strawberry 常用于讨论公共健康相关话题。
wander from a direct course or at random
作形容词时意为“迷路的”，如 a stray dog；作动词表示偏离轨道。
在雅思写作中，stray 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
纹理，条纹 vt.裸奔,飞驰
an unbroken series of events; a distinctive characteristic; a sudden flash (as of lightning)
指连续出现的一系列痕迹或现象，常与 hair、light 等搭配。
小河，溪流；流，一股，一串v. 流出，涌

a natural body of running water flowing on or under the earth; dominant course (suggestive of running water) of successive events or ideas; something that resembles a flowing stream in moving continuously
作名词指水流；作动词表示持续流动或涌入某处。
在雅思话题中，stream 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
流线型的vt. 使成流线型；使合理化
意为使流程更简单高效，常用于 business context。
在雅思写作或阅读中，streamline 可用于描述公共交通相关情况。

a thoroughfare (usually including sidewalks) that is lined with buildings; the part of a thoroughfare between the sidewalks; the part of the thoroughfare on which vehicles travel; the streets of a city viewed as a depressed environment in which there is poverty and crime and prostitution and dereliction
指城市道路或公共场所，常与 walk、cross 等动词搭配。
a wheeled vehicle that runs on rails and is propelled by electricity
指由电力驱动的轨道车辆，主要在北美使用。
在雅思写作或阅读中，streetcar 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
力，力量；实力；长处，优点；人力；兵力
the property of being physically or mentally strong; the condition of financial success
指力量、体力或影响力，也可喻指性格中的坚强特质。
make strong or stronger; gain strength
意为使变强，常搭配肌肉（muscles）、关系（relationship）等宾语。
奋发的, 使劲的, 紧张的, 热烈的, 艰辛发奋的。
characterized by or performed with much energy or force
形容需要耗费大量体力或精力的活动，如 strenuous exercise。
在雅思写作或阅读中，strenuous 可用于描述科技与交流相关情况。
压力,重压 vt. 着重,强调重点,重视
the relative prominence of a syllable or musical note (especially with regard to stress or pitch); special emphasis attached to something; difficulty that causes worry or emotional tension
作名词指压力、焦虑；作动词表示强调重点（stress the importance）。
伸长,扩大,拉长;滥用,曲解;n. 伸展;一段持续时间
a large and unbroken expanse or distance; a straightaway section of a racetrack; exercise designed to extend the limbs and muscles to their full extent
意为延伸或伸展，常与肢体动作搭配，也可指拉伸物体。
散播, 点缀, 撒满。
spread by scattering ("straw" is archaic); cover; be dispersed over
表示将物品散乱地撒在地上，如 strew flowers on the ground。
在雅思写作中，strew 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
(with)严格的，严厉的；严谨的，精确的
s rigidly accurate; allowing no deviation from a standard; s (of rules) stringently enforced; a characterized by strictness, severity, or restraint
形容要求非常严格、不容许任何偏差或例外（no exceptions）。
restricted to something; in a stringent manner
作为副词，表示以极其严谨的方式执行某事，如 strictly follow rules。
significant progress (especially in the phrase "make strides"); walk with long steps; cover or traverse by taking long steps
指大步向前行走的动作或距离，常与动词 walk 连用（take a stride）。
在雅思话题中，stride 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
bitter conflict; heated often violent dissension
名词形式 strife 特指激烈的冲突、斗争或不和状态。
在雅思话题中，strife 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
罢工vt. 打，击；攻击；给…深刻印象

a group's refusal to work in protest against low pay or bad work conditions; an attack that is intended to seize or inflict damage on or destroy an objective; a score in tenpins: knocking down all ten with the first ball
作动词指罢工或击打，作形容词则形容“引人注目的”。
n the physical coming together of two or more things; n the act of contacting one thing with another; v deliver a sharp blow, as with the hand, fist, or weapon
常用作表语形容词 striking，意为“惊人的、显著的”，如 a striking difference。

a lightweight cord; a tightly stretched cord of wire or gut, which makes sound when plucked, struck, or bowed; a sequentially ordered set of things or events or ideas in which each successive member is related to the preceding
指细长的线状物或连接部件，常见搭配为 string of beads（一串珠子）。
在雅思话题中，string 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
剥去,除去;剥夺财产;n. 狭长一片
a relatively long narrow piece of something; artifact consisting of a narrow flat piece of material; thin piece of wood or metal
作动词意为“撕下、削去”，如 strip the wallpaper；名词指长条带。
长条，条纹；军服上表示军阶的臂章条纹
a piece of braid, usually on the sleeve, indicating military rank or length of service; a kind or category; a narrow marking of a different color or texture from the background
特指织物或物体上的条纹图案，常与 horizontal/vertical 连用描述方向。
在雅思话题中，stripe 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
to exert much effort or energy
意为“努力争取”，常用搭配为 strive for success 或 strive to do something。

(sports) the act of swinging or striking at a ball with a club or racket or bat or cue or hand; a sudden loss of consciousness resulting when the rupture or occlusion of a blood vessel leads to oxygen lack in the brain; a light touch
指轻拍的动作，如 stroke a cat；也可作名词表示一次击打或一记球杆挥动。
walk leisurely and with no apparent aim
意为“漫步、闲逛”，常与 along the beach 等地点搭配，强调轻松随意的行走方式。
在雅思话题中，stroll 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
n someone who walks at a leisurely pace; n a small vehicle with four wheels in which a baby or child is pushed around
指婴儿车或助行器；作动词时意为“推（婴儿车）”。
在雅思写作或阅读中，stroller 常用于讨论家庭生活相关话题。
强壮的，强大的；强烈的，浓的
having strength or power greater than average or expected; not faint or feeble; of verbs not having standard (or regular) inflection
形容力量大、强度高，如 strong coffee；也可表示牢固的友谊或坚定的信念。
指难以攻克的堡垒或势力范围，也可比喻某人最擅长且稳固的领域。
在雅思写作或阅读中，stronghold 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
with strength or in a strong manner
作为副词修饰动词，表示程度深、非常强烈地做某事（如 strongly believe）。

relating to or caused by structure, especially political or economic structure; relating to or having or characterized by structure; affecting or involved in structure or construction; not ornamental elements"
形容与建筑框架或组织体系相关的属性，常指涉及内部构造而非外观。
结构，构造；建筑物v. 构造，建造

a thing constructed; a complex entity constructed of many parts; the manner of construction of something and the arrangement of its parts; the complex composition of knowledge as elements and their combinations
既作名词指建筑物布局，也作动词表示建立某种制度、安排或构建关系。
an energetic attempt to achieve something; strenuous effort; to exert strenuous effort against opposition
常与 against 连用，描述为达成目标而进行的艰难努力或不屈不挠的抗争。
tenaciously unwilling or marked by tenacious unwillingness to yield
形容固执己见、不愿改变主意的人或事物，强调缺乏灵活性而非单纯强硬。
在雅思话题中，stubborn 可用于描述文化多样性相关问题。
(大中学校的)学生；研究者，学者
a learner who is enrolled in an educational institution
泛指在校学习者；在美式英语中常特指大学生（college student）。
在雅思话题中，student 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
画室；播音室；(电影)制片厂
workplace for the teaching or practice of an art; workplace consisting of a room or building where movies or television shows or radio programs are produced and recorded
既指艺术家的创作工作室，也指电影电视制作公司或录音棚。
勤学的, 认真的, 慎重的, 热心的。
形容勤奋好学的态度，常用来修饰学生、学者等致力于学习的人。
在雅思写作或阅读中，studious 可用于描述家庭生活相关情况。
学习；研究；细看vi. 读书n. 学习；研究
applying the mind to learning and understanding a subject (especially by reading); a state of deep mental absorption; a room used for reading and writing and studying
作名词指学科或学习活动；作动词表示通过阅读资料来获取知识或技能。
在雅思话题中，study 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
原料;材料;素质,本质;东西,物品;vt. 把…装满,塞进
miscellaneous unspecified objects; informal terms for personal possessions; senseless talk
作不可数名词指“杂物”或具体物品，口语中常接介词 in、with；也可作动词表示“塞满”。
a mixture of seasoned ingredients used to stuff meats and vegetables; padding put in mattresses and cushions and upholstered furniture
特指填充在火鸡等食物内部的馅料（stuffing），是感恩节餐桌上的传统配菜。
在雅思写作或阅读中，stuffing 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。
affected with a sensation of stoppage or obstruction
形容鼻子不通气或空气不流通，如 a stuffy room；也可引申指人因害羞而局促不安。
绊跌,绊倒;结结巴巴说话
walk unsteadily; miss a step and fall or nearly fall; encounter by chance
作不及物动词表示“绊倒”或“失足”，常与介词 over、on 连用，如 stumble on a rock。
在雅思话题中，stumble 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
树桩，残茬,参与部分,残肢 v.僵硬地走,使为难

the base part of a tree that remains standing after the tree has been felled; the part of a limb or tooth that remains after the rest is removed; (cricket) any of three upright wooden posts that form the wicket
指难以回答的问题（a stump question）；作动词时意为使某人困惑或无法应对某事。
在雅思写作或阅读中，stump 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
lacking or marked by lack of intellectual acuity
常用为形容词修饰人或行为，口语中语气较强，正式场合可用 foolish 替代以避免冒犯。
a poor ability to understand or to profit from experience; a stupid mistake
指愚蠢的行为或状态（stupidity），常与 show、display 等动词搭配，强调缺乏判断力。
在雅思写作或阅读中，stupidity 常用于讨论文化多样性相关话题。
形容物体坚固耐用且不易损坏，如 a sturdy chair；也可指人身体健壮能经受考验。

a particular kind (as to appearance); (botany) the narrow elongated part of the pistil between the ovary and the stigma; editorial directions to be followed in spelling and punctuation and capitalization and typographical display
作不可数名词表示“风格”或“方式”，常与动词 adopt、settle on 搭配，如 in a classic style。
an artist who is a master of a particular style

在雅思写作或阅读中，stylist 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
form into subdivisions; divide into smaller and smaller pieces
将整体分成更小的部分，常用于描述地理区域或组织的细分。
在雅思写作中，subdivide 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
使屈服、征服,克制;使柔和,使安静
v put down by force or intimidation; v to put down by force or authority; v hold within limits and control
使某人平静下来、制服野兽，或通过努力降低某种情绪或声音的强度。
主题；学科a. 隶属的；易遭…的(to)v. 使隶属

the subject matter of a conversation or discussion; something (a person or object or scene) selected by an artist or photographer for graphic representation; (grammar) one of the two main constituents of a sentence; the grammatical constituent about which something is predicated
作名词指“主题”或“学科”，作动词表示“服从于某人的控制”。
taking place within the mind and modified by individual bias
强调观点基于个人感受而非客观事实，常与 objective（客观的）相对。
relating to a mood of verbs
语法术语，指表达愿望、假设或与事实相反的虚拟语气时的动词形式。
在雅思写作或阅读中，subjunctive 可用于描述城市发展相关情况。
下意识的, 潜在意识的。
below the threshold of conscious perception
形容低于意识层面但能影响人的刺激或信息，如 subliminal advertising（潜意识广告）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，subliminal 可用于描述就业与技能相关情况。
潜水艇a. 水底的，海底的
a submersible warship usually armed with torpedoes
指在水下航行的船只，也可作形容词修饰与潜水艇相关的技术。
在雅思话题中，submarine 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
sink below the surface; go under or as if under water; cover completely or make imperceptible; put under water
使完全淹没在水中或埋入地下，常接 in water/earth 等介词短语。
在雅思话题中，submerge 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
屈服, 降服, 服从, 谦恭, 投降。

something (manuscripts or architectural plans and models or estimates or works of art of all genres etc.) submitted for the judgment of others (as in a competition); the act of submitting; usually surrendering power to another; the condition of having submitted to control by someone or something else
指正式的文件提交、投降行为，或在法律语境下的“呈递”动作结果。
refer for judgment or consideration; put before; yield to the control of another
主动提出建议或请求批准（submit a proposal），也可表示顺从权威的控制。
下级的,次要的;从属的;n. 部下, 下级职员;vt. 把…列为下级,使在次要地位
作形容词指“下级的”，作名词可表示“下属人员”或“从属部分”。

the state of being subordinate to something; the grammatical relation of a modifying word or phrase to its head; the quality of obedient submissiveness
常指社会地位、权力关系中的等级制度，如 class subordination。
在雅思写作或阅读中，subordination 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。
捐款,捐助;订阅;同意,赞成
offer to buy, as of stocks and shares; adopt as a belief; receive or obtain regularly
多用于 subscribe to a magazine（订阅杂志）或 agree with an idea（赞同观点）。
a payment for consecutive issues of a newspaper or magazine for a given period of time; agreement expressed by (or as if expressed by) signing your name; a pledged contribution
指定期支付的费用，如 annual subscription fee。
在雅思话题中，subscription 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。
n something that follows something else; n following in time
作名词表示“随后的事件”，常与 in the following subsequence 连用较少见，多直接用 subsequent events。
在雅思写作或阅读中，subsequence 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
意为“后来的、接下来的”，常用于修饰时间或顺序上的后续事物。
happening at a time subsequent to a reference time
作副词表示“随后地”，如 He subsequently resigned from the job。
下沉, 沉淀, 平息, 减退, 衰减。
wear off or die down; sink to a lower level or form a depression; sink down or precipitate
指疼痛、情绪或水位等逐渐减弱，常与 down 连用，如 The fever subsided quickly。
在雅思写作中，subside 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
辅助的,补充的;次要的,附属的; n. 子公司,附属机构
n an assistant subject to the authority or control of another; n a company that is completely controlled by another company; s functioning in a supporting capacity
作形容词修饰公司或部门时，表示“附属的”，如 a subsidiary company。
在雅思话题中，subsidiary 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
support through subsidies; secure the assistance of by granting a subsidy, as of nations or military forces
指政府提供资金支持某项目，常与 by the government 搭配使用。
在雅思写作中，subsidize 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
a grant paid by a government to an enterprise that benefits the public
指政府或机构提供的财政援助，常用于支持特定行业或个人。
在雅思写作或阅读中，subsidy 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
物质；实质，本质；主旨；财产，资产
the real physical matter of which a person or thing consists; material of a particular kind or constitution; a particular kind or species of matter with uniform properties
既指物质的实体成分，也用于表达“实质内容”而非表面形式。
可观的,大量的;牢固的,结实的;实质的,真实的
having a firm basis in reality and being therefore important, meaningful, or considerable; having substance or capable of being treated as fact; not imaginary

代替人,代用品;vt. 代替
a person or thing that takes or can take the place of another; an athlete who plays only when a starter on the team is replaced
作动词指替代某人或物；作名词时常用 substitution for...结构。
在雅思话题中，substitute 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
an event in which one thing is substituted for another; the act of putting one thing or person in the place of another: "he sent Smith in for Jones but the substitution came too late to help"
表示替换行为本身，常见于讨论政策、产品或语言中的换用情况。
在雅思写作或阅读中，substitution 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
副题(书本中的), 说明对白的字幕。
translation of foreign dialogue of a movie or TV program; usually displayed at the bottom of the screen; secondary or explanatory title
指电影、书籍等作品下方的文字说明，帮助理解外语内容。
在雅思写作或阅读中，subtitle 常用于讨论文化多样性相关话题。
微妙的,难于捉摸的;诡秘的,狡诈的;隐约的
形容难以察觉的细微差别或微妙的情感变化，如 subtle hint（暗示）。
make a subtraction; take off or away

指城市外围的住宅区，常与市中心形成对比。

relating to or characteristic of or situated in suburbs
形容位于郊区或具有郊区特征的，如 suburban life。
在雅思写作或阅读中，suburban 可用于描述环境保护相关情况。

文学用语，指单调乏味的郊区生活及其刻板印象。
在雅思写作或阅读中，suburbia 常用于讨论科技与交流相关话题。
n an electric railway operating below the surface of the ground (usually in a city); n an underground tunnel or passage enabling pedestrians to cross a road or railway
地下铁路系统的简称，美式英语中常作 subway ride。
在雅思写作或阅读中，subway 常用于讨论公共健康相关话题。
成功；继承，接替vt. 接替；继…之后
attain success or reach a desired goal; be the successor (of)
表示在时间或顺序上紧随其后发生某事，如 succeed someone as leader。
在雅思写作中，succeed 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。

指取得成就的状态，常与 achieve 搭配构成 success in doing something。

连续,继续;一连串;继承权

a group of people or things arranged or following in order; the action of following in order; (ecology) the gradual and orderly process of change in an ecosystem brought about by the progressive replacement of one community by another until a stable climax is established

接替的人或事物，继任者
a person who follows next in order; a thing or person that immediately replaces something or someone; a person who inherits some title or office
指接替某人职位或继承遗产的人，常与 take over 连用。
简洁的, 紧身的, 压缩在小范围内的。
s briefly giving the gist of something
形容表达简洁有力、不啰嗦，如 give a succinct answer。
在雅思写作或阅读中，succinct 可用于描述环境保护相关情况。
意为屈服于压力或困难，常搭配 to pressure / temptation。
在雅思写作中，succumb 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。

of so extreme a degree or extent

在雅思写作或阅读中，sudden 可用于描述就业与技能相关情况。
副词表示动作瞬间发生，如 suddenly stop talking。
控告, 向...请求, 请愿。vi.提出诉讼, 提出请求

法律术语，指正式向法院提起诉讼以追究责任或索赔。
在雅思话题中，sue 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
(from)受痛苦，患病；受损失；遭受；忍受
undergo or be subjected to; undergo (as of injuries and illnesses); experience (emotional) pain
表示经历痛苦、损失或不快之事，如 suffer from illness。

名词指持续的苦难状态或折磨过程，常与 intense suffering 搭配。
在雅思话题中，suffering 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
足够, 有能力vt. (食物等)使(某人)满足

表示“足够”，常接 that 从句或不定式，如 It will suffice to wait.。
of a quantity that can fulfill a need or requirement but without being abundant

an affix that is added at the end of the word
指加在单词末尾的字母组合，构成新词的语法成分。
在雅思话题中，suffix 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
a white crystalline carbohydrate used as a sweetener and preservative

imply as a possibility; call to mind

s showing a brooding ill humor; s darkened by clouds

及物动词，表示用简洁语言概括主要内容，常接 that 引导的宾语从句。

概括的;即时的;n. 摘要,概要

the star that is the source of light and heat for the planets in the solar system; a person considered as a source of warmth or energy or glory etc; any star around which a planetary system revolves

first day of the week; observed as a day of rest and worship by most Christians; United States evangelist (1862-1935)
指一周的第一天（周日），常用于表达休息或宗教活动日。

一种大型向日葵植物，常作为观赏花卉种植在花园中。

指照射到地面的自然光线，如 sunlight streaming through the window（阳光透过窗户洒入）。

atmospheric phenomena accompanying the daily appearance of the sun; the daily event of the sun rising above the horizon

n the rays of the sun; n moderate weather; suitable for outdoor activities; n the quality of being cheerful and dispelling gloom

including more than a specified category; extremely large

形容事物极好，常作表语或定语修饰名词。
表面的,表皮的;肤浅的, 一知半解的

concerned with or comprehending only what is apparent or obvious; not deep or penetrating emotionally or intellectually; of, affecting, or being on or near the surface; of little substance or significance
常指仅停留在表面而未深入本质，如 superficial knowledge（肤浅的知识）或 a superficial smile（表面的微笑）。
多余的, 过剩的, 过量的。

主管, 指挥, 管理, 监督。

优良的，卓越的；上级的n. 上级；长者；高手

v take the place or move into the position of

形容人持有迷信观念的，如 superstitious beliefs。

(建筑物, 铁路等的)上部构造, 上层建筑。
structure consisting of the part of a ship above the main deck

在雅思写作或阅读中，superstructure 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
v watch and direct; v keep tabs on; keep an eye on; keep under surveillance
意为监督、管理，常与 over、in charge of 连用。
management by overseeing the performance or operation of a person or group
指监督管理的过程或状态，如 under supervision。

one who supervises or has charge and direction of
指负责监督、管理某事的人，常出现在职场语境中。
在雅思话题中，supervisor 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
a light evening meal; served in early evening if dinner is at midday or served late in the evening at bedtime; a social gathering where a light evening meal is served
特指晚间正餐（dinner），区别于 lunch 或 breakfast。
在雅思写作或阅读中，supper 常用于讨论家庭生活相关话题。

a quantity added (e.g. to make up for a deficiency)

added to complete or make up a deficiency
作形容词表示“补充的”，常修饰课程、材料等，如 supplementary reading。
someone whose business is to supply a particular service or commodity
指提供商品或服务的实体或个人，常见搭配有 supplier of goods/services。
在雅思话题中，supplier 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
(with，to)供给，供应，补足n. 供应，供应量

作名词指“供应”，作动词意为“供给”；supply chain 和 supply line 是常用短语。

支撑；支持；赡养；维持n. 支持者；支柱

the activity of providing for or maintaining by supplying with money or necessities; aiding the cause or policy or interests of; something providing immaterial assistance to a person or cause or interest
既表物理上的“支撑、支持”，也用于抽象意义如 support a decision，还可作名词指援助行为。

在雅思写作或阅读中，supporter 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
料想，猜想；假定conj. 假使…结果会怎样
用于提出假设时多接 that 从句，如 I suppose he is right；也可作插入语表达推测语气。

假定, 想象, 推测, 推想。

在雅思写作或阅读中，supposition 常用于讨论家庭生活相关话题。
镇压;禁止发表;抑制(感情等);阻止…的生长
to put down by force or authority; put out of one's consciousness; reduce the incidence or severity of or stop
意为“压制、抑制”，常用于 suppress evidence（隐瞒证据）或 suppress laughter（忍住笑）。
the failure to develop some part or organ; the act of withholding or withdrawing some book or writing from publication or circulation; forceful prevention; putting down by power or authority

final or last in your life or progress; highest in excellence or achievement; greatest or maximal in degree; extreme

肯定的；一定会…的；有信心的，有把握的
physically secure or dependable; (of persons) worthy of trust or confidence; infallible or unfailing
作副词时表肯定，常与动词连用构成 sure to do sth.；也可用于口语中表达‘当然’或表示确信。
definitely or positively (`sure' is sometimes used informally for `surely')
surely 常置于句首或句中加强语气，表示‘无疑’、‘肯定地’。
表面；外表a. 表面的，肤浅的

the outer boundary of an artifact or a material layer constituting or resembling such a boundary; the extended two-dimensional outer boundary of a three-dimensional object; the outermost level of the land or sea
作名词指物体可见的外层，常与动词 touch、feel 搭配；作形容词表示“表面的”或“肤浅的”。
急剧上升;洋溢,奔放;汹涌,奔腾;vi. 浪涛般汹涌 奔腾;猛冲;(浪涛等)汹涌,奔腾;(人群等)蜂拥而出
a sudden or abrupt strong increase
指突然激增的流量或需求时，常搭配 surge in 表示‘急剧上升’。

a physician who specializes in surgery

the branch of medical science that treats disease or injury by operative procedures; a room where a doctor or dentist can be consulted
指外科手术，也可泛指医学研究或政治上的重大变革。
指基于有限线索进行的推测，常与介词 on 连用构成 surmise on sth.。
在雅思话题中，surmise 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
战胜, 超越, 克服, 在...顶上。

the name used to identify the members of a family (as distinguished from each member's given name)
作名词表示姓氏（surname），动词意为给某人起姓。

指在能力、成绩或数量上超过他人，常接宾语。
n a quantity much larger than is needed; s more than is needed, desired, or required

使诧异，使惊异；奇袭n. 诧异，惊异；奇袭
指因意外事件感到惊讶，常与 at 连用表原因。

causing surprise or wonder or amazement

the delivery of a principal into lawful custody; give up or agree to forgo to the power or possession of another; relinquish possession or control over
指投降或放弃抵抗，常与 to 连用表对象。

extend on all sides of simultaneously; encircle

a detailed critical inspection; consider in a comprehensive way; look over carefully or inspect

易受影响的, 易感动的, 容许...的。n.(因缺乏免疫力而)易得病的人。
(often followed by `of' or `to') yielding readily to or capable of; easily impressed emotionally

疑有,觉得,猜想;觉得可疑;n. 嫌疑犯,可疑分子;a. 可疑的

吊, 悬浮, 悬浮液, 暂停, 中止, 悬而未决, 延迟。

a mixture in which fine particles are suspended in a fluid where they are supported by buoyancy; an interruption in the intensity or amount of something; a mechanical system of springs or shock absorbers connecting the wheels and axles to the chassis of a wheeled vehicle

指突然转向或急转弯，常用于描述车辆、身体动作或剧情走向的意外改变。

control consisting of a mechanical or electrical or electronic device for making or breaking or changing the connections in a circuit; hairpiece consisting of a tress of false hair; used by women to give shape to a coiffure; railroad track having two movable rails and necessary connections; used to turn a train from one track to another or to store rolling stock
