a characteristic (habitual or relatively temporary) state of feeling; a disposition to exhibit uncontrolled anger; the elasticity and hardness of a metal object; its ability to absorb considerable energy before cracking
既指控制情绪的能力，也指调节金属硬度等物理性质的过程。
气质, 性情, 易激动, 急躁。

excessive emotionalism or irritability and excitability (especially when displayed openly); an adjustment of the intervals (as in tuning a keyboard instrument) so that the scale can be used to play in different keys
描述人天生稳定的性格倾向或气质类型（如 calm temperament）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，temperament 常用于讨论公共交通相关话题。
有节制的, 适度的, 戒酒的, (气候)温和的。
(of weather or climate) free from extremes; mild; or characteristic of such weather or climate; not extreme in behavior
形容气候温和宜人，也可指饮食清淡、不过度刺激的生活方式。
在雅思写作或阅读中，temperate 可用于描述家庭生活相关情况。
the degree of hotness or coldness of a body or environment (corresponding to its molecular activity); the somatic sensation of cold or heat
表示空气或液体的冷热程度，常与“升高”、“降低”等动词搭配使用。
在雅思话题中，temperature 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
place of worship consisting of an edifice for the worship of a deity; the flat area on either side of the forehead; an edifice devoted to special or exalted purposes
指宗教建筑或历史古迹，常与 visit、tour 等动词搭配。
在雅思话题中，temple 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
(音乐)速度、拍子, 发展速度。
(music) the speed at which a composition is to be played; the rate of some repeating event
在音乐中指速度，在日常用语中引申为做事的节奏或步调。
在雅思写作或阅读中，tempo 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。
时间的, 当时的, 暂时的, 现世的, 世俗的, [解]颞的。n.世间万物, 教会财产
not eternal; of or relating to or limited by time; of or relating to the temples (the sides of the skull behind the orbit)
作形容词表示“时间的”，常修饰 brain、lobe 等与时间相关的部位。
在雅思写作或阅读中，temporal 可用于描述科技与交流相关情况。
n a worker (especially in an office) hired on a temporary basis; a not permanent; not lasting; s lacking continuity or regularity
意为“暂时的”，常用于 temporary solution、temporary staff 等短语中。
在雅思话题中，temporary 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
诱惑，引诱；吸引，使感兴趣
dispose or incline or entice to; give rise to a desire by being attractive or inviting; try to seduce
指试图引诱或欺骗某人做某事，常与 sb. to do sth. 结构连用。
something that seduces or has the quality to seduce; the desire to have or do something that you know you should avoid
指难以抗拒的诱惑力，常用于 resist temptation、give in to temptation 等表达中。
在雅思话题中，temptation 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
the cardinal number that is the sum of nine and one; the base of the decimal system; being one more than nine
作为数词表示“十”，也可用于 ten years ago 这样的时间状语结构中。
在雅思话题中，ten 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
based on sound reasoning or evidence
指某个观点或立场是可以被合理辩护的，常用于 a defensible/tenable position。
在雅思写作或阅读中，tenable 可用于描述公共交通相关情况。
a good at remembering; s stubbornly unyielding; s sticking together
形容人坚持不懈、有毅力的，常用来修饰 personality、effort 等词。
在雅思写作或阅读中，tenacious 可用于描述家庭生活相关情况。
n an act of being a tenant or occupant
指租赁关系或居住权的状态，常见于 tenancy agreement、secure a tenancy 等语境中。
在雅思写作或阅读中，tenancy 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
承租人；房客；佃户vt. 租借，承租
someone who pays rent to use land or a building or a car that is owned by someone else; a holder of buildings or lands by any kind of title (as ownership or lease); any occupant who dwells in a place
指租房者，常与 landlord（房东）对应，也可作动词表示“租住”。
have a tendency or disposition to do or be something; be inclined; have care of or look after; manage or run
意为照料或倾向做某事，如 tend to a garden；也含照顾病人之意。
a characteristic likelihood of or natural disposition toward a certain condition or character or effect; a general direction in which something tends to move
指事物发展的自然走向或习惯，常接 of doing sth.表示某种趋势。
脆弱的,娇嫩的;温柔的;vt. 提供,投标
something that can be used as an official medium of payment; car attached to a locomotive to carry fuel and water; a boat for communication between ship and shore
作形容词意为“温柔的”，名词则指投标书、嫩肉或出价较低的报价单。
在雅思话题中，tender 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
a game played with rackets by two or four players who hit a ball back and forth over a net that divides the court
专指这项运动，常与 court（球场）、ball（球）等词搭配使用。
在雅思话题中，tennis 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
(支票)限期,男高音歌唱家,进程,大意
the adult male singing voice above baritone; the pitch range of the highest male voice; an adult male with a tenor voice
主要作名词表示“主旨”或“基调”，如 the tenor of a speech。
在雅思话题中，tenor 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
时态v. 拉紧，(使)紧张a. 绷紧的，紧张的
a grammatical category of verbs used to express distinctions of time
既指物理上的紧张状态，也形容情绪激动；常与 muscle、situation 搭配。
在雅思话题中，tense 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
紧张局势;情绪紧张;不安状态

(psychology) a state of mental or emotional strain or suspense; the physical condition of being stretched or strained; a balance between and interplay of opposing elements or tendencies (especially in art or literature)
表示心理或关系中的压力感，如 interpersonal tension，也可作动词“拉紧”。
a portable shelter (usually of canvas stretched over supporting poles and fastened to the ground with ropes and pegs); a web that resembles a tent or carpet
指可移动的遮蔽物，常与 camping、sleeping in a tent 等场景连用。

something that acts like a tentacle in its ability to grasp and hold; any of various elongated tactile or prehensile flexible organs that occur on the head or near the mouth in many animals; used for feeling or grasping or locomotion
多用于生物学描述水母或章鱼触手，也可比喻延伸出的细长部分。
在雅思写作或阅读中，tentacle 常用于讨论全球化相关话题。
s under terms not final or fully worked out or agreed upon; s unsettled in mind or opinion
表示不确定的，常与动词不定式连用，如 make a tentative plan。
position ten in a countable series of things; coming next after the ninth and just before the eleventh in position
指十分之一或第十个，常用于分数表达中，如 one tenth of the total。
在雅思写作或阅读中，tenth 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。
a word or expression used for some particular thing; a limited period of time; any distinct quantity contained in a polynomial
多用于法律或正式语境，表示期限、任期等固定时间段，如 a term of office。
capable of being terminated after a designated time
指可被终止的（状态），常用于合同或服务协议中描述其有效期限制。
在雅思写作或阅读中，terminable 可用于描述公共健康相关情况。
晚期的,末期的;学期的;末端的,终点的 n. 终点站;航空枢扭
of or relating to or situated at the ends of a delivery route
常作形容词修饰疾病或设备，表示处于最后阶段或末端的，如 terminal illness。
在雅思话题中，terminal 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
v bring to an end or halt; v have an end, in a temporal, spatial, or quantitative sense; either spatial or metaphorical; v be the end of; be the last or concluding part of
意为结束某事，后接宾语时常用 terminate a contract 等正式搭配。
a coming to an end of a contract period; the act of ending something
指终止行为或状态的过程，常用于法律文件或技术文档中描述事件终结点。
a system of words used to name things in a particular discipline
专指某一学科领域的专用术语集合，如 medical terminology 表示医学术语体系。
斜坡地,梯田;看台,大阶梯
a level shelf of land interrupting a declivity (with steep slopes above and below); a row of houses built in a similar style and having common dividing walls (or the street on which they face)
常与动词 connect、build 搭配，描述建筑物前的平坦区域或阶梯状平台结构。
在雅思话题中，terrace 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
a piece of ground having specific characteristics or military potential
指地面起伏形态，常用于地理学语境中如 rough terrain 表示崎岖地形条件。
operating or living or growing on land
指地球上的生物或环境，与太空相对；也可形容地面交通工具。
在雅思话题中，terrestrial 可用于描述科技与交流相关问题。
很糟的；可怕的，骇人的；极度的，厉害的
s causing fear or dread or terror; s exceptionally bad or displeasing; s intensely or extremely bad or unpleasant in degree or quality
常作形容词表示“非常糟糕”，口语中语气比 bad 更强烈且带夸张色彩。
used as intensifiers; in a terrible manner
副词形式，多用于非正式场合加强语气，如 terribly sorry（非常抱歉）。
very great or intense; causing extreme terror
美式口语中常作褒义形容词，意为“极好的”，与 terrible 拼写相同但意思相反。
及物动词，指使某人极度恐惧；被动语态 be terrified of... 很常见。
在雅思话题中，terrify 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
of or relating to a territory; displaying territoriality; defending a territory from intruders
涉及国家主权范围或管辖权，常与 waters、disputes 等词搭配使用。
在雅思写作或阅读中，territorial 可用于描述就业与技能相关情况。
an area of knowledge or interest; the geographical area under the jurisdiction of a sovereign state
指地理区域或特定领域（如 computer territory），强调受控的范围空间。
在雅思话题中，territory 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
a person who inspires fear or dread; a very troublesome child; the use of extreme fear in order to coerce people (especially for political reasons)
既指具体的“恐惧情绪”，也作不可数名词泛指社会恐慌现象，需结合语境区分。
在雅思话题中，terror 可用于讨论全球化相关问题。

the calculated use of violence (or the threat of violence) against civilians in order to attain goals that are political or religious or ideological in nature; this is done through intimidation or coercion or instilling fear
专指以制造混乱为目的的系统性暴力行为，常与 state-sponsored、global 等修饰语连用。
在雅思话题中，terrorism 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
a radical who employs terror as a political weapon; usually organizes with other terrorists in small cells; often uses religion as a cover for terrorist activities
指实施恐怖袭击的个人或组织成员，多用于 news reports 中描述具体威胁对象。
在雅思话题中，terrorist 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
s brief and to the point; effectively cut short; `yes'"
形容说话或写作简短有力，常指因省略不必要细节而显得简洁。
在雅思写作或阅读中，terse 可用于描述教育相关情况。
第三的, 第三位的, 第三世纪的。n.[画]第三色, 第三修道会会员, [地]第三纪
from 63 million to 2 million years ago
指第三级或次要的，如 tertiary education（高等教育）和 tertiary industry（第三产业）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，tertiary 可用于描述环境保护相关情况。
any standardized procedure for measuring sensitivity or memory or intelligence or aptitude or personality etc; the act of undergoing testing; the act of testing something
作名词指“考试”或“测试”，常与 take a test 搭配；作动词意为“检验”。
give testimony in a court of law; provide evidence for
作动词时，指在法庭上宣誓作证；也可用于 testify to something，表示证明某事属实。
在雅思话题中，testify 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
a solemn statement made under oath; an assertion offering firsthand authentication of a fact; something that serves as evidence
指在法庭上作为证据的证词，常与动词 give 或 make 搭配使用。
在雅思话题中，testimony 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
四个, 四个一组, [生]四分染色体。
n the cardinal number that is the sum of three and one
在生物学中，指由四个细胞组成的结构；数学上则特指四元组。
在雅思写作或阅读中，tetrad 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
the words of something written; a passage from the Bible that is used as the subject of a sermon; the main body of a written work (as distinct from illustrations or footnotes etc.)
指书面或数字形式的文字内容，常与 digital、plain text 等搭配。
a book prepared for use in schools or colleges
指学校使用的标准教材，常与动词 use、read 搭配。
在雅思写作或阅读中，textbook 常用于讨论公共交通相关话题。
of or relating to fabrics or fabric making
指纺织品，常作不可数名词泛指布料行业或产品。
of or relating to or based on a text
指以文字形式存在的，常用于 textual analysis（文本分析）或 textual evidence（书面证据）。
在雅思写作或阅读中，textual 可用于描述全球化相关情况。
(织品的)质地, (木材, 岩石等的)纹理, (皮肤)肌理, (文艺作品)结构。
the feel of a surface or a fabric; the essential quality of something; the musical pattern created by parts being played or sung together
指物体表面的触感或视觉质感，如 fabric texture（织物纹理）；也可比喻人的性格特征。
在雅思写作或阅读中，texture 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
(用于形容词，副词的比较级之后)比
A particle expressing comparison, used after certain
用作比较级形容词、副词后的连词，引导对比对象，例如 faster than before。
在雅思写作中，than 可用于讨论公共交通或社会变化。
express gratitude or show appreciation to
表达感激之情时常用 thank you for...；也可作动词表示感谢某人做某事。
在雅思话题中，thank 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
形容因得到帮助或好消息而感到欣慰，常接 about/of/for，如 I'm thankful for your help。
在雅思写作或阅读中，thankful 可用于描述公共健康相关情况。
an acknowledgment of appreciation; with the help of or owing to
作名词复数形式泛指谢意；口语中单独说 Thanks! 表示“谢谢”，语气比 thank you 随意。
在雅思话题中，thanks 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
指美国感恩节，是秋季重要节日，人们会举行游行、聚餐并感谢过去一年中的收获与帮助。
短语“Thanksgiving Day”可帮助考生在雅思写作中更清楚地表达观点。
, & As a demonstrative pronoun (pl. Those),; , & As an adjective, that has the same; , & As a relative pronoun, that is
作关系代词引导定语从句或名词性从句；也可作指示代词指代前述内容（that's it）。
在雅思写作中，that 可用于讨论公共交通或社会变化。
the process whereby heat changes something from a solid to a liquid; warm weather following a freeze; snow and ice melt; a relaxation or slackening of tensions or reserve; becoming less hostile
动词，意为冰雪融化或土壤解冻，常与 in spring 连用描述季节变化。
这(那)个；这(那)些(指特定的人或物)
See Thee.; A word placed before nouns to limit or; individualize their meaning.
定冠词 the 用于特指已知的人、物或唯一的事物，如 the sun；也可构成固定搭配 like this/the one。
在雅思写作中，the 可用于讨论城市发展或社会变化。
n a building where theatrical performances or motion-picture shows can be presented; n the art of writing and producing plays; n a region in which active military operations are in progress
英式英语中常拼作 theatre 表示剧场或剧院，美式多用 theater；名词前可加冠词特指某家戏院。
of or relating to the theater; suited to or characteristic of the stage or theater
形容像戏剧一样夸张或充满表演性质的行为，如 theatrical performance。
在雅思话题中，theatrical 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
n the act of taking something from someone unlawfully
指非法拿走他人财物的犯罪行为，常与 steal、robbery 等词关联使用。
The possessive case of the personal pronoun they;
用作物主代词 their，表示“他们的”，后接名词构成所有格结构。
在雅思写作中，their 可用于讨论公共交通或社会变化。
他们/她们/它们(they的宾格形式)
The objective case of they. See They.
作人称代词 them，指代复数人或事物，在句中常充当宾语成分。
在雅思写作中，them 可用于讨论城市发展或社会变化。
a unifying idea that is a recurrent element in literary or artistic work; (music) melodic subject of a musical composition
指作品、活动或讨论的核心思想与基本内容，如 the main theme of a movie。
他(她、它)们自己；他(她、它)们亲自
The plural of himself, herself, and itself. See
反身代词 themselves，强调动作由主语自身完成或表示“他们自己”。
在雅思写作中，themselves 可用于讨论家庭生活或社会变化。
当时，在那时；然后，于是；那么，因而
subsequently or soon afterward (often used as sentence connectors); in that case or as a consequence
副词 then 用于承接上文时间顺序，意为“那时”、“接着”，如 What happened then?。
concerned primarily with theories or hypotheses rather than practical considerations; concerned with theories rather than their practical applications
形容词 theoretical 指基于理论而非实际经验的，常与 practical 形成对比使用。
理论，原理；学说，见解，看法

a well-substantiated explanation of some aspect of the natural world; an organized system of accepted knowledge that applies in a variety of circumstances to explain a specific set of phenomena; a belief that can guide behavior
名词 theory 可指科学原理、政治学说或某种解释方法，如 economic theory。
(medicine) the act of caring for someone (as by medication or remedial training etc.)
therapy 通常与心理治疗相关，也可指物理疗法等医疗手段的总称。
在那儿；往那儿；[作引导词表示"存在"
in or at that place; in that matter; to or toward that place; away from the speaker
用作副词表示‘在那儿’，常与介词 in、at 连用构成地点状语。
用于指代前文提到的时间或事件之后，常接一般过去时描述后续发生的动作。
在雅思阅读中，thereafter 可能出现在环境保护相关文章中。
by that means or because of that
用于连接分句，表示前文所述动作直接导致了后文的某种结果或状态。
(used to introduce a logical conclusion) from that fact or reason or as a result
因此，用于连接前文原因与后文结果的结论性句子。
r from that circumstance or source; r from that place or from there
正式用语，意为“由此”或“从其中”，常用于法律文本中引出结果（如：resulting therefrom）。
在雅思阅读中，therefrom 可能出现在城市发展相关文章中。
(formal) in or into that thing or place
正式用语，意为“在其中”，常用于法律或书面语中代替 in it。
在雅思阅读中，therein 可能出现在就业与技能相关文章中。
of or concerning this or that
指代前文提到的事物，常用于正式文体中避免重复名词。
在雅思阅读中，thereon 可能出现在公共交通相关文章中。
with that or this or it
正式用语，意为“以此”或“因此”，常用于书面语中连接前后逻辑。
在雅思阅读中，therewith 可能出现在家庭生活相关文章中。
relating to or associated with heat; of or relating to a hot spring; caused by or designed to retain heat
常指与热有关的，如 thermal energy（热能）或 thermal imaging（红外成像）。
在雅思话题中，thermal 可用于描述家庭生活相关问题。
thermometer：一种测量温度的仪器，常用于医疗或气象领域。
在雅思话题中，thermometer 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
自动调温器, 温度调节装置。
a regulator for automatically regulating temperature by starting or stopping the supply of heat
thermostat：自动调节温度以维持设定值的装置，常见于空调系统。
在雅思写作或阅读中，thermostat 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。
a book containing a classified list of synonyms
thesaurus：按主题或字母顺序排列的同义词和近义词词典。
在雅思写作或阅读中，thesaurus 常用于讨论科技与交流相关话题。
The plural of this. See This.
these：指示语，用于指代离说话者较近的人、事物或概念（复数）。
在雅思写作中，these 可用于讨论科技与交流或社会变化。
an unproved statement put forward as a premise in an argument
thesis：学术论文的核心论点，通常在引言中提出并在正文中论证。
在雅思话题中，thesis 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
商店。(一般人经常用复数they来指一家商店)
The plural of he, she, or it. They is never used; adjectively, but always as a pronoun proper, and sometimes refers to; persons without an antecedent expressed.

职业；召唤；天命；天职；才能
n the particular occupation for which you are trained; n a body of people doing the same kind of work
指个人使命感强的职业，常与 calling 互换但更强调内在召唤。
在雅思话题中，vocation 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
of or relating to a vocation or occupation; especially providing or undergoing training in special skills
形容与工作技能或就业培训相关的课程、教育或活动。
在雅思写作或阅读中，vocational 可用于描述环境保护相关情况。
the popular taste at a given time; a current state of general acceptance and use
表示某事物正流行，如 in vogue；也可指时尚潮流本身。
声音；嗓音；发音能力；意见，发言权；语态

the distinctive quality or pitch or condition of a person's speech; the sound made by the vibration of vocal folds modified by the resonance of the vocal tract; a sound suggestive of a vocal utterance
既指发出声音的能力（have a good voice），也喻指表达意见的权利。
a produced without vibration of the vocal cords; a deprived of the rights of citizenship especially the right to vote; s uttered without voice
形容无法发声的群体或事物，如 the voiceless poor。
在雅思写作或阅读中，voiceless 可用于描述城市发展相关情况。
真空,空白;空虚感;空隙; a. 无效的;空的,没有的,缺乏的;vt. 使无效
指空无、无效（void contract）或法律上的废止状态。
在雅思话题中，void 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
飞行的, 挥发性的, 可变的, 不稳定的, 轻快的, 爆炸性的。n.[现罕]有翅的动物, 挥发物。
evaporating readily at normal temperatures and pressures; tending to vary often or widely
形容物质易变质的特性，如 volatile chemicals；也可指情绪不稳定者。
在雅思写作或阅读中，volatile 可用于描述文化多样性相关情况。
火山的, 象火山的, 猛烈的, 易突然发作的, 爆发的。n.火山岩。
relating to or produced by or consisting of volcanoes; explosively unstable; igneous rock produced by eruption and solidified on or near the earth's surface; rhyolite or andesite or basalt
与火山活动相关的特征或岩石类型，如火山性土壤。
在雅思写作或阅读中，volcanic 可用于描述公共交通相关情况。
a mountain formed by volcanic material
指喷发岩浆和气体的地质结构；也可作动词表示爆发。
在雅思话题中，volcano 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
a tennis return made by hitting the ball before it bounces
指排球运动或击球动作，如 play volleyball / hit a volley.。
a game in which two teams hit an inflated ball over a high net using their hands; an inflated ball used in playing volleyball
指一项由两队隔网对抗、球员需在空中击球的团队球类运动。
在雅思话题中，volleyball 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。

a unit of potential equal to the potential difference between two points on a conductor carrying a current of 1 ampere when the power dissipated between the two points is 1 watt; equivalent to the potential difference across a resistance of 1 ohm when 1 ampere of current flows through it
作为电学单位，表示电流通过导体两点间的电位差大小。
在雅思话题中，volt 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
the rate at which energy is drawn from a source that produces a flow of electricity in a circuit; expressed in volts
指电路中某点或两点的电势高低程度，常用伏特（V）衡量。
在雅思话题中，voltage 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
the amount of 3-dimensional space occupied by an object; a publication that is one of a set of several similar publications; a relative amount
可指书籍的页数、容器的容量，也可表示声音的大小或书的厚度。
of your own free will or design; done by choice; not forced or compelled; controlled by individual volition
形容行为出于个人意愿而非强制，常修饰动作如 voluntary participation。
在雅思话题中，voluntary 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
(military) a person who freely enlists for service; a person who performs voluntary work; tell voluntarily
指无偿提供时间或技能帮助他人的人，常用于 volunteer work 等语境。
在雅思话题中，volunteer 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
艳丽的, 奢侈逸乐的。
s having strong sexual appeal; s (of a woman's body) having a large bosom and pleasing curves; s displaying luxury and furnishing gratification to the senses
形容女性身材丰满且曲线优美，通常带有审美上的正面评价色彩。
在雅思写作或阅读中，voluptuous 可用于描述文化多样性相关情况。
呕吐, 呕吐物, 催吐剂。vi.呕吐, 大量喷出。vt.吐出, 呕吐
the matter ejected in vomiting; the reflex act of ejecting the contents of the stomach through the mouth
指将胃内容物强力排出体外的生理动作或行为，常与 nausea 相关。
在雅思写作或阅读中，vomit 常用于讨论公共交通相关话题。
旋涡, 旋风, 涡流, (动乱, 争论等的)中心。
n the shape of something rotating rapidly; n a powerful circular current of water (usually the result of conflicting tides)
描述流体旋转形成的中心凹陷的漩涡状结构，如台风眼周围的 vortex。
在雅思写作或阅读中，vortex 常用于讨论家庭生活相关话题。
投票，表决；选票，选票数v. 投票，表决
a choice that is made by counting the number of people in favor of each alternative; the opinion of a group as determined by voting; a body of voters who have the same interests
指公民或组织表达意见、支持某项提案的决定性投票行为过程。
a citizen who has a legal right to vote
指参与选举的公民，常与 register to vote（登记投票）或 early voting（提前投票）搭配使用。
在雅思话题中，voter 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。

n a choice that is made by counting the number of people in favor of each alternative; v express one's preference for a candidate or for a measure or resolution; cast a vote; v express one's choice or preference by vote
作名词表示“投票行为”或“选票”，如 cast a vote；也可指代选举制度本身，常与 rights、process 连用。
give personal assurance; guarantee; summon (a vouchee) into court to warrant or defend a title; give supporting evidence
意为担保某事属实，常用结构为 vouch for someone/something（为某人/某事作证）。

someone who vouches for another or for the correctness of a statement; a document that serves as evidence of some expenditure
指代购物小票或优惠券等凭证，常与 gift voucher（礼品券）或 discount voucher（折扣券）搭配。
在雅思话题中，voucher 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
a solemn pledge (to oneself or to another or to a deity) to do something or to behave in a certain manner
表示郑重承诺或宣誓，常用 vow to do something（发誓做某事），语气比 promise 更严肃。
a speech sound made with the vocal tract open; a letter of the alphabet standing for a spoken vowel
指元音字母及其发音，常与 consonant（辅音）对比使用，如 vowel sounds in English。
在雅思话题中，vowel 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
a journey to some distant place
多用于正式语境描述长途旅行或探险，常搭配 around the world、to space 等目的地。
在雅思话题中，voyage 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
粗俗的,趣味不高的,通俗的,庸俗的
s lacking refinement or cultivation or taste; s of or associated with the great masses of people; s being or characteristic of or appropriate to everyday language
形容粗俗或不雅的行为语言，常用于区分 vulgar language（粗话）与 polite speech（礼貌用语）。
the state of being vulnerable or exposed; susceptibility to injury or attack
指系统或个人的弱点或缺陷，常与安全漏洞 security vulnerability 或个人性格缺陷 personal weakness 搭配。
易受伤的,脆弱的;易受攻击的,难防御的
susceptible to attack; susceptible to criticism or persuasion or temptation; capable of being wounded or hurt
形容易受伤害的状态，如 vulnerable population（弱势群体）或 emotionally vulnerable（情感脆弱）。
指涉水而过，如 wade through the water；也可引申为艰难地处理困难事务。

常作 wag one's tail（摇尾巴）表示高兴或讨好，亦可用于描述物体晃动。

周薪 vt. 从事(战争等)

赌, 赌博, 赌注。vt.下赌注, 保证。vi.打赌

any of various kinds of wheeled vehicles drawn by an animal or a tractor; a child's four-wheeled toy cart sometimes used for coasting

悲叹, 哀号, 痛快。vi.悲叹, 哀号, 嚎啕。vt.悲痛(某人的悲惨遭遇)

a person whose occupation is to serve at table (as in a restaurant); a person who waits or awaits

do without or cease to hold or adhere to

及物动词，意为使某人或某事从沉睡中恢复意识或活力。

走，步行，散步；走遍n. 走，步行，散步
the act of traveling by foot; manner of walking; the act of walking somewhere

New Zealand runner who in 1975 became the first person to run a mile in less that 3 minutes and 50 seconds (born in 1952); United States writer (born in 1944); a shoe designed for comfortable walking

墙，壁，围墙vt. 筑墙围住，用墙隔开

an architectural partition with a height and length greater than its thickness; used to divide or enclose an area or to support another structure; anything that suggests a wall in structure or function or effect; (anatomy) a layer (a lining or membrane) that encloses a structure
指建筑物外围的垂直结构；也可比喻为障碍或限制条件。
any of various small or medium-sized kangaroos; often brightly colored

nut of any of various walnut trees having a wrinkled two-lobed seed with a hard shell; hard dark-brown wood of any of various walnut trees; used especially for furniture and paneling; any of various trees of the genus Juglans
一种硬壳坚果，常用于烹饪或制作糕点及巧克力中。

变小, 亏缺, 衰落, 退潮, 消逝, 呈下弦。n.月亏, 月亏期, 衰退, 衰退期。
(不及物动词)指力量、兴趣或光线逐渐减弱，如“公众热情开始消退 (public enthusiasm began to wane)。

the waging of armed conflict against an enemy; a legal state created by a declaration of war and ended by official declaration during which the international rules of war apply; an active struggle between competing entities

商品保修单或保证书，规定维修权利期限。

(comparative of `bad') inferior to another in quality or condition or desirability; changed for the worse in health or fitness; (comparative of `ill') in a less effective or successful or desirable manner
比较级 worse 既可用于形容词也可用于副词，常用于描述情况变糟或健康状况下降。
礼拜，礼拜仪式；崇拜v. 崇拜，敬仰；做礼拜
the activity of worshipping; a feeling of profound love and admiration
作动词表示“崇拜”，常接神祇、偶像等对象；名词 worship 可指宗教仪式中的敬拜活动。
在雅思话题中，worship 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。
the least favorable outcome; the greatest damage or wickedness of which one is capable; the weakest effort or poorest achievement one is capable of
最高级 worst 用于形容词和副词，强调程度最深或情况最差，如 in the worst case。
价值a. 值…的，价值…的，值得…的

an indefinite quantity of something having a specified value; the quality that renders something desirable or valuable or useful; French couturier (born in England) regarded as the founder of Parisian haute couture; noted for introducing the bustle (1825-1895)
worth 后接名词、动名词或不带 to 的不定式，表示“值得”，如 worth trying。
形容某物毫无价值或无意义时常用 worthless，强调完全缺乏用处或道德品质低下。
在雅思写作或阅读中，worthless 可用于描述公共交通相关情况。
值得(花时间、精力)的;合算的
sufficiently valuable to justify the investment of time or interest
worthwhile 意为“值得花时间/精力”，常作表语形容词，如 It is worthwhile to study hard.。
having worth or merit or value; being honorable or admirable; having qualities or abilities that merit recognition in some way
worthy 后接 of + 名词或不定式，表示“配得上”或“值得尊敬/注意”，语气较正式。
在雅思写作或阅读中，worthy 可用于描述全球化相关情况。
an injury to living tissue (especially an injury involving a cut or break in the skin); a casualty to military personnel resulting from combat; a figurative injury (to your feelings or pride)
指身体受伤处，也可比喻情感或关系受到的严重伤害。
在雅思写作或阅读中，wound 常用于讨论教育相关话题。
作形容词修饰人时，特指在事故、战争等中受轻伤但未死亡者。
在雅思写作或阅读中，wounded 可用于描述环境保护相关情况。
arrange or fold as a cover or protection; crash into so as to coil around
既指用布条包扎伤口，也指将物品包裹起来以防损或便于携带的动作。
在雅思话题中，wrap 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
n a loose dressing gown for women; n the covering (usually paper or cellophane) in which something is wrapped; n cloak that is folded or wrapped around a person
常作不可数名词泛指包装纸、塑料膜等包装材料，也可指具体的包装盒。
在雅思写作或阅读中，wrapper 常用于讨论公共健康相关话题。
intense anger (usually on an epic scale); belligerence aroused by a real or supposed wrong (personified as one of the deadly sins)
多用于文学或宗教语境，形容上帝对罪恶的极度愤怒与惩罚性怒火。
在雅思话题中，wrath 可用于讨论公共健康相关问题。
flower arrangement consisting of a circular band of foliage or flowers for ornamental purposes
指节日庆典中佩戴的花环、花圈，尤常见于圣诞节装饰或纪念仪式。
在雅思写作或阅读中，wreath 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
move with slow, sinuous movements; decorate or deck with wreaths; form into a wreath
意为将头发编成辫子并盘绕在头上，是传统发型制作的具体动作。
在雅思写作中，wreathe 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
破坏,船舶失事;失事船只
something or someone that has suffered ruin or dilapidation; a ship that has been destroyed at sea
指船只、飞机等交通工具因事故严重损坏而报废，也可作动词表示毁坏某物。

a sharp strain on muscles or ligaments; a hand tool that is used to hold or twist a nut or bolt; twist or pull violently or suddenly, especially so as to remove (something) from that to which it is attached or from where it originates
既指用扳手拧动螺丝的机械动作，也比喻突然用力扭转局面或关系。
combat to overcome an opposing tendency or force; engage in deep thought, consideration, or debate; engage in a wrestling match
常与 with 连用表示摔跤、角力等肢体对抗运动，也可引申为激烈竞争。
不幸的,可怜的;令人难受的
s of very poor quality or condition; s characterized by physical misery; s very unhappy; full of misery
形容处境悲惨或品质恶劣，常作表语如 feel wretched。
twist and compress, as if in pain or anguish; twist, squeeze, or compress in order to extract liquid
指用力扭转物体（wring hands）或挤干水分（wring out a towel）。
a slight depression in the smoothness of a surface; a minor difficulty; a clever method of doing something (especially something new and different)
名词指皮肤皱纹，动词表示产生褶皱，如 wrinkle one's brow。
a joint between the distal end of the radius and the proximal row of carpal bones
专指手腕部位，常与 watch、band 等搭配构成固定短语。
在雅思话题中，wrist 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
写，书写，写字；写作；写信(给)，函告
produce a literary work; communicate or express by writing; communicate (with) in writing
基本意为书写，过去式 wrote 和分词 written 形式需特别注意区分。
writes (books or stories or articles or the like) professionally (for pay); a person who is able to write and has written something
指从事写作的人或作者，常与 prolific、famous 等形容词连用。
在雅思话题中，writer 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。

the act of creating written works; the work of a writer; anything expressed in letters of the alphabet (especially when considered from the point of view of style and effect); (usually plural) the collected work of an author
作不可数名词表示书面作品总称；作动名词时意为“书写”这一行为。
set down in writing in any of various ways; systematically collected and written down
作为过去分词修饰名词（a written report），或构成被动语态 be written down。
错的ad. 错误地，不正确地n. 错误v. 委屈
contrary to conscience or morality or law
作形容词表示“错误的”，常与 do、answer 等动词搭配，如 get it wrong。
副词形式 wrongly，强调行为方式错误，常用于修饰 did、said 等行为动词。
在雅思阅读中，wrongly 可能出现在全球化相关文章中。
vbl.work的过去式和过去分词。adj.做成的, 形成的, 精炼的, [冶](金属)锻造的。
v exert oneself by doing mental or physical work for a purpose or out of necessity; v be employed; v have an effect or outcome; often the one desired or expected
作形容词指“锻造的”或“精心制作的”，如 wrought iron（锻铁）；也可形容情感强烈，如 a wrought feeling。
在雅思阅读中，wrought 可能出现在教育相关文章中。

a copy made by a xerographic printer; a duplicator (trade mark Xerox) that copies graphic matter by the action of light on an electrically charged photoconductive insulating surface in which the latent image is developed with a resinous powder
常用作动词 xerox sth. to copy documents via photocopier，或作名词指复印件本身（a xerox）。
在雅思话题中，Xerox 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
examine by taking x-rays; take an x-ray of something or somebody
既指医学影像检查 X-ray examination，也常作为动词表示拍摄 X 光片：to get an x-ray。
在雅思写作或阅读中，x-ray 常用于讨论科技与交流相关话题。
an expensive vessel propelled by sail or power and used for cruising or racing
专指大型豪华机动游艇（motor yacht），区别于帆船；常用于描述休闲航行或高端度假场景。
在雅思话题中，yacht 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。

a unit of length equal to 3 feet; defined as 91.44 centimeters; originally taken to be the average length of a stride; the enclosed land around a house or other building; a tract of land enclosed for particular activities (sometimes paved and usually associated with buildings)
作长度单位 yard (码) 时，1 yard=0.9144 meter；亦指场地（如 schoolyard）或花园区域（garden）。
在雅思话题中，yard 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
纱, 纱线, 故事, 奇谈。
可作名词指“毛线”用于编织，也可比喻为闲聊故事：spin a yarn。动词形式意为讲述虚构情节。
在雅思写作或阅读中，yarn 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
utter a yawn, as from lack of oxygen or when one is tired
作不及物动词 yawn 表示打哈欠；名词 the yawning crowd 指因无聊而打瞌睡的人群，含贬义色彩。
年，年度，学年a./ad. 每年，一年一次

a period of time containing 365 (or 366) days; a period of time occupying a regular part of a calendar year that is used for some particular activity; the period of time that it takes for a planet (as, e.g., Earth or Mars) to make a complete revolution around the sun
基本时间单位 year（年），常用于表达年龄、年份或周期性事件；复数 years 可泛指多年时光流逝。
每年的，一年一度的ad. 每年，一年一次地
n a reference book that is published regularly once every year; s occurring or payable every year; r without missing a year
副词 yearly 表示“每年一次”，如 a yearly meeting，强调规律性发生的年度活动或检查周期。
在雅思写作或阅读中，yearly 可用于描述家庭生活相关情况。
have affection for; feel tenderness for
动词 yearn for sth. 表达深切渴望（常接介词 for），情感强烈且持久，区别于普通 want。
在雅思话题中，yearn 可用于讨论城市发展相关问题。

a commercial leavening agent containing yeast cells; used to raise the dough in making bread and for fermenting beer or whiskey; any of various single-celled fungi that reproduce asexually by budding or division
酵母是发酵面包和酿酒时使用的微生物，常以干性或活性形式添加。
在雅思话题中，yeast 可用于讨论就业与技能相关问题。
大叫；呼喊vt. 叫着说n. 叫声；喊声
utter or declare in a very loud voice
yell"指大声喊叫或尖叫，常用于表达强烈情绪如恐惧、兴奋或抗议。
在雅思写作中，yell 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
of the color intermediate between green and orange in the color spectrum; of something resembling the color of an egg yolk; changed to a yellowish color by age
yellow"既形容颜色也常比喻胆小怯懦（a yellow belt）或色情内容。
在雅思话题中，yellow 可用于讨论教育相关问题。
狗吠, (因痛而)叫喊, 叫喊着说。
yelp"特指狗因疼痛、兴奋而发出的短促尖叫声，也可用于人表示惊讶。
在雅思写作中，yelp 可用于讨论社会、教育或工作中的变化。
yes"是标准肯定回答；口语中常与缩略语如 "yeah", "yep"互换使用。
the day immediately before today; the recent past; on the day preceding today
yesterday"指过去一天，也可作副词表示“就在昨天”，如 I saw him yesterday.。
还，尚，仍然；已经conj. 然而ad. 甚至
up to the present time; within an indefinite time or at an unspecified future time
yet"用于否定句或疑问句末尾（not... yet）表示“尚未”；肯定句中表“仍然”。
生产;生长;让步;投降;屈服;n. 产量
be the cause or source of; give in, as to influence or pressure; bring in
yield"作动词指产生收益、让路或屈服，名词则指产量如 crop yield。
fabric comprising a fitted part at the top of a garment; an oppressive power; a pair of draft animals joined by a yoke
yoke"原指套在牛颈上的轭具，现多用于比喻束缚关系（a yoke of oppression）。
在雅思话题中，yoke 可用于讨论公共交通相关问题。
nutritive material of an ovum stored for the nutrition of an embryo (especially the yellow mass of a bird or reptile egg)
yolk"专指蛋黄，是鸡蛋中富含营养的部分，常用于烹饪如制作蛋黄酱。
在雅思话题中，yolk 可用于讨论家庭生活相关问题。
The pronoun of the second person, in the nominative,; dative, and objective case, indicating the person or persons addressed.; See the Note under Ye.
用作第二人称代词，指“你”，常用于口语及正式文体中。
在雅思写作中，you 可用于讨论教育或社会变化。
年轻的，幼小的；没经验的n. 青年人
any immature animal; United States film and television actress (1913-2000); United States civil rights leader (1921-1971)
形容人或事物处于早期发展阶段或年纪较小，如 young adult。
在雅思话题中，young 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。
小伙子，年轻人；少年，儿童
n a young person of either sex
指年轻的人，通常带有亲切或非正式的语气，多用于口语。
在雅思写作或阅读中，youngster 常用于讨论科技与交流相关话题。
The form of the possessive case of the personal
作为第二人称所有格代词“你的”，后接名词表示所属关系。
在雅思写作中，your 可用于讨论城市发展或社会变化。
An emphasized or reflexive form of the pronoun of the
反身代词，用于强调动作由自己完成或加强语气，如 do it yourself。
在雅思写作中，yourself 可用于讨论公共健康或社会变化。
the time of life between childhood and maturity; early maturity; the state of being young or immature or inexperienced; an early period of development
指青年时期、青春年华，也可泛指年轻人这一群体。
在雅思话题中，youth 可用于讨论文化多样性相关问题。
suggestive of youth; vigorous and fresh
形容充满朝气或活力，常修饰人、事物或其状态显得年轻。
在雅思写作或阅读中，youthful 可用于描述文化多样性相关情况。
excessive fervor to do something or accomplish some end
指对某事的热情与投入程度，常用于描述积极追求目标的动力。
s marked by active interest and enthusiasm
形容某人或组织表现出极大的热情、忠诚或坚定支持的态度。
any of several fleet black-and-white striped African equines
指一种身上有黑白条纹的大型非洲动物，常作为独特图案的象征。
在雅思话题中，zebra 可用于讨论科技与交流相关问题。

a mathematical element that when added to another number yields the same number; the point on a scale from which positive or negative numerical quantities can be measured; the sight setting that will cause a projectile to hit the center of the target with no wind blowing
作名词指“零”，作副词表示完全否定，如 zero tolerance（零容忍）。
风味, 强烈的兴趣, 热情, 热心。vt.给...调味。
常与 for sth. 搭配，表达对某事的热情或兴趣。
在雅思写作或阅读中，zest 常用于讨论环境保护相关话题。

a bluish-white lustrous metallic element; brittle at ordinary temperatures but malleable when heated; used in a wide variety of alloys and in galvanizing iron; it occurs naturally as zinc sulphide in zinc blende
指一种银白色金属元素，常用于合金制造。
在雅思写作或阅读中，zinc 常用于讨论科技与交流相关话题。
(用拉链或像拉链那样)合上或打开
n a quantity of no importance; n a code of letters and digits added to a postal address to aid in the sorting of mail; n forceful exertion
作动词意为快速移动或关闭（如 zip up），名词指拉链动作。
A postal code, especially for addresses served by the US Postal Service, consisting of a five- or nine-figure number.
即邮政编码，用于邮件地址中定位具体区域。
在雅思写作或阅读中，zipcode 常用于讨论城市发展相关话题。
n a fastener for locking together two toothed edges by means of a sliding tab; v close with a zipper
指衣物上的拉链部件，也可作动词表示拉上或拉开。
在雅思写作或阅读中，zipper 常用于讨论就业与技能相关话题。
地区，区域v. 分区，划分地带

a locally circumscribed place characterized by some distinctive features; any of the regions of the surface of the Earth loosely divided according to latitude or longitude; an area or region distinguished from adjacent parts by a distinctive feature or characteristic
常与介词 in/on/under 连用，划分特定区域或范围。
在雅思话题中，zone 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
n the facility where wild animals are housed for exhibition
指饲养各种动物的场所，是 family outing（家庭出游）的热门地点。
在雅思话题中，zoo 可用于讨论环境保护相关问题。
the branch of biology that studies animals
作为学科名称，研究动物及其分类、行为等科学领域。
